Umutsi wekugoma wentani?Umutsi wekugoma ucecesha sincandzatifo sakho (lesilwa nekugula lokukungenile), kutsi ukhicite emasotja emtimba (emaphrotheni lalwa netifo) – njengobe bekatowenta njalo uma ngabe bewuvule leke egciwaneni.
Kungani lomutsi wekugoma ubaluleke kangaka? Kugonyelwa i-COVID-19 kuyindlela lesebenta kahle kakhulu ekutsini nitivikele kuleligciwane ngobe ematfuba engoti yekutsi linga ningena anciphile. Ubese uba nematfuba lamancane kabi ekutsi ungendlulisela leligciwane kulomunye umuntfu.Inhloso yalokugonywa kutsi kufinyelelwe linani lebantfu lelenele – lapho khona uma linani lebantfu lelenele seligonyele leligciwane kuniketa kuvikeleka ngalokungacondzi-ngco labo labangakagonywa, lo kwenta kutsi kubhebhetseka kwaleligciwane kulawuleke.
Ngalelo langa nasemala ngeni lalandzelako, laba ningi balahlekelwa miphe fumulo yabo.

Kepha emave lanetikhungo letinemandla, tinchubo tete bulungiswa letihlala tica phele kanye nebetindzaba labanemandla akhonile ku vikela emalungelo ebantfu ekutsini anganyatselwa ku phindze futsi kusetjentiswe kabi ligunyamandla lembuso.
Setinyanga letisitfupha solo kwamenyetelwa inhlekelele yavelonkhe. Nanoma-nje lesimo salesifo kanye ne tinsayeya taso letijule kabi letente lelive lelinebantfu labatigidzi letinge-58 kutsi babe ngaphansi kweku valelwa lokukhulu, sichube kahle kakhulu. Sikhonile kulawula kubhebhetseka kwalesifo ikakhulu ngenca yekubambisana nekucaphela kwato tonkhe takhamiti.
Loku kwentiwe kakhulu ngumsebenti lobabatakekako webetindzaba.
Siswele imilomo letinkhu lungwane yekubonga tintsa tseli talapha eNingizimu Afrika ngekusebenta nge kutikhandla kwato.

Linani lalabashone  ngenca yeligciwane lecorona  esikhatsini lesisandza kwendlula selengce sibalo se-2 000. Emkhatsini walabo labalahle-kelwe timphilo tabo tisebenti tekunakekela ngetemphilo, tingcweti letiphelele lebetinakekela labagulako, futsi betitinsika futsi tidvudvuta labo labasesibhedlela labahlukanisiwe nemindeni yabo.
 Indzaba yekutsi lamadvodza nabomake labenta lemisebenti lehloniphekile nalengcwele kwabona bayagula futsi bayashona kusishayo lesibuhlungu kakhulu.
 Ngibo labayibambe embi li lapho imphi yekulwa nalolubhubhane ishisa  khona. Basebenta ngaphasi kwekucindzeteleka lokukhulu futsi kufanele kutsi batfwale kucindzeteleka ngekwe-ngcondvo ngobe bati kutsi basebungotini bekutseleleka ngaleligciwane.

Kubanikati bemabhizinisi labaningi, kubona ibhizinisi loyikhulise kusukela ekucaleni ushikashikeka kutsi uphile, noma uze uphoceke kutsi uvale iminyango yayo, kudzabukisa inhlitiyo.
Kusukela kwacala lolubhu bhane lwe-COVID-19, loku kube simo lesidzabukisako emabhizinisi lamakhulu nala mancane labukene naso, ku ngasiko la eveni letfu kuphela kodvwa emhlabeni wonkhe jikelele. Lolubhubhane kanye netinyatselo lebekufanele sititsatse kuncandza kusabalala kweli gciwane kube nemtselela lomubi emabhizinisini.
Ekubukaneni nalolubhu bhane siye safuna kutsatsa indlela lesuselwa ebufakazini benchubomgomo nasekuse benteni, ngekubuka lucwaningo lwesayensi, kulungisa ngebu chwepheshe nemakhono, kanye nemtselela kuyo yonkhe imikha kha yebantfu.

Sikhwama Lesibhekele Bu dlova Lobucondziswe Kubulili Lobutsite kanye Nekubulawa Kwebasikati (i-GBVF) si phokophele kucinisekisa kutsi iNingizimu Afrika ikhulule kile ayihlangabetani ne-GBVF lecondziswe kubomake; bantfwana; besifazane labaya emacasini nebesifazane, labadvuna labaya emacasini nalabadvuna, bantfu laba bomphacambili, labantjintje bulili babo bemvelo, bantfu labanetitfo tebulili bobubili, bantfu lababukeka ngalokungakavami, labangafaki temacasi kanye nalabanye (i-LGBTQIA+).
Lesikhwama setfulwa ngu -Mengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ngeNdlovana nga-2021, kwesekela kuphunyeleliswa kweLuhlelo Lwavelonkhe Lwelisubuciko le-GBVF.

Njengoba sive sigubha Inya nga Yelusha, iVuk’uzenzele  ibukisisa indlela lusha lwale live luniketwa ngayo ema tfuba ekuphumelela Litiko Letemfundvo Lephakeme Nekucecesha.
Naledi Pandor, Indvuna Yetemfundvo Lephakeme Nekucecesha lebekwe  ngeNdlovana iniketwe u msebenti wekungenisa luhle lo lwemfundvo lephakeme yamahhala kulabo laba phuyile kanye nalabafundzi labavela kumindeni lehola imali lengetulu kwelizinga lelibekiwe kepha labasolo bangakhoni kukhokhela ti ndleko tasenyuvesi.
Emva kwesiteleka lesidze savelonkhe ngaphansi  kwesihloko lesitsi: #Fees MustFall,  kwamenyetelwa ngeNgongoni kutsi lusha loluvela kumindeni lehola imali lengaphansi kwe-R350 000 ngemnyaka lutawu tfola imfundvo yemazinga laphakeme nekuceceshwa yamahhala.

Bantfu labanekugu-la labaphila nako – njengesifuba  semoya, ihayihayi, sifo setinso nesifo sashukela – bangahlangabetana neti-mphawu teligciwane le-corona (i-COVID-19) leti-matima kakhulu, futsi bangashona ngenca yebu-matima lobubangwa ngule-ligciwane emitimbeni yabo.
Ngenhlanhla, ngesikhatsi ingcweti yekunakekela nge-temphilo leseKapa nalongu-make webantfwana labatsatfu Insaaf Mohammed lonemi-nyaka lenge-40 ngesikhatsi atfolakala kutsi unalo neligciwane le-COVID-19 ngesikhatsi agula aphetfwe sifuba semoya, wakhona kutsi atilawule totimbili letimo aka-zange agula kamatima.Mohammed wasuleleka nge-COVID-19 ayitfola kumyeni wakhe, losebenta elabhorethi esibhedlela eGroote Schuur.

Tinhlangano tetenkholo tibe nguletibalulekile eku bukaneni kwetfu nalesifo, betinganiketi-nje kuphela kudvudvuteka kwemphe fumulo, kepha betiphindze futsi tinakekele labo la bahlaseleke kalula ludvosi lwalolubhubhane, kufaka ekhatsi kubanika kudla,  indzawo yekukhosela kanye naletinye tinsita tetenhlalo.
  Tenkholo tidlala indzi ma lebaluleke kakhulu  etimphilweni tetigidzi  tebantfu baseNingizimu Afrika, futsi kudvumisa bandzawonye kwabo kuyincenye lebaluleke kakhulu ekukhonteni kwabo. Kukhona kuhlangana ndza wonye ngekwetinsita te -tenkholo kukuhhamuleka lokwemukelekile ngemuva kwesikhatsi lesimatima kakhulu kubantfu labehlukene, kumindeni kanye nemimango.

Ngekusho kweNdvuna  yeTasekhaya Malusi Gigaba imigca lemidze beyibangwa linani lelisetulu lebantfu,  indzawo lengakaneli yelihhovisi lelingembili, tinkinga tebuholi kanye nekuvalwa kwemahho visi ngaboMgcibelo.
Kulungisa lenkinga, litiko liba la linani lemahhovisi alo eveni lonkhe kutfola kutsi ngukutiphi tindzawo lapho kudzingeka kwentiwa ncono khona tinsi takalo.

Ngekusho kweLitiko Le-temphilo laseNshonalanga Kapa, kushisa kwasehlobo kuhamba nebungoti lobusetulu bekoma, lokuyindlela yekulahlekelwa ngemanti lokuyingoti emtimbeni.Koma imvamisa kubangwa kunganatsi lokusamanti lokwanele kuvala sikhala se-manti lalahleka ngenca yeku-juluka. Kungabangwa futsi kugula, lokubanga kuhlanta kanye/nome ngumsheko, nome kujuluka ngenca yemkhuhlane.Kulahlekelwa ngulokusa-manti emtimbeni akwenteki kuphela nangabe wenta imisebenti lematima yemtimba, kodvwa kungaphindze futsi kubangwe kuhamba, kulima engadzini nome ku-gibela ibhayisikili, ikakhulu nakushisa nome nakunetimo letinemswakamo.Nangabe womile, umtimba wakho ngeke ukhone kuse-benta njengalokwetayelekile.

Kutfutfukisa luhlelo lwekufaka ticeloKumitamo yekutfutfukisa loluhlelo lwayo kanye netinchubo tekwenta kube malula kulabo labanesifiso sekufaka ticelo, Indvuna Nzimande utsi kulomnyaka, i-NSFAS isebentise tindlela tekutfutfukisa loluhlelo kute kucinisekiswe kutsi konkhe kuhamba ngendlela lefanele. Utsi lephothali ye-inthanethi yekufaka ticelo idizayinwe kabusha kute ikhone kusebentiseka malula futsi ifinyelele nakuletinye tinkhundla labatitayele labo labafuna kufaka ticelo letifana nabo-WhatsApp, i-Twitter, i-Facebook ne-Instagram. “Loluhlelo lwekufaka ticelo kwalona lwentiwe kutsi lube malula futsi imibuto lebutwako bantfu bayayivisisa.

I-Down Syndrome  (i-DS) kukhubateka kwemachromosome  lokwenteka ngesikhatsi ukhulelwa.
Sisebenti setemphilo sase Mpumalanga Dkt. Midah Maluleka utsi, “Kunelinani lelingetiwe le21 chromosone  (i-Trisomy 21) lelibanga kube nekubambeleleka kweku khula kwemtimba nekwe ngcondvo. Akunambangela lecondzile yalechromosome  lengcile. Kutfolakele kutsi akusimayelana nemnyaka, simo setemnotfo netenhlalo, nebuhlanga noma nenkolo.
Futsi akusimayelana nelu futo.” Maluleka ungeta kutsi i-DS ikukhubateka kwemachromosome  lokuvamile eba ntfwaneni labasandza kuta lwa. “Munye umntfwana kulaba-1000 labatelwe ema veni latfutfukile nemntfwa na munye kulaba-650 labatalwa emaveni lasatfu tfuka, njengaleli letfu, bayatsi ntseka.

Labantfu baseNingizimu Afrika laba-114 labahlengwe eWuhan eShayina kulamaviki lambalwa lengcile balucedzile luvalelo lwabo ngenca yalesifo futsi bahlanganiswe nemindeni yabo. Bonkhe bahlolwe ba-tfolakala kutsi bete leligciwane futsi basesimeni semphilo lesihle futsi bajabulile.  Tinyanga letinengi, bebasolo bavaleleke lapho bebakwe khona, kwekucala eWuhan tinsuku letinge-51 kwase kuba kusePolokwane tinsuku leti-14. Bebangakhoni kutsi babe nebantfu babo lababatsandzako, bangakhoni kusuka baphume lapho bebahlala khona futsi bete nesiciniseko sekutsi kuhlupheka kwabo kutawuphela nini. Nasengeta letinsuku leti-17 letisasele bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika labasatatihlala bavaleleke emakhaya kusho kutsi kubo sekutawuba tinsuku letinge-82.

laseNingizimu Afrika laba- setikolweni tahulumende sebayakhona kwenta umse- benti wabo kancono, sibo- nga loluhlelo lwahulumende lolucinisekisa kwekutsi tisu tabo tihlale tisemfi ngekudla lokunemsoco.
Litiko Letemfundvo Lesise-
kelo (i-DBE), ngekusebentisa Luhlelo Lwavelonkhe Lwe- tikolo Lwekondla (i-NSNP), liyengcile injongo yalo yekunika kudla bantfwana bakuleli labalinganiselwa kumaphesenti lange-75.
lweni onkhe malanga ba- ntfwana labalinganiselwa eti-9 032 622 velonkhe.
Utsite tikolo letingasiyo ince- nye yaloluhlelo kufanele kutsi tivakashele emahhovisi asesigodzini sabo uma ngabe tifuna kuba yincenye yalo. N gemnyakatimali	wa- nga-2015/16, tigidzi letili- nganiselwa ku-R5 703 tafa- kwa kuloluhlelo.

Loluhlelo luhlose kutfutfukisa likhono lebantfwana lekufundza, ngekunciphisa indlala nekungondleki kahle naseku khuliseni kuta esikoleni, kakhulu  etikolweni lebetincishwe ema tfuba.
“Loluhlelo lumcoka ekuchubekiseni emalungelo ebafundzi lakumtsetfosisekelo ekutfola kudla lokusisekelo newekutfola imfundvo lesisekelo,” kuchaza Lisekela Lendvuna Yemfundvo Lesisekelo Dkt Reginah Mhaule.
Ngenca yale-NSNP, banyenti bantfwana labaya ngesikhatsi esikolweni futsi labaya njalo esikolweni, futsi kugcila kwengcondvo etifundvweni kuyatfutfuka.
Ngekuya kweLitiko Lete mfundvo Lesisekelo (i-DBE) bafundzi bafundziswa kudla kahle kanye nangendlela yeku phila lekahle.
Tikolwa futsi tiyagcugcutelwa kutsi titisungulele tingadze tato tekudla kute tingete kulokudla kwe-NSNP.

Bomasipala kulo lonkhe le live lakitsi nabo manje sebeme ngetinyawo basombulula lenkinga. Masipala weNdzawo waseGeorge wendlala emazinga lamasha ekutsi tigitjelwa temmango tingabasebentela kanjani bantfu labakhubatekile.
Ngekusitwa ngetimali tesi bonelelo lesivela kuLitiko Letekutfutsa, inchubo yetigitjelwa letingemabhasi lajike letako (i-BRT) e-GO GEORGE kwamanje inemabhasi lamancani lange-35, emabhasi lamakhulu lange-36 kanye nema bhasi lasemkhatsini ngebukhu lu lange-33. Wonkhe lamabhasi akhiwe afanela titulo letine masondvo.
Lamabhasi lamakhulu  kanye nalawo lasemkhatsini ngebukhulu anetindzawo tekwe-elekthronoki tekuhamba tihlalo temasondvo, tihla lo letikhetsekile kanye naletinye tisetjentiswa letetayelekile.

Umcimimlilo lomncane Vuyiseka Arendse (26) uyincenye yelicembu le-Crew Juliet, licembu laseNingi-zimu Afrika lekucala le-bacimimlilo wetikhotsa labomake kuphela. Emandla akhe kanye nekutimise-la ekutakheleni ligama ku-lomkhakha wetekucima umlilo lobuswa ngulabadvuna kuyinshisekelo sibili kubo bonkhe bomake.
Arendse wakhulela edolobheni lelincane laseBho-folo leliseNshonalanga Kapa. Emva kwekucedza sikolo, walinga kufundza ekolishi e-Oudtshoorn, kodvwa wancuma kubuyela emuva ekhaya kuyokondla umndeni wakhe. Wasebenta esuphama-kethe kwesikhashana, kodvwa kucima umlilo kwatsatsa emehlo akhe.“Ngabona bacimimlilo bagcoke iyunifomu yabo kanye nemaloli labovu lamakhulu. Ngatsatseka ngekushesha ngase ngifuna kwati kabanti,” kusho Arendse.

Ngekusho kwenhlangano yeSitfutfwane yaseNingi-zimu Afrika, batali bangakhatsateka ngelikusasa lemntfwanabo futsi bakukhandze kulukhuni kwemukela sitfutfwane nome kukhuluma ngaso. Ungativa utfukutsele, ukhatsateke kakhulu, ute kwenetiseka futsi utive une-licala, kodvwa ungakuncoba konkhe loko lokuvako nge-kutsi utifundzise mayelana nalesimo.Sitfutfwane sinemkhuba wetiwombe tekukubamba ngekuphindzelela, lokwenteka nangabe kube ne-kukhishwa kwemitsambo ebuchosheni.Kungani kube ngumntfwanami?Kuvisisa sitfutfwane nekutsi kungani kube nekubambeka akuchazi kutsi kungani loko kwenteke kumntfwanakho.Kutehlakalo letilinga-niselwa ku-66%, imbangela yesitfutfwane ayatiwa. Loku kubitwa ngekutsi i-idiopathic epilepsy.

Loku kukhomba ku khula nge-25% kulomnyaka lowengca nange-15% emnyakeni losandza kundlula ngembi kwekungena kwalobhubhane weCOVID-19.
Ngaso leso sikhatsi, i-SARS futsi ikhokhe imalimbuyiselo lesetulu kunayo yonkhe kusukela yasungulwa eminyakeni le-25 leyengca.
I-Ejensi lenelikhono lekugco gca intsela ikutsatsela etulu kwakha hulumende losebe ntako.
Imali yentsela ikhulisa kutfu tfuka kwesive sakitsi. Imali legcogcwe yi-SARS isebenta kuphakela tinsita nesakhiwo nchanti.
Ngalemali lemathriliyoni la-R17.8 legcogcwe yi-SARS kusukela ngemnyaka we-1997, sikhone kwakha sakhiwo nchanti setenhlalo lesifana nemitfolamphilo, tikolwa netibhedlela, satfutfukisa futsi sakha imigwaco lemisha, futsi sasekela imimango lebutsakatsaka kakhulu ngekuyinika sibonelelo sahulumende kanye nangaletinye tindlela.

Kuchubekile kakhulu kubita kwetindleko tekutsenga kudla naletinye tintfo letimcoka, tekukhokhela tinsita letisisekelo netekusebentisa tigitjelwa temmango netangasese. Nanoma lokunyuka kwetindleko kutsintsa wonkhe umuntfu, imindeni lehola kancane ngiyo letsintseka kakhulu.
Inkhomba Yetindleko Tebatsengi yakamuva yaMabasa 2022 leshicilelwe Telubalobalo Tase- Ningizimu Afrika ikhombise kutsi kube nekuphumula kwesikhashana ebantfwini labatsintseke kakhulu base- Ningizimu Afrika. Kwehla kwemandla emali yekudla kukhombe kutsi kukumaphesenti la-6.2. Kudla lokunyenti lokusisekelo kubita kakhulu kunalomnyaka lowengcile, kudla lokusisekelo lokufana nemafutsa ekupheka kukhomba kunyuka lokukhulu kunako konkhe.

ejalidini lakhe bekangaca- bangi kutsi ngalelinye lilanga utawuba ngumnikati webhi- zinisi yekulima lephakela ti- tolo tendzawo kanye netikolo lapho bantfwana badla khona. Ng aleka (loneminyaka yebudzala lenge-67) udzabuka KwaXolo ePort Shepstone, Kwa- Zulu-Natal.
Uhlanyela sipinashi, emakha-
bishi, ticadze, ematamatisi, ema-anyanisi, emabhontjisi nabhanana. Ibhizinisi yakhe izuze umklomelo wekuba ngu- mkhiciti lophuma embili nga- 2016 ngesikhatsi semiklomelo yabosomabhizinisi labasikati, i-Female Entreprenuers Awards, yeLitiko letekuLima laKwaZu- lu-Natal.
Ngaleka utsite manje ngesikhat-
si acala ahlanyela tibhidvo, bekafuna kusita umndeni wakhe kutsi utfole kudla lokusandza kuvunwa kodvwa lutsandvo lwakhe lolukhulu lwamholela kulebhizinisi yakhe.

Kukhululwa kwabomake kunga ba ngemagama nje lasephepheni nangabe akuhambisani nekutinikela kwayo yonkhe imikhakha yemmango.Njengaloku silungiselela kwakha kabusha umnotfo wetfu eku-bhedvukeni kwalolubhubhane lweligciwane le-corona , sishito kutsi ngeke simane nje sibuyele emuva lapho besikhona ngembi-kwekubhedvuka kwaleligciwane.  Kufanele kutsi sakhe umnotfo lowehlukile mbamba, emkhatsini waletinye tintfo, lotawutfutfukisa ngalokuphatsekako simo sekuba nemphahla kwabomake.Loku kusho kutsi lutjalotimali lwetfu kusakhiwonchanti lufanele kutsi lungasekeli kuphela imboni yendzawo kodvwa emabhizinisi laphetfwe bomake. Lufanele kutsi ludale ngenhloso ematfuba ekucashwa kwabomake kuto tonkhe tigaba tekuhlela, kusitwa ngetimali, kwakha kanye nekugcina esimeni lesisebentako sakhiwonchanti.

Mabitsela, waseModimolle eLimpopo, wafaka sicelo sekuboleka imali ebhange ngeLweti lwemnyaka we-2020, kodvwa watjelwa kutsi sicelo sakhe angeke siphumelele ngoba unetikweleti letinengi. “Ngaya kuyofaka sicelo  sesikhatsi lesifishane sekubolekwa imali ngoba bengifuna kutiphilisa emva kwe-kutsi ngidzilitiwe emsebentini ngeNhlaba yemnyaka we-2020. Kwangimangalisa uma ngitjelwa kutsi angika-vumeleki.“Ekucaleni bengicabanga kutsi kungenca yekungabi nemholo losimeme, kodvwa bekungasiko loko.

Ngeke sikuphike kutsi lusha bukhona benu bumcoka kakhulu emtsanjeni nasemoyeni wesive.  Ayikho lengcondvo letsi lusha lutsatsela phasi, alunandzaba netepolitiki nome lutinake lona, lucwaningo lwemfundvo lwa lapha kulelive kanye nelwemhlaba wonkhe luveta kutsi lusha ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi lunembono lomuhle mayelana nelikusasa lalo. Ngekusho kwaloko lokutfo lwe yi-Ipsos Pulse of the People kuluklayo lolukhishwe ngaBhi mbidvwane, 61% yebantfu base Ningizimu Afrika labaneminyaka le-15 kuya kule-17 banembono lomuhle mayelana nemnyaka wa-2020. Angingatsiti kutsi lomcabango lomuhle lonkhe lusha lwabelana ngawo jikelele futsi ikakhulu labo labatelwe ngesikhatsi sekungena kwenkhulunkhwanemnyaka nyalo lasebacale imphilo yabo yebudzala, labo bantfu labasha labatibita ngekutsi bangeMa2000.

Loku kumayelana netibalo takamuva teNhlangano Yetemphilo Yemhlaba (i-WHO), letikhomba kutsi bangetulu kwe-700 000 bantfu labatibulalako ngemnyaka – loku kufa kwamunye kulabalikhulu futsi cishe muntfu munye ngemizuzwana lenge-40.
“Angeke sikwati futsi akukafaneli kutsi sitsalalise ngekutibulala,” kusho Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMcondzisi-Jikelele we-WHO.
“Kutibulala kwemuntfu munye kuyinhlekelele. Kunaka kwetfu kuvimbela kutibulala kuba luleke kakhulu nyalo, ngemuva kwetinyanga letiningi siphila nelubhubhane lweSifo seligciwane leKhorona, lesinebungoti lobuningi lobuyimbangela yekutibulala – kulahleka kwemisebenti, kuci ndzeteleka etimalini kanye nekuhlukaniswa nalabanye – lokusesekhona kakhulu,” uyengeta.

Akukhatsalekile kutsi bahlala kuphi nekutsi yini labakwenta-ko, lowo nalowo unenshisekelo yesiﬁ  so sekugucula umhlaba.Ngesikhatsi kahle kahle bafuna kwenta ncono timphilo tabo, bafuna futsi kufezekisa ummango loncono kanye ne-mhlaba loncono. Batibona njengetitfunywa tekuletsa tingu-cuko letimcoka.Emlandvweni wonkhe umla-ndvo bantfu labasha solomane bangemandla ekuletsa ingu-cuko.

Uyatigcabha ngekuba  nalo mba la esikhu njeni sa khe futsi  akavume li tinkho lelo leti ngasiliciniso kutsi timtsi kamete.
“Kubalule kile kubantfu  labafana na mi kutsi  banga vumi kutsi labanye ba chaze kutsi babobani. Ti gcabhe ngekuba ne-albinism  ngoba wakheke waba mu hle,” asho alandzisa. Sithibe (loneminyaka  lenge-28) lohlala eKroonstad esifundzeni saseFreyistata, uchaza kwekutsi simo sakhe sihamba emndenini lapho khona umuntfu wakhona uba ne-melanin lenganele le menta abe mhlophe esikhu njeni sakhe, etinweleni noma emehlweni.
“Asisiwo umutsi noma bantfu labafana netilwane letingatiwa kutsi tivelaphi njengoba bantfu bacabanga.
Singebantfu njengalabanye bantfu.”Sithibe wenta tintfo  letinyenti.

Bangitjele tintfo lengiti vile nakuleminye imimango kulo lonkhe lelive: kutsi lababhebhetseli baletento letinjena bayatiwa, ngoba babukisa ngenzuzo yebugebengu babo.
Kodvwa sandla semtsetfo sidze. Labo labantjontjele umbuso bangakholelwa ekutseni baphunyulile.
Kodvwa-ke ekugcineni tento tabo titawubabamba, noma ngabe bangubobani, nanoma ngusiphi sikhundla labakuso.
Batawufundza kutsi bugebengu abunambuyiselo.
Mayelana naloku, sinye setikhali tetfu lesinemandla kakhulu kutsi silwe nenkhohlakalo nekubanjwa kwembuso ngabhongwane Inkhundla Yetebulungiswa Lekhetsekile Yeluphiko Lwetekuphenya Lolu khetsekile (i-SIU), lenga yisungula nga-2019.
Yehlulela ngetindzaba letisungulwe yi-SIU kute kutekwe emacala embango ngemuva kwekuphotfula luphenyo lwayo.

YES, lesandza kuvulwa ngu Mengameli Cyril Ramapho sa, ihlose kulungiselela lusha kutsi batfole umsebenti iba nikete emakhono ebuchwe pheshe ladzingekako kute kuciniswe ku tfutfukiswa kwemno tfo. Temane uyachaza kweku tsi ngemuva kwekutfola ticu nga-2016 akazange akhone kufaka ticelo temsebenti ngoba bekangenalo lwati lwemsebenti loludzingeka ko.
“Bekulukhuni kufuna umse benti ngaphandle kwekuba nelwati lwemsebenti. Nge nhlahla ngahlangabetana ne Lulaway Recruitment Age ncy lesebentisana ne-YES, kantsi banginiketa litfuba lokufundzela umsebenti e msebentini, i-internship.”I-YES ingumtamo loyinhla nganisela wahulumende, ti nhlangano tetisebenti nema bhizinisi kutsi banikete ba ntu labasha baseNingizimu Afrika labasigidzi misebenti lekhokhelwayo kuleminyaka lemitsatfu letako.

Ngesikhatsi kwenteka lenhlekelele yemvelo, kube nekukhatsateka kutsi baphatsi abanawo emandla noma sifiso sekuphe ndvula ngendlela lefanele nalesebentako kulesimo salabo labalahlekelwe ngiko konkhe bebanako.
Uma sengiya kwesibili kulelidolobhakati kusukela kwaba naletikhukhula, kwangicacela kutsi lokukhatsateka bekungakafaneli.
IKwaZulu-Natali, njengoba kunjalo naseMphumalanga Kapa naseNyakatfo Nshonalanga, bonkhe labadlala indzima bebasebenta ngekutikhandla kute balulame kulesehlakalo lesibuhlungu.
Sikhungo Savelonkhe Sekulawula Inhlekelele besichumanisa yonkhe imikhakha yahulumende kumitamo yaso yekuletsa lusito lwetebuntfu emindenini leminengi letsintsekile.

Kungako Emaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (i-SAPS) abe netinhlelo lebatilungisako kwenta kube lula futsi kuphe-phe kutsi bantfu bakhone kubika lobugebengu.
Sikhulumeli semaphoyisa ase Mpumalanga Colonel Mtsholi Bhembe utsi kubalulekile kutsi umphakatsi usebentisane ne-maphoyisa babike ngalobu-gebengu.  "Njengemaphoyisa, kungumsebenti wetfu kudlala indzi ma lenkhulu ekucinisekiseni kwekutsi labenta lobugebengu bayabanjwa nalabo labahlukumetekile baphatseke kahle. Sice la umphakatsi kutsi ute utobika emacala ekudlwengulwa esiteshini semaphoyisa lesisedvute nabo,” kusho Bhembe.
Labahlukunyetiwe kufanele babike bugebengu bekuhluku nyetwa ngetemacansi emapho-yiseni kungakandluli emahora lange-72 ngemuva kwekutsi kwenteke lobugebengu.

Ngaleso sikhatsi, sive besisebu hlungwini lobukhulu bekubulawa kuka-Uyinene Mrwetyana, Leigha-ndre Jegels, Jesse Hess kanye nalabanye bomake labanyenti laba lahlekelwa timphilo tabo etandleni temadvodza lanesibhuku. Kuyo yonkhe imikhakha yetenhlalo, labadzala nalabancane, titjudeni nabomake labasebentako, lababhikishi labebashuca ngekuthula bebaphetse tigwabhugwabhu lebetibhalwe kutsi 'Enough is Enough ' futsi ' Am I next?' . Buhlungu nentfukutselo lejulile ngalelo langa. Ngesikhatsi ngemukela tidzingo tabo lebebatifuna nge mandla lebetibekwe ngalokucacile, kwangikhanyela kutsi sidzinga kutsa tsa tinyatselo ngalokuphutfumako nangekutimisela.

“Awusiwedvwa,” kusho Zanele Ludziya losati setengcondvo semphakatsi esibhedlela i-Stikland eNsho-nalanga Kapa.Kulahlekelwa ngulomtsandzako akusilula futsi kungavusa imiva leyehlukehlukene.“Kunetimphawu letinyenti longatibuka nangabe lomtsandzako aselusizini, kodvwa-ke kungabonakali kwetimphawu akusho kutsi lowo muntfu akekho elusizini.“Bantfu bangakhombisa timphawu tentfukutselo, sicanucanu, kudvumala noma simo sekungakhatsaleli lutfo. Kusebenta kwengcondvo yabo nako kungatsintseka, njengobe baphishaneke ngemi-cabango nenkhumbulo yaloloshonile. Kungenteka babe nenkinga yekutintisa ingcondvo noma babukeke badidekile,” kusho Ludziya. Weluleka bantfu kutsi ba-caphele kuntjintja kwendlela yekutiphatsa, njengekutiva engatsi ungakhala nome kunatsa tjwala ngalokwecile nekusebentisa tidzakamiva.

Njengoba sihlalo wekhomishini, liPhini leliJaji Leliyinhloko Raymond Zondo atse kungenteka kube nesidzingo salabanye bofakazi labambalwa labatofakaza, umsebenti wekhomishini sowusondzele esigabeni sekugcina kutsi uphele.
Le yingcophamlandvo lebalulekile lesisondzeta edvute nekubala ngalesinye seticephu letonakalise kakhulu emlandvweni wetfu wentsandvo yelinyenti.
Ngisho nangaphambi kwekuba liJaji Zondo lifake loko lelikutfolile netincomo takhe kuMengameli, sonkhe singavuma kutsi umsebenti wekhomishini bewubaluleke kakhulu.
Esikhatsini lesiminyaka lemitsatfu, sivile bufakazi lobuchaza ngetinsolo tenkhohlakalo letentiwa ngelizinga lelikhulu. Sivile ngetento letiholele ekutseni kwebiwe tigidzigidzi temarandi emali yemphakatsi.

Mengameli Cyril Ramaphosa utsite Temafa Avelonkhe  batakwenta kutsi kube khona imali yemitamo yekuhhamula kusita labo labakhahlametwe nguletikhukhula.
“Indvuna Yetetimali itsite sigidzigidzi lesi-R1 siyatfolakala ngekushesha,” kwasho  yena.
Mengameli Ramaphosa utawuphindza futsi atsintse Iphalamende kutsi kutfolakale imitfombolusito leyengetiwe.
Hulumende usebentisana neSikhwama Selubumbano,  umkhakha wangasese kanye netinhlangano letingasito tahulumende, netinhlangano temmango kusekela labo labakhahlametekile.
Sikhwama Selubumbano sitavula i-akhawunti yasebhange leseceleni yenhlekelele yetikhukhula yebantfu baseNingizimu Afrika nebantfu bangephandle labanikela ngetimali kutsi bafake ligalelo kulemitamo yelusito lwekuhhamula.

Umhlata webantfwana wenyu-kile emhlabeni wonkhe, lokulinganiselwa ekutseni munye umntfwana kulabange-408 mhlaba wonkhe bacilongwa bakhandzakale kutsi banemhlata ngembikwe-kutsi bafinyelele emnyakeni we-15.
Ngekusho kwa-Taryn See gers, Umchumanisi weTe -kuchumana eNhlanganweni Yemhlata Ebantfwaneni  yaseNingizimu Afrika (i-CHOC), kukholelwa ekutseni ababili kulabatsatfu bantfwana labanemhlata abakutfoli kwelashwa kantsi labakutfolako ngulabo vele lasebasezingeni lekugcina lalesifo.
Kusukela nga-2011, i-CHOC beyisolo isebentisana neLi-tiko Letemphilo kanye nebelaphi bendzabuko ku-nika tingcweti tetemphilo, tisebenti letinakekela ngetemphilo, belaphi bendza buko kanye nemimango ngelwati lemhlata webantfwana.

Uma umntfwana lophetfwe sifo sekuphatamiseka  lokukugula kwekuba nemdlandla lowendlulele (i-ADHD) noma kupha tamiseka kwekweswela kunakwa (i-ADD) angala shwa, lesimo singaba ne mtselela lomubi wesikhatsi lesidze emphilweni yakhe.
Loku kushiwo nguDkt Khatija Jhazbhay, lophetse Iyunithi yeTengcondvo yeBantfwana neBantfwana Lasebatfombile eTownhill Hospital ePieterma ritzburg, KwaZulu-Natal. Lomake uchaze watsi njenge-bantfu labadzala, labantfwana laba bangahle babe sengotini lenkhulu yekungenwa nguletinye tifo tengcondvo, letifana nekukhatsateka/phaphuleka nekudzangala, kantsi futsi ba ngahle basebentise kabi tintfo letitidzakamiva.I-ADHD ne-ADD itsintsa inchubekalembili emsebentini wesikolo kubantfwana futsi kutiphatsa kwabo kungacasula labanye.

Kucinisekisa kutsi emalunga e-GEPF kanye nemindeni yabo babatfwa ngekunga khetsi liphela emasini, ibhodi kamuva nje isungule lihho visi lelitawubukana netikhalo.
Umphenyitikhalo weSi khwama Semphesheni Sebasebenti Bahulumende (i-GEPO) usebenta nge khatsi kodvwa lihhovisi leliti mele le-GEPF.
I-GEPF ingulesinye se tikhwama temphesheni lesi khulukati emhlabeni, ema lunga aso lakhona lasebentako angetulu kwe-1.2 yetigidzi futsi bangetulu kwe-450 000 labahola imphesheni kuso kanye nebazuzi. Lesikhwama sasungulwa futsi silawulwa ngekulandzela Umtsetfo Wemphesheni Yebasebenti Bahulumende.
Ummeli wasenkantolo le nkhulu Makhado Ramabulana ukhetfwe waba nguMphe nyitikhalo. Utsi lelihhovisi lisungulelwe kusita bantfu labangajabuli ngetinsita teGEPF.

Kuvikela inkhohlaka lo kutsi ingenteki emsebentini wahu lumende kuhlala njalo ku yintfo yekucala hulumende layibeke embili kutsi ayente futsi Inombolo Yavelonkhe  Yelucingo Yekulwa Nenkho hlakalo yenta kutsi kube lula kutsi emalunga emmango abike tento letisolekako te nkhohlakalo.
Lenombolo yelucingo ye tfulwa Ikhomishini Yetemi sebenti Yahulumende (i-PSC) nga-2004 futsi kusukela leso sikhatsi, sekunetincingo letinge tulu kwe-100 000 letibika tinsolo tenkhohlakalo nekungaphatsi ngemfanelo lesetitfoliwe.
Letincingo letishaywe ti nhlabamkhosi tiholele  emacaleni latiti-24 035  enkhohlakalo, kukhwabanisa kanye nalamanye emacala la phenywako, kusho Khomishina Wetemisebenti Yahulumende  Michael Seloane, lokunguye lowengamele yonkhe imisebenti leyentiwa ngulekhomishini.

Umcondzisi waloluhlelo, Dkt. Sandy Malapile, utsi kutfola ticu takamatikuletjeni kuyi-ntfo lebaluleke kakhulu ngoba ngaphandle kwato, imi-nyango leminyenti yematfuba lamahle ihlala ivalekile. “Tikhungo Temkhakha Wetemfundvo Nekucecesha (ema-SETA), letinikwe umsebenti wekucecesha emakhono esive ngetinhlelo temakhono nekufundzela umsebenti emsebentini kwalabangaka-fundzi, nato tindzinga kutsi bafundzi babe netitifiketi takamatikuletjeni,” kusho Dkt. Malapile.Lwetfulwa ngaBhimbi-dvwane 2016, loluhlelo lweLitfuba Lesibili lwesekela wonkhewonkhe– wanoma nguyiphi iminyaka yebudzala – lofuna kuzuza noma kwenta kancono emamaki eticu takhe takamatikuletjeni, sifundvo ngesifundvo nakanye ngekufundza ngetikhatsi letitsite. Kwamahhala.
Ngubani lofanelekako?

Ngekuya kwelitiko, uma ngabe ungumake lone-HIV kantsi futsi uyamunyisa, kubalulekile kukhulumisana nemeluleki wakho wete-HIV ngetindlela tekumunyisa. Uma ngabe ukhetsa kumunyisa libele, yenta siciniseko sekutsi umunyisa libele kuphela tinyanga letisitfupha.
Lucwaningo lukhombisa kutsi mancane kakhulu ematfuba ekutsi luswane lungatfola i-HIV elubisini lwelibele lamake uma ngabe make amunyisa libele kuphela tinyanga letisitfupha.
Kuletinyanga ukhulelwe, kanye nekumunyisa libele, yenta siciniseko sekutsi use-bentisa ikhondomu uma uya emacasini kute kutsi uvikele kutsi lesifo siphindze futsi sikungene. Uma ngabe unenkinga njengekuba buhlungu kwetingono noma emabele, yenta siciniseko sekutsi usheshe uye emtfolamphilo uyotfola lusito.

Indvuna Pandor utsite ngu msebenti walelive kwesekela leyo mindeni lephuyile.
Bekakhuluma nebetindzaba lapho avete khona inchubo yekucala kunikwa kwemfu ndvo yamahhala lapha eNingi zimu Afrika.
Indvuna Pandor umemetele ngalokusemtsetfweni kutsi Hulumende wengete nge lutjalotimali lwetigidzigidzi leti-R7.166 esikhwameni semifundzate yebantfwana bemindeni lephuyile nalehola imiholo lemincane labangena emanyuvesi nasema-TVET kulomnyaka.
Indvuna Pandor ucinisekise kutsi tigidzigidzi le-R4.581 ti bekelwe eceleni labo bafundzi labafanele kungena enyuvesi netigidzi le-R2.585 tibeke lwe bafundzi basemakolishi e-TVET.

Kusuka ebuphuyeni nekutsi bameye ngenca yekusebenta epulasini Mahlatse Matlakane (loneminyaka yebudzala le20) manje ungumlimi wephepha leluhlata satjani lomama tsekako.
Mahlatse wacala ngeku volontiya kusebenta ngetimphelansontfo nangemaholide esikolwa epulasini lendzawo lelilima iphepha leluhlata satjani aneminyaka le-15 kute asite make wakhe ngekutsi batfole lokuya etfunjini.
Matlakane uhlala kaGa-Moi simane eBuchum ngaphandle nje kwePolokwane eLimpopo.
Utsite nanoma nje manje atitfokotela titselo tekusebenta kwakhe ngekutikhandla kodvwa bekungalula ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi.
“Mine nebantfwana bakitsi sikhule kamatima. Bontsanga yami bebahlekisa ngami ngesikhatsi ngicala kusebenta epulasini futsi batsi kusebenta epulasini kwebantfu labanga kafundzi.

I-Surfers Not Street Chi ldren yinhlangano lebo nelela kuphakelwa kweti fundvo tekuntjweza tama hhala ebantfwaneni labahla la emigwaceni nelusha le libondzinga sitsebeni leli tfolakala emkhatsini kwale lidolobhakati.  Lenhlangano ibukene ngco nekulwa nekuswelakala kwemakhaya ebantfwaneni futsi icinisekisa kutsi lusha lwenta lokutsite lokwakha ko ngetimphilo talo.
Masipala waseThekwini madvute nje ucedza kwese kela lenhlangano ngekuni -kela ngemabhodi eku ntjweza lali-10.
Lamabhodi entelwe ku tsi asebente kutfutfukisa tekuntjweza futsi entiwe ngeligwebu lelenta ku tsi labo labasafundza ku ntjweza bandande emantini bangangcwili.
Umphatsi walomasipa la welitiko lekutfutfukisa temidlalo nekukhibika Te ddi Adams watsi lamabhodi atawusita labo labanesifiso sekuntjweza.

Ngifuna kubonga tigidzi tebatali, tabogogo netebanakekeli bebantfwana kuyo yonkhe iNingizimu Afrika letisachubeka kudlala indzima lemcoka kuminyaka yeku khula etimpilweni tetakhamuti tetfu letincane. Kugcugcuteleka, kusekelwa nekuvikeleka kwebantfwana lokuvela kubatali babo nakubanakekeli babo kumcoka entfokotweni yabo yesikhatsi lesitako nakumphu melelo yabo. Mhla lu-1 Inhlaba sive sicale sigaba lesisha sekulwa neligci wane le-corona. Imisebenti leminyenti yetemnotfo neyetenhlalo icale kabusha, leku faka ekhatsi kucala kufundza ngetigaba.Sishito kutsi sitsatsa indlela yakancane kancane, ngekulandzela teluleko tebososayensi betfu nekuholwa ngiloko lokuliciniso lokwenteka ebantfwini nangekucocisana nababambi lichaza.

Kuvuma lomtsetfosisekelo wetfu, sacinisekisa kutinikela kwetfu kutsi sibe ngummango lowesekelwe etikwemagugu entsandvo yelinyenti, bulungiswa betenhlalo kanye nemalungelo eluntfu.
Besenta futsi kwehlukana ngalokuphelele nelimuva letfu. Loku bekulimuva lebeleyeme ebuhlangeni lelitivete ngekulawula kungena kwebantfu, kubekelana umsebenti, tindzawo temacembu kanye nemapasi.
Ngesikhatsi emahambambili etfu abhala Umculu Wenkhululeko nga-1955, imitsetfomgomo yawo ifakiwe kuMtsetfosisekelo wetfu, futsi wamemetela kutsi iNingizimu Afrika yabo bonkhe labahlala kuyo, bebafuna ummango lokhululekile emcondvweni wekutinaka wona kakhulu, buve, buhlanga nekubandlulula ngekwebulili.

Loku kubangwa kutsi  kute tindzawo letikahle eti ndzaweni letiningi bomake labanentinswane labasebe ntela kuto lapho bangakha ma lubisi noma bamunyise bantfwana babo ngesikhatsi semsebenti, kubenta balahle kelwe sifiso sekuchubeka bamunyise ngenca yekutsi bacitsa sikhatsi lesinyenti basemsebentini bantfwana bangekho nabo.
Kumtamo wetfu wekubuka na nalenseyeya, Litiko Le -temphilo laseLimpopo li sungule ligumbi lelilekuca la lekumunyisa nekukhama lubisi emahhovisini alo.
Leligumbi lekumunyisa le tfulwe nguMphatsiswatiko Dkt. Phophi Ramathuba.
Licanjwe ngeligama laMa ke Albertina Sisulu lesigu bha umkhosi weminyaka le likhulu yekutalwa kwakhe lomnyaka.

Batjelwe kutsi bantfwana babo labange-21 batfolakale bashonile, ethaveni. 
Umntfwana lomncane kakhulu labelapho bekaneminyaka le-13 budzala. 
Luphenyo lwemaphoyisa lwalengoti luchubeka ngekushesha. 
Ngemphumela waloluphenya, masipala waseDolobhenikati iBuffalo ubuka kutsi lethaveni ngabe ayikayephuli yini imitsetfosimiso yamasipala. 
Emicabangweni yetfu kanye nasemithandazweni yetfu sikhumbula lemindeni lebukene nalolusizi lolungaka lolungakhulumeki. 
Siyamncoma hulumende wesifundza saseMphumalanga Kapa ngekusita lemindeni levelelwe ngulengoti, kanye na-AVBOB lotsembise kutsi utawusita lemindeni ngekubangcwabela.

Kunye kwaloku kufundza kushayela imoto. Kepha luhle lo lolungakavami lwenhlanga no i-QuadPara Association of South Africa (i-QASA) selu fundzise bantfu laba-120 labakhubatekile kushayela timo to letakhiwe tafanela tidzingo tabo, labange-80 balabantfu sebawatfolile emalayisensi abo ekushayela.
"Bantfu labakhubatekile bahlala njalo babukene netinsayeya letinkhulu kakhulu nekuhamba baye lapho bafuna kuya khona, ikakhulu ngoba abakwati kuse bentisa tigitjelwa temmango letinyenti. Besifuna kuyisombulula lenkinga futsi, lokuba luleke kakhulu, kwenta bantfu kutsi bakhone kucasheka,” kwasho Sikhulu Lesiphakeme (i-CEO) saka-QASA Ari Seirlis naye lokhubateke sicu semtimba sangentasi.  Loku bekunguyona nshiseke lo lechuba luhlelo lwe-Driving Ambitions, lolwasungulwa nga-2013.

Letibalobalo takamuva tebugebengu letikhishwe Luphiko Lwetemaphoyisa AseNingizimu Afrika (i-SAPS) tikhomba kutsi enyukile emacala ekudlengula, ebudlova basekhaya, futsi, mhlawumbe lokusikhatsatako kakhulu, kwenyuka kwemacala  ekubulawa kwebantfwana.
Emkhatsini kwaKholwane neMphala 2021, bantfu laba-9 556, linyenti labo lelibomake, badlengulwa. Loku kumaphesenti langetiwe lasikhombisa langetulu kwalowo esikhatsi lesengcile sekukhishwa kwalombiko.
Kulamacala ebudlova labikiwe lacishe abe-73 000 kulesikhatsi sanyalo salombiko, langetulu kwe 13 000 bewamayelana nebudlova basekhaya. Lizinga lemacala ekubulawa kwebantfwana likhule ngalokucishe kube ngilokuphindvwe katsatfu uma kucatsaniswa nesikhatsi lesengcile sekukhishwa kwalombiko.

Imphelasontfo yekubha lisela kuvota itawu ba ngeMgcibelo, ti-26 nangeLisontfo, ti-27 Bhimbi dwane 2019 ngekusho kwasi hlalo Wekhomishini Yelukhe tfo Letimele (i-IEC), Glen Mashinini.
Mashinini watsi tonkhe titeshi tekuvota leti-22 932 titawuvulwa kusuka ngensi mbi ye-08h00 kuya kuye17h00 kulemphelasontfo yekubhalisela kuvota.
“Loku kwentelwa kuvumela bavoti labasha babhalise nekutsi labo labangacali kuvota babuyekete futsi bahlole imininingwane yabo.”Mashinini watsi nyalo kune bavoti labatigidzi leti-26.1 lababhalisile kuloluhlu lwebavoti lwavelonkhe.

Vuk’uzenzele ibuka kubaluleka kwalolusuku nekutsi lisho kutsi ni kitsi sibantfu baseNingizimu Afrika.
Mhla ti-27 kuMabasa 1994 iNi ngizimu Afrika yabamba lukhe tfo lwayo lwekucala lwentsandvo yelinyenti. Hulumende lomusha wakhetfwa ngaphansi kwebuholi baMengameli lowasishiya Nelson Mandela. Kuningi lese kuzuziwe kuleminyaka, kodvwa kuningi lekusafuneka kwentiwe kutfutfukisa live letfu nekuntji ntja timphilo tabo bonkhe bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika.
Lenyanga yaMabasa ayibuki kuphela kutsi sichamuka kuphi silive, kodvwa isikhatsi lapho iNingizimu Afrika ibungata emacawe nemacawekati ayo ngekuwaklomelisa ngemiklomelo yesive. Loku miklomelo lesezingeni lelisetulu kakhulu leniketwa ngulelive, nguMengameli, aniketa takhamuti talelive nebantfu bemave angaphandle labahlonishwa kakhulu.

Loku kubonakale ka khulu kuletehlakalo letilu sizi letenteke ePhoenix nase tindzaweni letisedvute na khona kanye naseThekwini.
Ngesikhatsi saletiphitsiphitsi letimbi kakhulu kuntsandvo yelinyenti yetfu, kanye nasesimeni  lesivele sisolisa kakhulu  futsi sekungetsembani, bantfu labebahletisene  ngekuthula bajikelene bodvwa.
Kusasekunyenti lekumele kutsi sikuvumbulule loku macondzana naletehlakalo letentekile. Kusatjalaliswa kwetindzaba letingasilo liciniso, titfombe letibunjiwe kanye nelwatiso lolungasilo kube lukhuni kwehlukanisa emkhatsini kweliciniso  nendzaba lecanjiwe.

Sitfunti sebuntfu, leku simiso lesihamba embili kulobushoshovu bakhe bekubuyisa sitfunti semuntfu lomnyama, sacekelwa phasi.
Ngekwemagama emmeli wemndeni wakhe Sir Sydney Kentridge, “kushona kwakhe bekubuhlungu kakhulu futsi bekayedvwa ashonela emethini lephasi esemendeni yelijele.”
Kutawuhlala kuyintfo lebanga lusizi lolukhulu emva kwayo yonkhe leminyaka leyengcile, kukhumbula kutsi Steve Biko bakaneminyaka le-30 kuphela uma ashona.
Wabulawa asengakafiki esicongweni semphilo yakhe ngilabo bebasaba emandla ekubona imibono yakhe lesetulu yekutikhulula kanye nemitamo yekufaka kumuntfu lomnyama kutitsandza nekuba nesitfunti emadvodzeni nakubomake besive lesinsundvu. Azange akhone kubona ekuphileni kwakhe loko lokubitwa ngekutsi ‘ngumklomelo lokhatimu -lako”, lekukubona buntfu bangemphela.

Kodvwa nyalo, kwandza kakhulu kwekusuleleka lese-lulekwe ngako tati tetekwe-lapha kutsi  kuyeta, sekufikile. Bangetulu kwekota yesigidzi bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika lasebasuleleke ngaleligciwane le-corona, siyati futsi kutsi kwesuleleka lokunyenti kuse-ngakabonwa. Nyalo sesitfola tehlakalo tekwesuleleka letinsha letingetulu kwe-12,000 malanga onkhe. Kusukela kwa-cala lokubhedvuka ngenyanga yeNdlovulenkhulu, lokunge-nani sekushone bantfu laba-4, 079 ngenca yale-COVID-19.
Njengaloku kunemakhata lashubisa umnkantja lahlasele lelive lakitsi lachamuka eNingi-zimu ye-Atlantic ngalesikhatsi semnyaka, timbalwa tincenye talelive letingeke titsintfwe nguleligciwane le-corona.

Sikhumulo semafutsa etimoto lasamanti lamanyenti lesiphetfwe baka-BP Southern Africa e-East London sitsengiselwe i-Wasaa, lokuyinkampani letimele lekhicita emakhemikhali aphethiloli. Wasaa utfole yonkhe imphahla lesuswako yalesikhungo kanye nemashezi e-20% kumaphayiphi lahambisa amafutsa.
Umbiko wanga-2020 weKhomishini Yekutfutfukiswa Kabanti Kwalabamnyama Ngekwetemnotfo ukhombisa kutsi imikhakha leminyenti yetemnotfo isilela emuva ngemigomo yebunikati babomake labamnyama, lokutfolakala kwalokutsengiselana yinka mpani yemafutsa etimoto lamanti lephetswe umake lomnyama kuyintfutfuko le yinchophamlandvo.
Kufaka ligalelo kumtamo wetfu wavelonkhe wekulungisa kungalingani kanye nekucinisekisa kutsi kunekutimbandzakanya lokuvakalako kumnotfo walelive kwebantfu balelive labanyenti.

Lusuku lweMhlaba lwema Nesi, lelingemhla ka-12 Inkhwe khweti, ilitfuba lekugubha  umkhosi wemanesi ngalaba  kwentako kulabanye.
Nesi loceceshiwe Luyanda Ga nuganu (25), wasesibhedlela i-Groote Schuur eNshonalanga Kapa, utsi lelilanga libuye libe litfuba lwekutsi emanesi achu beke nekukhanyisa lomsebenti labaceceshelwe wona njenge sibani lesikhanya kakhulu.
Utsi, “Litfuba lemanesi kutsi aphindze abonwe, kodvwa kufanele sichubeke nekuniketa kunakekela lokuhle, ikakhuluka ti ngalesikhatsi salolubhubhane.”Ganuganu bekakulencenye lengembili ngalesikhatsi se mjiko wekucala newesibili walo lubhubhane, asebenta egumbi ni leCOVID-19  lwekunakekela lokukhulu lwalesibhedlela.

Mdletshe watalwa futsi wakhulela ePort Shepstone wabese ufundza e-St Faiths.
“Mine ngakhula kamna ndzi kakhulu. Ngesikhatsi ngisakhula bekute kwesaba, kungafanani nanamuhla, futsi wonkhe umuntfu beka khuliswa sigodzi sakhe.” Mdletshe waphotfula  matikuletjeni ngemnyaka we-2006, ngembi kwekuya eDurban University of  Techno logy kuyofundzela iNatio nal Diploma  kutifundvo te Maritime Studies  ngemnyaka we-2007.
Emva kwekuphotfula iS1 ngemnyaka we-2007 kanye ne-S2 ngewe-2008 wacala kuceceshwa kwakhe imi nyaka lemitsatfu elwandle, ne-Safmarine Shipping Co mpany. Lapha wafundza ku shayela umkhumbi wemtfwa lo, ahambe ngawo  elwandle lolunemagagasi lamakhulu aye kumagu lahlukahlukene e-Europe, e-Afrika nase-Asia enta imisebenti yemikhu mbi yemitfwalo kanye ne lucwaningo ngetekuphepha.

Nanome imikhakha lemi-nengi yeteminotfo ikhonile kutsi iphindze futsi isebente tinyanga letinengi, kutawutsatsa sikhatsi kutsi umnotfo uphindze usimame kanye nekubuyiswa kwemise-benti lelahlekile. Njengaloku  umnyaka lomusha ucala, imindeni leminengi solo-mane isayiva imitselela yalo-lubhubhane etimphilweni tayo kanye nasemisebentini letiphilisa ngayo.Umhlaba nyalo sewungene emnyakeni wesibili walo-lubhubhane lwaleligciwane le-corona. Kubantfu baseNingizimu Afrika, kanye na-semaveni lamanengi emhla-beni wonkhe, umnyaka wa-2021 utawuba ngumnyaka lonetinsayeya letinkhulu kakhulu.

Kusenjalo, nanome kunjalo, ku tawudzingeka kutsi sisebentise imali kakhulu kute sisekele kwakhiwa kabusha kwema-SOE njenge-Eskom ne-SAA. Ngenca yaloko, silindzele kwehla  nge samba lesitigidzigidzi leti-R156 kulusebentisomali lete intalo kulethemu lesemkhatsini.  Loku kutawusita ekutseni ku nciphise kuswelakala kwemali bese kunciphisa tidzingo tetfu tekuboleka.  Incenye lenkhulu yekonga itawuvela ekunciphiseni sili nganiso  sekwenyuka kwemali yekukhokhela tisebenti. Loku kutawudzinga kutsi kube neku cocisana lokugcilile emkhatsini webalingani betenhlalo, kodvwa kakhulu netinyonyane temkha kha wetisebenti tahulumende.
Lokucocisana kudzinga kutsi kwentiwe ngemoya wekufuna tisombululo.

Liciniso litsi sikudzinga kokubili loku. Sidzinga sive lesikhona kutfutfuka kanye nemkhakha lotimele losebenta kahle nalosheshisako.
Kudzingeka kutsi yomibili imikhakha isebentisane futsi ihambisane. Lomcondvo lona awusimusha. Eminyakeni lemashumi lamatsatfu leyengca, ngemnyaka we-1992, iAfrican National Congress yavumelana ngaledokhumenti lenesihloko lesitsi ‘Ready to Govern’. Ledokhumenti iniketa tinkhombandlela  teNingizimu Afrika yentsandvoyelinyenti futsi, kuleminyaka lemashumi lamatsatfu, ibe nemtselela ekukhombeni kutsi kufuneka kuphatfwe ngekulandzela intsandvoyelinyenti nangekunikana ematfuba.

Emva kwekutsengisa iTupperware  aneminyaka le-19, lentfombi leneminyaka lenge-28 budzala itsi beyivele inelutsa ndvo lolukhulu lwekuticalela ibhizinisi yayo ngako-ke seyi jabulile nyalo kutsi seyilicalile leli bhizinisi.
“Ngicale ngekutsi ngise bentele lomunye kulemboni kulapho-ke ngatfola khona sipiliyoni,” kwasho yena njalo, angeta ngekutsi wenta tifu ndvo tekutimonyonga, icosmetology  eKolishi laseMothe le-TVET leliseBloemfontein.
Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi wakulungela kutsi akhone aphume atimele futsi akazange asabuka emuva kusukela leso sikhatsi. Ibhizinisi yakhe ina makhasmende lamanyenti eBotshabelo futsi linani lama khasimende akhe liyakhula. Emakhasimende akhe uwalu ngisa tinzipho temino neteti ntwane, kufocofocotwa, kususa boya nekulungiswa buso.

Ngekwesekelwa ngetima li Litiko Letemvelo, loluhlelo luwela ngaphasi kweLuhlelo lweTemisebenti yaHulumende leyeNgetiwe (i-EPWP).Luniketa litsemba kulusha lolunyenti lolungatfoli imisebenti futsi selube nemphumelelo lencomeka kakhulu ekuvikeleni nasekulawuleni imililo yesiganga, lunciphisa lifutse lwayo.
Loluhlelo lucasha bantfu la bangetulu kwalaba-5 000 la bavela emimangweni lephuyile luphindze futsi lubaceceshe kutekwati ngemlilo, temfundvo kanye nekuwucindzetela nala manye emakhono, njengelusito lwekucala, kubata, kupheka, temphilo netekuphepha kanye netekuchumana.
Sikhulu setekuchuma se-WOF Lebogang Maseko uchaze watsi loluhlelo luhlose bantfu labasha luphindze futsi lucasha bantfu labakhubatekile kutsi base bente etikhungweni talo letisetifundzeni.

Uma ngabe mdlavuta usheshe watfolakala wabese uyelashwa, ematfuba ekwelulama ngalokuphelele abasetulu.
UMchumanisi Wenhlangano YaseNingi zimu Afrika Yamdlavuta Wasebuntfwaneni (i-CHOC) Taryn Seegers utsi ngekwati timphawu tamdlavuta kubantfu labancane, unga sita usindzise imphilo.
“Timphawu netinkhomba kungaba matima kutibona emkhatsini wemaguludla, imitfubulela, timila kanye nekuntjintjantjintja kwemiva. Nanoma kunjalo, kutfolakala kwato kubalule kile kakhulu,” kusho yena.
Ngekuya kweNhlangano YaseNingizimu Afrika Yetamdlavuta (i-CANSA), njalo ngemnyaka bantfwana baseNingizimu Afrika labatfolakala banamdla vuta basemkhatsini walabange-800 kuya kulaba 1 000.
Nanoma kunjalo, lenhlangano ilinganisela ekutsini ihhafu yalaba ntfwana eNingizimu Afrika abatfolwa.

“Sikwenta ngenhloso kutsi silungise kuswelakala kwemisebenti nebuphuya, siphindze futsi sibe nesibopho sekutsi sikhulise umnotfo,” kwasho yona njalo Indvuna Ndabeni-Abrahams.Ngesikhatsi akhuluma eMhlanganweni Welusha we-SheTradesZA lesandza kubanjelwa lapha ePitoli, Indvuna itsite samba lesikhulu semalimboleko se-TREP sibe esigidzini semarandi lesinye, incenye yinye iba sibonelomali bese kutsi lenye incenye ibe imalimboleko.

Motsoaledi bekakhuluma emhlanganweni webetindza ba losandza kubanjwa lapho beketfula khona Umtsetfo sivivinyo wekuChitjelwa kwetindzaba te-NHI kanye neMtsetfosivivinyo wekuChi bela tindzaba teTikimu teTe kwelashwa.LeMitsetfosivivinyo ivula indlela yekutsi babe banengi bantfu labatfola tinsita tete mphilo ngekusebentisa i-NHI.
Umtsetfosivivinyo luhlaka lwemtsetfo. Imitsetfosivivi nyo leminyeti yentiwa litiko lahulumende ngekucondzi swa yindvuna lefanele. LoMtse tfosivivinyo ufanele kutsi ubese uvunywa yiKhabhine thi ngembi kwekutsi wetfulwe ePhalamende.

Lesinayo emkhatsini wetakhamuti letihlanganyela kute-politiki ngemandla emhlabeni.  Lucwaningo lwanga-2018 lolwentiwa i-Pew Research Center lukhombisa kutsi bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika bayava-ma kakhulu kutsatsa sinyatselo setepolitiki mayelana netintfo labeva banemiva kakhulu ngato, njengekunakekelwa ngetemphilo, temfundvo, kukhuluma ngekukhululeka nenkhohlakalo.  Lolucwaningo lucinisekisa kakhulu kutsi siyatati kutsi sibobani. Kute lesikujabulela kakhulu kwendlula kukhulu-misana nahulumende wetfu nekukhulumisana sodvwana ngalokunemandla mayelana netindzaba letibalulekile te-lusuku naletiphutfumako.

Umkhandlu weSifunda iLembe sewuqinisekisile ukuthi izinhlelo zokulethwa kwamanzi ezindaweni ezifana naseNdwedwe naseMandeni seziqalile ngokusemthethweni, ngemva kweminyaka yokulindela. Lezizinhlelo ziholwa ngumNyango wezokuHlinzekwa kwaManzi KwaZulu-Natali, ngemali eningana izigidi ezingama-R47 evela ngqo eNgqungqutheleni kaMasipala. Abahlali base-Ndwedwe bakhulume beveza ukwenama ngalezi zindaba, bathi lesi sinyathelo siyinkomba yokuthi izikhalazo zabo zezwakele kahle uhulumeni engabethemba. Ezinye izingxenye zomkhandlu nazo ziyathola usizo, ikakhulukazi lezi ezike zahlupheka kakhulu ngesikhathi sesomiso esikhulu ngo-2022 nango-2023. Unobhala weSifunda uNkwz.

UMasipala wasendaweni ukhiphe isaziso esisemthethweni esithi amaphrojekthi amatsha okwakha imigodi yamanzi amaningi azosimama phakathi kwezinyanga ezintathu ezizayo, ngenhloso yokulungisa lesi simo ngokushesha. Izakhamizi eziningi ziveze ukuthi zisebenzisa imithombo yamanzi engahlanzekile, into ebeka impilo yazo kanye neyezingane zazo engozini enkulu. UNgqongqoshe Wezolimo Namanzi waKwaZulu-Natal ubhekene nombuzo omkhulu mayelana nokuthi uMasipala usesetshenziswe kanjani imali eyanikezwa uhulumeni isifundazwe ngonyaka wezimali odlule. Ngaphezu kwalokho, iComite lezeMpilo yomPhakathi lezwe likhiphe umbiko omude othinta izingozi ezibangelwa ukusetshenziswa kwamanzi angcolile ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Lezi zinsiza-mali zifaka phakathi imali yabantu abadala, imali yabantwana, kanye nezinye izinhlelo ezinikwa abantu abahluphekayo. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe kanye namaziko kahulumeni asebenza ngamandla ukuqinisekisa ukuthi lezi zinsiza-mali zifikelela labo abaziswelayo ngempela. Emiphakathini yasemakhaya, abahlali bahlangabezana nezingqinamba eziningi ekufinyelela izinsizakalo, ikakhulukazi lapho izifice zikude khona. Uhlelo lweSouth African Social Security Agency lusebenza ngokuzikhandla ukwelula izinsizakalo zalo kuwo wonke amazinga omphakathi ukuze akekho umuntu oshiywe ngemuva.

Ngakolunye uhlangothi, izinhlelo zezindlu zikahulumeni nazo zisiza abaningi ukuthola izindawo zokuhlala eziphephile nezifanelekile.

Izibonelelo lezi zihlanganisa usizo lwabantwana, impesheni yabantu abadala, kanye nezibonelelo zabantu abakhubazekile, futhi zonke zinikwa ngokusebenzisa iSouth African Social Security Agency. Abahlali abaningi abangasebenzi ngenxa yezimo ezilukhuni basembela kulolu sizo njengendlela eyodwa yokondla imindeni yabo ngendlela efanele nasemukelekile. Izifundazwe ezifana naKwaZulu-Natal kanye neLimpopo zibhekana nezingqinamba ezinkulu ekufikiseni izibonelelo lezi kubantu abahlala kude nezindawo zamasevisi kahulumeni. Ukuze kusolululwe lesi simo, uhulumeni uqale uhlelo lokusabalalisa izinsiza ngokusebenzisa izimoto ezihambelana nasemaphandleni ukuze abahlali bangadingeki ukukhwela izimoto ezinde besiya edolobheni.

UMkhandlu wezifunda wamemezela izinhlelo ezintsha zokwakha imithombo yamanzi kanye namapaiphi amade azondla imizi eyejwayelekile ukuba ibe kude nezindawo zokuphakela. Lezi zinhlelo kuthiwa zizophothulwa ngaphambi kokuphelwa konyaka wezimali wezi-2026, ngokusho kwabaphathi bakahulumeni abakhiphe isitatimende esisemthethweni. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni omkhulu wabalingani bomphakathi owabanjwa edolobheni laseNkandla, iSikhulu Esiphezulu sezokuthuthukiswa kweengqalasizinda saveza ukuthi imali engu-R480 yezigidi ibekwe eceleni ukuze lezi zindlela zisebenze ngendlela efanele. Umsebenzi wokwakha uzuqale ngokuqashwa kwabasebenzi bendawo ukuze umnotho wendawo ukhule kanyekanye nentuthuko.

Izinkinga ezifana nokuntuleka kwamanzi, ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, kanye nokungatholi izinsiza ezifanele zokufuya nokuhlanyela ziseyizingqinamba ezinkulu ezidinga ukunakwa ngokuphuthuma. UMnyango Wezolimo, Ukuthuthukiswa Kwamahlathi Nezokudoba usethule uhlelo olusha oluhlose ukulekelela abalimi abancane ngezinsiza ezihlanganisa imbewu ekhethiwe, izinsimbi zokusha, kanye noqeqesho oluthuthukisa ulwazi lwabalimi mayelana nezindlela zolimo ezisetshenziswa esikhathini samanje. Lo hlelo luzosebenza ngokuqondile emiphakathini yasemakhaya lapho ukudla akungehli ngenhlonipho khona, futhi lapho abantu abaningi bencike ezimvelwaneni zolimo ukuze baphile.

UMnyango WezokuBuyisana Nokuthuthukiswa KwamaKhaya uzwakalise ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngezimo ezibhekene nezakhamuzi zalezi zindawo, wethula futhi uhlelo olusha lokuxazulula lezi zinkinga ezikhungethe izindawo eziningi zezwe. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe yiHhovisi likaRhulumente, ngaphezulu kwamaphesenti angamashumi amathathu nesihlanu wezakhamuzi zasemakhaya zisalinda ukuxhunywa kwezidingo ezisemqoka, kanti lesi simo sikhathaza iziphathimandla kakhulu. Uhlelo olusha luzofaka isikhwama esikhulu semali, oluqonde ukuqinisa ukusakazwa kwamanzi ahlanzekile, ukwakhiwa kwezindlela ezintsha, kanye nokugqugquzela ukusetshenziswa kukagesi ohlanzekile.

Umkhandlu weSifundazwe unamukele izinkinga lezi ngokuphuma isitatimende esibeka ukuthi kuzoqaliswa uhlelo olusha lokusabalalisa izinsiza emphakathini ngesikhathi esizayo. Lolu hlelo, olubizwa ngokuthi iNhlangano Yezinsiza Zomphakathi, luzohlanganisa imikhandlu yezifunda, amahhovisi kahulumeni wezwe, kanye nezinhlangano ezingezinhle zokuziphilisa ukuze zisebenzisane ngezidingo zabantu abahluphekayo. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe nguMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu, ngaphezulu kwamaphesenti angamashumi amabili nesithupha wabantu abahlala emakhaya asemaphandleni basathola amanzi ngezindlela ezingaphephile, into efaka impilo yabo engozini enkulu. Umphathiswa weMicwaningomabhuku utshele abezindaba ukuthi uhulumeni uzimisele ukuguqula lesi simo ngaphambi kokuphela kwesikhathi samazalo ami.

Uhlelo lweNdlela Entsha Yezolimo neLwimi Lomhlaba selwethula izinguquko ezibalulekile ezikhetheke ikakhulukazi ukusekela labo abahlala emakubo nabahlwempu. Izifundazwe ezifana naKwaZulu-Natal, iMpumalanga kanye neLimpopo zibonakala njengezindawo lapho ukukhiqizwa kokudla kubaluleke kakhulu khona, ngakho-ke uhlelo lolu lwahlelwa ngenhloso yokwelekelela abalimi abadinga usizo ngokushesha. Ngaphansi kohlelo, abalimi bathola imbewu ekhethiwe, izingcebo zomhlaba ezihlolwe izingcweti, kanye noqeqesho lokusebenzisa izindlela zokulima ezintsha nezinokunakekela imvelo. Inkampani kaHulumeni ebhekelele izindlela zolimo ikhiphe imali engaphezulu kwamashumi amahlanu ezigidi zamarandi ukwelekelela izindawo zasemaphandleni ngqo.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuletha izinsiza zezempilo maqondana nabantu abahlala kude nezibhedlela nezikole zezempilo. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni ezifana noKwaZulu-Natali naseNtshonalanga Kapa, abasebenzi bezempilo bahambela imizi nemizi ngenhloso yokuvakashela abantu abasemakhaya. Kuphinde kwaqhutshwa nemikhankaso yokuxwayisa abantu ngezigameko zezokugula okufana negciwane lengculazi, isifo sofuba, kanye nesifo sikashukela. Abasebenzi bendawo bebehlangene nabanukeli bezempilo ukwethula izinhlelo zokuhlunga nezokubheka isimo sezempilo sabantu ngokwenani eliphezulu. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawubanjelwe eHolweni laseNdwedwe, uMphathi Wesifunda Sezempilo uMnuz Sibusiso Mthethwa uthe lolu hlelo luyingxenye yohlelo olukhulu lukahulumeni lokuletha usizo kwabahluphekayo.

Lezi zinzuzo zihlanganisa isibonelelo sabantwana, isabelo samakhehla nabesifazane abadala, kanye nesibonelelo sokungenzi. Imindeni eminingi yasezindaweni zasemakhaya incike kulezi zinzuzo njengomthombo wayo wokuphila nsuku zonke, ikakhulukazi lapho izinga lokusweleka kwemisebenzi liphezulu kakhulu. Umnyango Wentuthuko Yezenhlalo uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izimali zifinyelela kulabo abazidingayo ngendlela enesithunzi nengakhethi muntu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uhlelo lokuhlala lwabahlala emigwaqweni luyaqhubeka ukuphakwa, njengoba ohulumeni bendawo bekhulumisana nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni ukuze bathole izindawo zokuhlala eziphephile.

Lezi zimali zinikwa abantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekile, futhi ziyisisekelo esibalulekile sokuphila kwabantu abaningi emiphakathini esindelelekile. Umnyango Wezentuthuko Yomphakathi uqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo lezi zifinyelela kubo bonke abantu abahlonzwa njengabadinga usizo lwezimali. Abahlali basemalokishini nasemakhaya baveza ukuthi lezi zimali zisiza kakhulu ekukhipheni izindleko zansuku zonke, njengokudla, uyithi, kanye nezimpahla zesikole. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uhulumeni ube esekele nabanikazi bezindlu ngezinhlelo zokuqhubeka kokwakhiwa kwezindlu zabikelwa ngoHlelo LwesiNgisi olubizwa ngoRDP ukuze kuncishiswe inani labantu abahlala emakhaya angazange aqedwe.

UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu useqinise izikhwama zesivumelwano sokwakha izindlu ezintsha ezigwaqeni ezahlukene, kuhlanganise nezindawo zasemakhaya lapho isidingo sikhulu khona kakhulu. Izinhlelo zokwesekwa komphakathi, njengamasiniki ezenhlalo kanye nezibonelelo zezingane, zinikeza isandla esisimeme kulabo abaphila ezimweni ezinzima zokuswela. Abahlali abangene kulolu hlelo basebenike ubufakazi bokuthi izimpilo zabo zashintsha kakhulukazi ngemuva kokuthola usizo olufanele. Izibonelelo zezenhlalo zikhokhelwa ngqo emikhondweni yezemali yabantu ngayekhaya, okwenza ukuthi imali ifike ngesikhathi esilungile.

Izinhlelo zokusekela umphakathi, ezifana nesibonelelo somdala, isibonelelo sezingane, kanye nesibonelelo esikhethekile kwabakhubazekile, ziqhubeka nokusiza izimindeni eziningi ezisebuhlungwini obukhulu. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal uqinisekise ukuthi izindawo zokukhokha izibonelelo ziyatholakala nakwezindawo ezikude nasemakhaya, ukuze bonke abantu abaswelayo bakwazi ukuthola usizo ngaphandle kwezinkinga. Imizi eminingi yasemaphandleni incike kakhulu kulezi zibonelelo njengoba amathuba emisebenzi eseyanciphe kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika. Abahlali abasezikhungweni zezempilo kanye nasezikolo baxwayiswa ukuthi baqinisekise imininingwane yabo isibhalisiwe ngokusemthethweni ukuze bangabikho esikhundleni sokushiywa ngaphandle.

Ngonyaka wezi-2024, izibalo ezivela eMnyangweni Wezemfundo zibonise ukuthi izingane ezingaphezu kwezigidi ezimbili zisafunda emigwaqweni ebheke izikole zaseNingizimu Afrika, zihlangabezana nezingqinamba ezimandla emphakathini. Izindaba ezikhathazayo zibika ukuthi izikole eziningi ezisemakhaya azina izinsizakusebenza ezanele, njengamabhuku, amakhompyutha, kanye neziteshi zamanzi ahlanzekile. Othisha abaningi bakhala ngokuthi abanikwa ukuqeqeshwa okuqhubekayo okufanele ngenhloso yokuqinisa ikhono labo lokukhulisa ulwazi lwabantwana. Izifundazwe ezifana naKwaZulu-Natal, iMpumalanga, kanye neLimpopo zilandwa njengezindawo lapho ukufunda khona kusaxazuluka kakhulu ngenxa yezinkinga ezinzulu.

Emiphakathini eminingi yaseNingizimu Afrika, abantu abasemhlabeni bayaqhubeka nokubhekana nezingqinamba ezinzima zokuphila, ikakhulukazi labo abangasebenzi noma abakhubazekile. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zosizo lwezimali, okubizwa ngezibonelelo zikahulumeni, ziyaqhubeka ukusebenza ngempumelelo ezindaweni zasemakhaya nasezindaweni zasemadolobheni. Ngaphezulu kwabantu abayi-500 000 abathola izibonelelo zezingane kuzifunda ezahlukahlukene, lapho imindeni eminingi incike kulezi zimali ukuze ikhiphe izidingo zansuku zonke. Umnyango Wezentuthuko Yabantu Nezokuphepha Kwentuthuko Yabantu uyaqhubeka nokuxhumana nemiphakathi ukuze kutholakale ukuthi ziziphi izindawo lapho osizo lwezindlu ludinga ukwandiswa khona ngokushesha.

Emizini eminingi yasemakhaya, abantu baseNingizimu Afrika baqhubeka nokubhekana nezinselelo ezinkulu eziphathelene nezempilo yomphakathi, ikakhulukazi lezo eziphathelene nezokwelashwa kwabantwana abancane. Ngakho-ke, uMnyango Wezempilo ufake uhlelo olusha lokuhambela imijondolo nemiphakathi emijondolo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zempilo. Lolu hlelo, olwaziwa ngokuthi iNational Health Outreach Programme, luhlose ukukhulisa ulwazi ngezindlela zokuvikela izifo ezinjengesigulazwe, isifuba, kanye namalaria ezifundazweni ezithintekile kakhulu. Izinhlelo zokugoma zisetshenziswa njengesithupha esibalulekile kulo msebenzi, njengoba abasebenzi bezempilo behambela izindawo ezahlukene ngamalanga onke amasonto.

UMasipala weTheku uzakazeke ngethemba lokuthi ihlelo elisha lokunikezwa kwezinsizakalo lizosombulula lezi zinkinga ezikhathaza umphakathi iminyaka eminingi. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe yiNhlangano Yokulawulwa Kwezindlela Zamanzi, ngaphezulu kwabantu abangamashumi amane nezinhlanu izigidi baseNingizimu Afrika basathola amanzi angahlanzeki noma abawatholanga nhlobo emakhaya abo. Umkhandlu weTheku uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi zonke izindawo zasemakhaya nakwezomnotho zinikezwa izinsizakalo ezifanele ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2026. Ekhuluma esikhungweni sohlelo lokuhlangana komphakathi, iSikhulumi soMkhandlu sathi iHhovisi LikaThimbulani Ntanzi lizosebenza ngokukhulu ukuzikhandla ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imishini yokuhlinzeka ngamanzi ilungiswa ngokushesha.

Lolu hlelo, olwaqalwa eminyakeni emibili eyedlule, luhlose ukwelapha izinkinga zamanzi ezikhona phakathi kwemizi yasemakhaya kanye nalemindeni eyahlukene ezintabeni. Izikhulu zikamasipala zichaze ukuthi izimali ezisetshenziswayo zivela emukelwa kahle nguhulumeni kazwelonke kanye nezinkampani zabucala ezitholakalayo kuzwe lonke. Umhlahlandlela kaMasipala ubuye waveza ukuthi kunezinhlelo ezengeziwe zokwakha imigwaqo nenqubo yokuphatha imfucuza ezizokwethulwa ngaphakathi kwezinyanga eziyisithupha ezizayo. Abahlali abebekhathazekile ngokushoda kwamanzi baphendule ngokuthokoza, bebonga izikhulu zimiso zikamasipala ngomzamo wokufeza izidingo eziyisisekelo zabantu.

Izinkinga zihlanganisa ukungabi nezinsiza ezifanelekile, ukuntuleka kwamanzi okuwela kahle emhlabathini, kanye nokusweleka kofuzo lwezinhlanzi ezithwala izithelo eziningi. UMnyango Wezolimo, Ukuthuthukiswa Kwemhlabathi Wezindawo Zasemakhaya kanye Nezokukhiqizwa Kwezokudla usebenzise uhlelo olusha oluhlose ukuxhasa labo abalimi abathinteka kakhulu yilezi zinqinamba. Ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo, abalimi abahlanganyeli banikwa imbewu ekhethiwe, izinsiza zokukhiqiza, kanye nezifundo zokuqeqeshwa eziqhutshelwa emasimini abo. Umgomo walo msebenzi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abalimi bakhiqiza izithelo namasimba amaningi ngaphandle kokunamathelela izindleko eziphezulu.

UMkhandlu weTheku uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zokulungiswa kwezingxabo zamanzi zisaqhubeka, kepha abaningi bathi basahlezi izinsuku ezintathu noma nezone bengenawo amanzi. Inhlangano ebhekelele izindaba zomphakathi yaleli dolobha isikhipha isinqumo sokuthi izoqhakambisa udaba lolu kuMnyango Wezamanzi kanye neZinhlanzeko ukuze kutholakale usizo olushesha. Izisebenzi zoMkhandlu zibike ukuthi izimoto ezilungisayo sezithumwa ezindaweni ezahlukene ukuze kuphenywe ukuthi zikhona yini izingxabo ezinofa noma ezijiyile. Kuyinhlalayenza eqinisekisiwe ukuthi abantu abaphila ezindaweni lapho izingxabo zikhona iminyaka eminingi ngaphandle kokulungiswa bathola ubunzima obukhulu ngesikhathi sasehlobo uma ukusebenziseka kwamanzi kukhula ngesivinini.

Uhlelo lukahulumeni lokusekelwa kwabalimi abancane seluyizithelo ezinhle kule minyaka emibili edlule, njengoba izinhlangano ezahlukene zikhipha imali enkulu ukuze kufakwe ngokuphelele imishini yokulima kanye nezinhlobo zezicelo zezitshalo ezintsha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izindawo eziningi zasemakhaya sezikwazile ukufuqa phambili ngenxa yenhlelo yokuthuthukiswa kwamasimi amancane anezikhali zobuchwepheshe bezesimanje. Abalimi abawu-5 200 abebethinteka kulolu hlelo baqinisekisa ukuthi izitshalo zabo zithele izithelo ezenele ukuze zondla imindeni kanye nezimakethe zasekhaya. Isikhungo sikahulumeni esikuSikhawini sesinike abalimi ukwaziswa okunzulu ngokusebenzisa umhlaba ngendlela efanele nezimiso zomthetho wezolimo wezwe.

Izinsiza-mali ezifana nesibonelelo sabantwana, isibonelelo sobuguga, kanye nesibonelelo esikhethekile sokunakekela abantu abakhubazekile zisiza izigidi zabantu abaswele emakhaya nasemaphandleni ahlukene kuleli. Umnyango Wezentuthuko Yomphakathi uqinisekise ukuthi zonke izicelo ezifike ngendlela efanele zizoxazululwa ngesikhathi esifanele, njengoba ubandlululo lwezenhlalakahle lungeke lubekezelelwe. Kulo nyaka wezemali, uHulumeni ukhiphe imali eningi kakhulu ukuze uhlinzeke izidingo zezakhamizi eziphila ezimweni ezinzima, okuyinto ekhombisa ukuzibophezela kwakhe ekuphilisaneni kobulungiswa bezenhlalo.

Izimo zezulu eziguquguqukayo nezinkinga zengqalasizinda sezibe nomthelela omubi ekukhiqizweni kokudla okuningi kulezi zindawo zasemakhaya. Uhlelo olusha lukahulumeni lwamazwe wonke lokusekelwa kwabalimi abasezingeni eliphansi luqonde ukuxazulula lezi zinkinga ngokunikezela ngezimbewu ezikhethiwe, izinzalo zokufuya, namathuluzi olimo abalimi abangawasizi. Ngokwemibiko ekhishwe yiSigungu Sokuthuthukiswa Kwezolimo neziNdlela Zasemakhaya, inani labalimi abancane abaphumelela ukuhambisana nalolu hlelo lenyuke ngamaphesenti angamashumi amabili nesikhombisa ngonyaka odlule. Izinhlelo zokufunzwa ezixhunywe nokusetshenziswa komhlaba ngendlela efanele ziye zanikwa abalimi emiphakathini eyehlukene, kuhlanganise nabesifazane kanye nabasha.

UMkhandlu weThekwini uzimisele ukubhekana nale nkinga ngokuqala uhlelo olusha lokuvuselela izingqalasizinda zamanzi oluzothatha iminyaka emibili ukuze luqedwe. Lolu hlelo luzohlanganisa ukusetshenzwa kwamaphayipi amasha abanzi, ukwakhiwa kwamathange amanzi amaningi, kanye nokubuyekezwa kwezinqubo zokuphatha amanzi ezindaweni ezishaywe kakhulu yile nkinga. Izindawo ezifana neKwaMashu, uMlazi, kanye naseNtuzuma zizongenela kuqala kulolu hlelo, njengoba zinezibalo eziphezulu zabahlali abangenayo imisebenzi yamanzi efanelekile. Isikhulumi soMkhandlu, sithe imali eyaba yizigidi ezingama-R450 isinikezwe kulolu hlelo nguHulumeni weZifundazwe, futhi imisebenzi izoqala ngasekupheleni kwekota yokuqala yonyaka omusha wezimali.

Izinhlelo ezifana nesibonelelo sabantwana, isibonelelo sabadala, kanye nesibonelelo sokunakekela ziyingxenye ebalulekile yohlelo lukahulumeni lokuqinisa imiphakathi ebhekene nobumpofu. Emiphakathini yasemakhaya, lezi zinhlelo zisiza ukuqeda indlala kanye nokunikeza abantwana amathuba okufunda ngezinga elifanele. Abahlali abaningi sebeqale ukuzwa umehluko omkhulu ekuphileni kwabo ngenxa yalezi zinhlelo, ikakhulukazi abantu abadala nabakhubazekile. Ngokusho kwezinhlaka zikahulumeni, imali yesibonelelo sabantwana ikhulisiwe ukuze igcine ukulandela izimo zomnotho eziguquguqukayo kanye nezidingo zabantu abampofu.

Umkhandlu wesifunda ubike ukuthi uhlelo olusha lokufakwa kwezingxibo zamanzi luzosimamisa isimo kulezi zindawo ezihluphekayo, uhlelo olubiza izigidi eziyisikhombisa zamarandi. Emhlanganweni owawubanjwe ngesonto eledlule eHhovisi Lesigungu SaseNdlunkulu, iziphathimandla zisho ukuthi umsebenzi wokulungiswa kwezingxibo uzoqala ngenyanga ezayo nokulindeleke ukuqedwa phakathi kwezinyanga eziyisithupha. Ngokomthetho kaHulumeni, wonke umuntu unelungelo lokuthola amanzi ahlanzekile ngaphandle kokukhokha ngaphezulu kwamandla akhe, ikakhulukazi amalunga omphakathi ahlala ezindaweni zasezifundazweni zasemakhaya. Izindlela ezifile zibe yinkinga enkulu nakakhulu emizini eseduze nomgwaqo omkhulu webhishi wesifunda, lapho izimoto zibalelwa ku-5 000 ngosuku zidlula khona.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi kade kuyizinkinga ezishaye umphakathi nzima, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni zasemakhaya lapho abantu bengatholi usizo olwanele. Umkhandlu wezifundazwe usukumele, wamemezela uhlelo olusha lokuletha izidingo zomphakathi ngendlela engcono nakho konke ukufeza izidingo zabantu. Ngokwemibiko eshicilelwe yikomiti elibhekelele izindaba zomphakathi, imali elingana namabhiliyoni amabili amarandi izosetshenziswa ukwakha imigwaqo entsha kanye nokufaka amapaiphi amanzi ezindaweni ezidingayo. Kulindeleke ukuthi lo hlelo luzokuqala ngokusemthethweni ngoZibandlela walo nyaka, kuze kuphele isikhathi seminyaka emithathu yokwakha nokuhlela kabusha.

UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu noKuthuthukiswa Kwemiphakathi uzokwethula uhlelo olusha lokuqinisa izinsizakalo kuwo wonke amasipala izwe lonke. Lolu hlelo luzoquketha ukwakhiwa kabusha kwemigwaqo esemakhaya, ukuxhunywa kwamanzi emizini engenamkhumbi, kanye nokusungulwa kwamahhovisi omphakathi azonikeza usizo lwangokomthetho ngokuqondile. Imali ebalelwa emabhiliyonini amane amarandi ibekiwe ukuze lezo zinsizakalo zifinyelele izakhamuzi ezifanelekile ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Izifundazwe ezinhlanu, okuhlanganisa iGauteng, iKwaZulu-Natali, neNtshonalanga Kapa, zizoba yizifundazwe zokuqala ukuhlola lolu hlelo, phambi kokunwetshwa kwalo ezifundazweni ezisele.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi kube yinkinga enkulu emiphakathini eminingi yasemakhaya ngonyaka odlule, kodwa uHulumeni manje ukhombisa izimpawu zokuguquka. UMnyango Wezokuthuthukiswa Kwamaphakathi ubhengeze uhlelo olusha lokusetshenziswa kwemali yokuthuthukisa izingqalasizinda zomphakathi kuzo zonke izifundazwe zezwe. Lolu hlelo luzobandakanya ukwakhiwa kabusha kwemigwaqo, ukuhlolwa kwezinhlelo zamanzi, kanye nokwakhiwa kwezindlu zangasese ezihlanzekile ezikoleni nasezindaweni zezempilo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni omkhulu owawubanjwe eGauteng, iSekela Lingqongqoshe libalule ukuthi imali ephakela lolu hlelo ifinyelela ezigidini ezingamashumi amabili ezamarandi.

UMkhandlu weSifunda wase-OR Tambo ukhiphe isimemezelo sokuthi uzothatha amanyathelo asheshayo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izidingo zabantu ziyahlangabezwa ngendlela efanele. Isimemezelo leso siveze ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ezi-R45 million izosetshenziselwa ukuhlaziywa kwezingqalasizinda zamanzi kanye nezindlela ezidinga ukulungiswa emiphakathini ehlukene yesifunda. Uhlelo lokusetshenziswa kwemali luzobandakanya ukufakwa kwezitsha zamanzi ezintsha, ukuqedwa kwemipompi eyephukile, kanye nokwakhiwa kwezindlela ezintsha zemisele. Imikhandlu yezindawo inikwe isikhathi esiphawulekile samasonto amane ukuqalisa le misebenzi, futhi izinhlaka zikahulumeni zizobheka ukuqhubeka kwayo ngesijwayelekile.

Ngonyaka wezi-2024, izibalo ezakhishwa nguMnyango Wezemfundo ziveza ukuthi ngaphezulu kwabafundi abayizigidi ezintathu baseNingizimu Afrika ababhekana nezinkinga ezinzima zokufunda ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezincwadi zesikole nezinsiza zokunakekela imfundo. Lesi simo sikhathaza kakhulu izikhungo zemfundo kanye nabazali abafuna ikusasa eliqhakazile labantwana babo. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni ezisemaphethelweni ezifana naKwaZulu-Natal neLimpopo, izikole eziningi zisalwisana nezingqinamba ezifana nokungabi namagumbi okufundela anele kanye nokweswela othisha abanolwazi olwanele lwezifundo zezimsomi. Uhulumeni wezwe uzimisele ukulungisa lezi zinkinga ngokushesha ngokukhipha izimali ezikhethekile ezizosiza izikole ezidinga usizo olukhulukazi.

Lezihlelo zimayelana nokugqugquzela abahlali ukuba bahlole impilo yabo njalo, ikakhulukazi mayelana nezigulane ezifana nogciwane lwesandulela-ngculazi, isifo seshukela, kanye nesifo sentliziyo. Izindawo zezempilo zezifunda seziqalelwe ukwandiswa ukuze zikwazi ukusebenzela abantu abaningi abahlala kude nemizi emidala yezibhedlela nemikhakha yezempilo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wabahlali owawubanjelwe eGoli, usihlalo womphakathi waseKatlehong wabeka obala ukuthi abantu abaningi badinga usizo lwezempilo oluseduze nabo, hhayi olungamakhilomitha amaningi. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe uphendule lesi simo ngokusungula izimoto zezikhungo zezempilo ezizungeza imijondolo namaphandleni inikeza abantu ukuhlolwa kwegazi, amakhambi nemithi yamahhala, kanye nemfundo yezempilo.

Ucwaningo olumusha olukhishwe nguMnyango Wezemfundo lukhombisa ukuthi ngaphezulu kwamashule angamashumi amane pesenti awanazo izinsiza ezanele zokufundisa, njengezincwadi zesikole, izithombe, namatekisi afundisayo. Lesi simo sikhathaza othisha kanye nabazali, abathi izingane zabo ziyahluleka ukufunda ngendlela efanele ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezinto ezibalulekile. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe usekhiphe isitatimende esikhuza le nkinga, ethi imali eyengeziwe izosetshenziswa ukuletha izinsiza ezisha emashuleni asezindaweni ezidla izandla. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izifundazwe ezintathu sezihlela ukwakha izakhiwo zesikole ezintsha, njengezindlu zezincwadi kanye nezindawo zokusebenza ngekhompiyutha, ukuze izingane zithole ithuba elihle lokuhlomula ngokugcwele.

Lezi zinsiza, ezihlanganisa imali yokondla izingane, imali yabantu abakhubazekile, kanye nemali yabadala, zinikeza abantu abadinga usizo ithuba lokwakha impilo engcono. UMnyango Wezentuthuko Yomphakathi ubike ukuthi izindleko zalezi zinsiza ziyaqhubeka ukukhula njalo ngonyaka, okukhombisa ukuthi isidingo somphakathi sikhona futhi sikhula ngendlela emangalisayo. Abahlali abaningi emaphandleni nasemadolobheni amancane baxhomeke kulezi zinsiza njengemthombo wokuphila wabo wansuku zonke, ngakho-ke kubalulekile ukuthi uhlelo luzosebenza ngendlela efanele. Kubuye kwatholakala ukuthi abantu abaningi abafanelekile ukuthola usizo abakunyatheleli ngenxa yokuntuleka kolwazi noma izinkinga zokufika ezikhungweni zikahulumeni.

UMasipala weTheku umemezele ukuthi uzokwandisa izinhlelo zokusiza umphakathi ngokubhaliswa kwezimpahla, ikakhulukazi emalokishini lapho abantu abaningi behlala khona ngaphandle kwamaphepha asemthethweni. Lesi sinyathelo sizoqala ngenyanga ezayo, futhi sizofaka ukuvulwa kwamahhovisi amasha ezindaweni ezimbili ezikhethiwe, okungumkhakha iNanda kanye neNdwedwe. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wamakhansela namalungu omphakathi, iPhini likaMeya uNkosazana Thobile Mthembu libalule ukuthi uHulumeni uzimisele ukunqanda ubandlululo lwamandla okuthola izinsizakalo. Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi ziseyizinkinga ezinkulu ezikhungethe izindawo eziningi, kodwa uMasipala uqinisekisa ukuthi imibhalo yazo izoba inkulumo enkulu eholideni eli phambili.

UMkhandlu waseThekwini wemukele izicelo ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zokuxhunywa kwamanzi ekhaya, kodwa izimpendulo zisabhekiwe ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezimali nemisebenzi eyenele. Uhulumeni wezifunda uthumele ithimba labezocwaningo ukuhlola izingqalasizinda ezidalulwa njengezigula, ikakhulukazi eMlazi naseSiyanda lapho amapaiphi emadala eshuba khona njalo. Abaphathi bokuhlela izinkonzo zasemakhaya baxwayise ukuthi uhlelo lokuqiniswa kwamapaiphi luzongenela izigodi ezibalwa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2025. Abahlali base-KwaMashu nabaseMagwaveni bakhale ngokuthi imithombo yamanzi iphakama njalo, ikakhulukazi ngesizini yokushisa, ngakho-ke kufanele ukuthi umkhandlu ushesha ukwenza okungenani isinyathelo esinye esibalulekile.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi kuseyizinkinga ezinkulu ezikhathaza abahlali baseThekwini, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala ezindaweni zasemaphandleni. UMkhandlu weTheku uzibophezele ukuthi uzolungisa zonke izingqalasizinda ezidinga ukulungiswa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wama-2025. Lesi sinqumo sashiwo yiSikhulu Esiphezulu somkhandlu ngesikhathi sikhuluma emhlanganweni wezisebenzi nababusi bendawo. Emhlanganweni lowo, kwashiwo ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ku-R450 million izosetshenziswa ukuqala kabusha imisebenzi yokulungiswa kwezindlela kanye nezinhlelo zamanzi ahlanzekile. Abahlali abaningi bakuhalalisele lesi sinqumo, bekhala ngokuthi sebekhathele ukulinda izimfanelo eziyisisekelo zempilo enhle.

Umkhandlu weTheku ukhiphe isimemezelo esisemthethweni lapho uqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokubuyisela amanzi ezindaweni ezithintekile zizophelela ngoMfumfu walo nyaka. Emuva kwezikhukhula ezahlasela izifunda eziningi, imigwaqo eminingi yasezindaweni eziphakathi komkhaya isisiphosiwe futhi ayikwazi ukusetshenziswa ngokuphepha. Lolu daba lwaphakanyiswa yiNhlangano Yabahlali baseNingizimu eyabika ukuthi abantu abaningi bayahlupheka ngenxa yokushoda kwezidingo eziyisisekelo. UNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa Kwabantu noZwelonke, ekhuluma emhlanganweni owawubanjwe eGoli, waqinisekisa ukuthi uhulumeni uzimisele ukuqeda lezo zinkinga ngaphambi kokuba unyaka uphele.

UMkhandlu weTheku ukhiphe isitatimende ngaleli sonto, usho ukuthi izinhlelo zokuqalisa kabusha ukusilela kwezinsizakalo zizobe sezisetshenzwa ngokukhulu ukushesha. Isitatimende leso saveza ukuthi izinhlelo ezintsha zokuphatha imali yomasipala zizolekelela ukunciphisa ukusebenzisa imali ngendlela engeyiyo. Iziphathimandla zomasipala ziqinisekise ukuthi izisebenzi ezingochwepheshe eziyi-500 zizoqashwa ukuze zisize ekubhekaneni nezinkinga zemizi-mveliso yamanzi. Abahlali bangase bathole usizo olukhulu ngemuva kwezinyanga ezimbalwa uma lezi zinhlelo zilandela njengoba kuhlongozwile ngamagosa kahulumeni. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uMkhandlu uzimisele ukwakha izakhiwo ezintsha zokuphatha udoti ezizolekelela izindawo ezingaphandle kwedolobha, okuyizindawo ezihlala zingakhathalelwe kahle.

Emadolobheni asezifundazweni ezahlukene, izingane eziningi zisabhekana nezinselelo ezinkulu zokufunda nokufika esikoleni nsuku zonke. Imibiko evela emiphakathini yaseNdwedwe, eMlaza naseNqutu ibonisa ukuthi izikole eziningi zisaswela izinsiza ezibalulekiwe, njengezincwadi, amakhompyutha kanye nezindlu zangasese ezihlanzekile. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe uthe uyazibophezela ekuxazululeni le nkinga, kodwa abahlali bathi izethembiso aziwafezeki ngesikhathi. Abazali baseNqutu bakhala ngokuthi izingane zabo zihamba amakhilomitha amane nsuku zonke ukuze zifinyelele isikole esiseduzane nakhona, okuholela ekutheni izingane eziningi zikhathale ngaphambi kokufika kugumbi lokufundela.

Umkhandlu wasendaweni ushicilele izinhlelo ezintsha zokubhekana nalezi zinkinga ngokuphuthuma, ufuna ukufeza izithembiso ezenziwa ngaphambi kwezama-lo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawubanjelwe eHolividi ngesonto eledlule, uSomlomo wasekhansela wachaza ukuthi imali elinganiselwa kumaphakathi kwe-R45 million izosetshenziswa ekwakhiweni kwamapayipi amanzi kanye nasekuqedeni kwezindlela ezingasetshenziseki kahle. Lezi zindaba ziheha ukunaka okukhulu phakathi kwamalungu omphakathi, ikakhulukazi labo abasebenzela kude nekhaya. Abahlali abaphila ezindaweni ezisezintabeni bakhala ngokuphila ngaphandle kwamanzi agelezayo izinyanga eziningana, into ebuhlungu nengelula ukubekezela.

Isimo lesi sikhathaza kakhulu iziphathimandla zezempilo, ezizimisele ukushintsha indlela yokunikeza usizo lwezempilo kuzo zonke izindawo zasemakhaya nasemadolobheni. Uhlelo olusha luhlose ukwakha amasu aqinile okuzisa amathuba ezempilo kubantu abaningi, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala kude nezifunda ezithuthukisiwe. Emiphakathini emincane eyakhiwe ngezindlela ezingagesi nezingenamanzi agelezayo, ingozi yokuphila imbi ikhona njalo, futhi idinga ukuxazululwa ngokushesha nangokucophelela. Umasipala nazo zonke izinhlaka zikahulumeni kufanele basebenzisane ngokuhlangana ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abahlali bathola imfundo yempilo efanele ngawo wonke amahlandla. Izigcawu zempilo ezibanjwa emiphakathini ziwusizo oluphelele, ngoba zidala ithuba lokufundisa abantu ngezinto ezikhathaza impilo yabo nsuku zonke.

Lezizibonelelo, ezihlanganisa isibonelelo somntwana, isibonelelo sabadala, kanye nesibonelelo sokukhubazeka, zisebenza njengensika yomnotho wemindeni eminingi yasemakhaya nasezindaweni zasemadolobheni. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni ezifana noMzinyathi naseNdlovini, abantu abaningi bathembele kuphela kulezizinhlelo ukuze bathenga ukudla, izingubo, kanye nezinto zesikole zabantwana. Uhulumeni wezwe ubeke izigqozi zokuthuthukisa lezizinhlelo ukuze kufinyelele abantu abaningi nakakhulu abaswele usizo. INhlangano Yezenhlalakahle Yomphakathi ixwayisa ukuthi noma ngabe lezizibonelelo zibalulekile, kumele zihambisane nezinhlelo zokudala amathuba emisebenzi ukuze abantu banganciki kuzo kuphela.

Ingxenye enkulu yabalimi laba incike ekutshaleni ummbila kanye nezitshalo ezifana namazambane notshanibhisikidi, kodwa baye babhekane nezingqinamba ezinzima njengokushorteka kwembolea kanye nokungabibikho kwezinhlelo zokuxhasa. UMnyango Wezokulima, Ukuthuthukiswa Kwezindawo Zasemakhaya Nezindaba Zomhlaba usebenza ngokuzikisa ukuqinisa izinhlelo ezinikeza abalimi abancane amathuluzi adingekayo ukuze bathole imveliso ephezulu nangokulondeka. Lezi zinhlelo zihlanganisa ukuphiwa kwabantu amasidi asezingeni eliphezulu, imbolea ekhethiwe, kanye nokuqeqeshwa ngezindlela zolimo olunohlonze olugcina inhlabathi isempilweni. Ngokwalolu hlobo lokuxhasa, kuhloswe ukunciphisa ukwencika kwabalimi abancane emantengweni amanani aphezulu okuthengisa imbolea kanye nezinye izinsiza.

Umkhandlu waseMsunduzi ukhiphe isimemezelo esithi uzokwethula uhlelo olusha lokuhlaziya izingqalasizinda zomphakathi ngonyaka wezimali wezi-2025/2026, oluhlose ukwelekelela izindawo ezifuna ukunakwa ngokushesha kakhulu. Lolu hlelo luzobandakanya ukuhlaziywa kwemipompi yamanzi, ukuhlinzekwa kukagesi okuqhubekayo, kanye nokuqinisekiswa kokuthi izimpahla zomphakathi zisebenza kahle. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni owawubanjelwe eHhovisi likasiThela waseMsunduzi, iMeya yathi uhulumeni wendawo uzimisele ukusebenza ngokucophelela ukuze izidingo zabantu zihlangabezanwe nazo ngendlela efanele. Ngaphezulu kwamaphrojekthi angamashumi amabili nesikhombisa azovalwa ekupheleni konyaka wezimali, iningi lawo libhekene nokuhlinzekwa kwamanzi nakasilinda ngokweqile.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi ziseyinkinga enkulu emiphakathini eminingi yasemakhaya eNingizimu Afrika, ikakhulukazi kulezo zindawo ezikude nezindawo zasedolobheni.
