UMnyango Wezokubusa Ngokubambisana Nezindaba Zendlu uzibophezele ukulungisa lezi zinkinga ngokukhulisa ingeniso yezimali eya emikhandlwini emikhulu nemincane kuleli. Kule nyanga, umphakathi waseMsinga eNyakatho neKwaZulu-Natal uzwile izethembiso ezintsha zikahulumeni mayelana nokwakhiwa kwezingqalasizinda ezintsha ezifaka phakathi izingcingo zamanzi, iziteshi zikagesi, kanye nezindlela ezizokwakhiwa kabusha. Izikhulu zikamkhandlu zixoxe nabantu bendawo emhlanganweni owawubanjelwe eHholo lomphakathi waseMsinga, lapho abahlali bakhona babeka izikhalo zabo ngobulungisa nobungako bemisebenzi ekhona.

Lolu hlelo, olwethulwa nguNgqongqoshe Wezempilo wezifundazwe, luhlose ukwehlisa inani labantu abagulayo ngenxa yezinhlelo ezingalingani zokudlela nokuswela ulwazi mayelana namalungelo abo ezempilo. Abahlali baseNanda nase-Umlazi babike ukuthi izinhlelo zokuxilongwa ngezifo ezinjengesifo sikashukela nengculazi seziye zabasiza ukuthola usizo ngesikhathi esifanele, ingakho inani labantu abangenisiwe ezibhedlela sehlile ngezinga elihlabahlosile. Izinhlangano zomphakathi nazo zizohlanganyela kulolu hlelo, zizokweseka amaqembu ezigodi ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi imiyalezo yezempilo iyafinyelela kuma-ward wonke angabeki abantu abancane nasemalokishini asemakhoneni.

Iziphathimandla zikamasipala ziphawule ukuthi kuzosungulwa uhlelo olusha lokuphendula izikhalo zabantu ngesikhathi esifanele, njengoba izinkinga ziphinde zibonakale njalo kakhulu. Ngaphandle kwalokho, umkhandlu uzozisa isizwe ngezinhlelo zokuhlinzeka ngezidingo eziyisisekelo kuwo wonke amakhosi ezindaweni zasemakhaya nakuzo izikhungo zemizi-mvelele. Ekhuluma esigunwini esiphezulu somphakathi, uSomlomo waKomiti lezeMpilo nokuHlinzekwa kwezidingo uXolani Dlamini uthe ukuphatha kahle kwezinsiza kuyimfuneko engephikiswe, futhi uhulumeni wakuleli uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi bonke abantu bathole izidingo ezifanele.

Emabangeni aphansi nasemabangeni aphakeme ezikoleni zomphakathi, izingane eziningi zisabhekane nezinselelo ezinkulu ekufundeni nokuqonda izifundo. Ucwaningo olumuva nje lubonisa ukuthi abafundi abangaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha nesihlanu abaseziklasini zesikhombisa kuze kuyofika esikhombisa nasesishiyagalombili abafinyeleli ezingeni elifanele lokufunda isiZulu nasiMathematics. Lezi zinombolo zimangaza kakhulu izifundiswa nezinhlaka ezibhekele imfundo ezweni lonke laseNingizimu Afrika. Izifundazwe ezisezindaweni zasemakhaya zibikwa njengezichazwa kakhulu yilo mkhakha wokuhluleka kwabafundi, njengoba izikole eziningi zisaswele izincwadi zezikolwa, othisha abanele, kanye nezakhiwo ezifanele ukufundela ngaphakathi kuzo.

Le ngxaki iyabonakala ngakumbi kwizithili ezikude nezidolophu ezinkulu, apho izitsha zokufundisa azanelanga kwaye izakhiwo zifuna ukulungiswa ngesisheshane. Oogqirha bemfundo bathi eli nqanaba lokuwa lubonisa isidingo sokusebenza ngamandla ngokulungisa iziseko zezikolo ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa kahulumeni asezifundazweni athi inkqubo entsha yokuxhasa ootitshala iza kusebenza ukusukela ekuqaleni kwenyanga ezayo, ize isize ukuqeqesha ootitshala abangena ngokutsha emasebenzi. Lo msebenzi wobambiswano uphakathi koMasipala namaziko emfundo uyinxalenye yomnqophiso omkhulu wokuphucula imfundo yabantwana base-ekhaya. Ootitshala abakhulu bamaziko amaninzi baxelele amajelo eendaba ukuba abafundi abaninzi bafika esikolweni bengadlanga, oku okuchaphazela amandla abo okufunda.

Izindlu ezinengi kule dolophu zingaphantsi kwemeko yehlekisa ngenxa yokungabikho kobuchwepheshe bezinto zegesi nonotekelo. IRhulumente wesifunda i-Eastern Cape uxelele uluntu ukuba umbutho wesebe loLawulo lweeNkonzo zoMasipala uzakuhlola zonke izithili ezichaphazelekayo ukususela ngoJanuwari owe-2025. Iindlela ezaphukileyo kunye nezisele zingasalungiswa emva kwemvula mazikhathaza abantu beenkoliso zona iinqwelo. Amaqumrhu kaRhulumente azixelele ukuba imali eyi-R45 yezigidi yabelwe ukuze ilungise ingxaki yezindlu zankomfa. Ukuvulwa kweentshukumo zokulungisa ezi ngxaki kufanele kwenziwe ngabemi ngokuzimeleyo kunye namagosa kamasipala aza kusebenzisana. Amalungu oMkhandlu woMasipala axelele abahlali ukuba abo bazibandakanya kwinkqubo yokuhlolwa kwezidingo zoluntu baya kufumana inkxaso ngqo.

Izikhululo zempilo zikarhulumente zisebenza ngenkuthalo ukwandisa ulwazi lwabantu malunga nolondolozo lwempilo, kuquka ukutyiwa kokutya okusempilweni nokucwangciswa komntwana. Abasebenzi bempilo basebenza imini nobusuku ukufundisa abahlali ngezinto ezibalulekileyo, njengokugcina izandla zicocekile nokuhluza amanzi phambi kokuwasela. Amaqumrhu oluntu asehlangene nombutho wezoLwimi lweNgqondo kaZwelonke asebeqalise iinkqubo zokufundisa ezisebenza ngqo kubantu abadala nabantwana. Ezi nkqubo ziquka ukuvavanywa kwezempilo simahla, ukuphiwa kweziyobisi ezibalulekileyo, kunye nenkxaso yengqondo yalabo abaxhalabile. Imigaqo-nkqubo yezempilo ihleli iguquguqulwa ukuze ifanelane neemfuno zabantu abahlukeneyo kwilali nasemalokishini.

Ezi zibonelelo zibandakanya inkxaso yabantwana, imali yabadala, inkxaso yabantu abakhubazekileyo, kunye nezibonelelo ezininzi ezinegalelo elibalulekileyo ekuphileni kwabantu abahluphekileyo. UMasipala weNdawo kunye namaziko karhulumente asebenza ngokuzimisela ukuqinisekisa ukuba abo banelungelo lokufumana ezi zibonelelo bayifumana ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Ezemilimo yolawulo sezikhuthaza abantu ukuba bazibhalise ngokusemthethweni kwi-ofisi yasekuhlaleni ukuze inkqubo ibe lula kwaye iqhubekeke ngokuthe ngqo. Iingxaki ezifana nokusweleka kwempepha-mvume, ukungabi nazo iidilesi zokuhlala, nokusweleka kolwazi malunga nemiqathango yezikhalazo zisahleli iimingxuma ezikhulu ekuphuhliseni inkqubo.

Ezi zibonelelo zibaluleke kakhulu kubantu abaninzi abangenawo amandla okuziphilisa ngokwabo, ingakumbi abo bahlala kumaphandle naloo ndawo zinentlupheko ephezulu. Umbutho iSouth African Social Security Agency, owaziwa njenge-SASSA, uqhuba umsebenzi wokubonelela ngale nkxaso inyanga nganye, esebenzela ukunqanda indlala ebantwini. Abahlali abaninzi bexela ukuba izibonelelo zabo zifika ngexesha, kodwa abanye basachaza imiceli mngeni ebaqubisana nayo xa befika kwiofisi ze-SASSA ukuze bayifumane. Izindlu zokuhlala nazo zisiwa phambili njengenye yemiceli mngeni esemandla kakhulu kubahlali abangathathi ntweni, kuquka abo bahlala kwiindawo ezingekho mthethweni.

Iingxaki ezinjalo zibangela ukuba abantu bagqibe ixesha elide bengazifumani iinkonzo zokulinda ezisemthethweni, nto leyo eyenza izibhedlele zichokhe ngendlela engafanelekanga. Ukuze kuphendulwe le meko enzima, iinzame zikarhulumente ziye zagxiliswa ekuqinisekiseni ukuba iindawo zasemaphandleni nalezo zasezidolophini ziyakwazi ukufikelela iinkonzo zempilo ngokulinganayo. Abasebenzi bezempilo basebenza ubusuku nemini ukufundisa uluntu ngokubaluleka kokugcinwa kwamanani abantu abahlaziywayo rhoqo, kuba ukuhlolwa ngokufanelekileyo kusindisa ubomi. Emazwini abahlali baseMonti, bambalwa abantu abaziqondayo iimfuno zabo zempilo kuba amahlelo ophando asafikanga kubo wonke umzi.

Izikolo ezininzi zisaxhomekeke kwizakhiwo ezindala kunye nezixhobo zokufunda ezingapheleleyo, nto leyo ethobelisa amandla abafundi ekufumaneni iziphumo ezifanelekileyo kwizimviwo zabo. Oogxa-mfundo kunye namajoni omphakathi baxelele iinqununu zezikolo ukuba oku kusenokutshintsha ukuba kusetyenziswa ngobuchule imali enikwa ngamasebe emfundo. Amasebe emfundo asemazweni athile asekhuphe izicwangciso ezintsha zokuqinisekisa ukuba bonke abafundi bafumana izixhobo zokufunda ezaneleyo, kuquka iincwadi nezixhobo zobuchwepheshe. Kwiiyunivesiti zaseMzantsi Afrika, amawaka amaninzi abafundi asebenza nzima ukuze afumane inkxaso-mali yezifundo ngenxa yokwanda kweendleko zokufunda iminyaka ngeminyaka.

UMasipala weCape Winelands uzibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba abasebenzi babo bezokulungisa izingxabo zezindlu zemanzi bafike kuzo zonke iindawo ezichaphazelekileyo ngaphambi kokuphela kuka-Julayi walo nyaka. Ikomiti yomphakathi yaseDrakenstein ibiphakamise le ngxaki ngokuthe ngqo kwiNdibano yeMikhosi yeNtshona Koloni, ifuna izixhobo ezithe kratya ukuze kugcinwe impilo nokuhlaziywa koluntu. Amagosa ezempilo aphefumle ngolwazi olukhathazayo, esithi abantwana abahlala kule ngingqi baxhaphakele zizifo ezinokugwenywa ukuba amanzi acocekileyo afumaneka rhoqo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshiweyo nguMphathiswa wezeMisebenzi yoLuntu, izicwangciso zokwakha iziseko ezintsha zobudlelwane bamanzi zisebhajethini yeminyaka emithathu ezayo.

Ngonyaka ka-2024, ingxelo yombuso ibonise ukuba abantwana abangaphezu kwezigidi ezimbini baseNtshona Koloni, iMpuma Koloni, nakwezinye iindawo zeli lizwe abafumani imfundo efanelekileyo ngenxa yeengxaki ezahlukeneyo. Ezikolweni zasemakhaya, inkqubo yokufunda isadla ngoludala, kuba izixhobo zemfundo azikho ngokwaneleyo, yaye ootitshala abaninzi abaqeqeshwanga ngokufanelekileyo ukufundisa izifundo zesayensi nezibalo. Amaziko emfundo ephakamileyo nawo ajongene nemiceli mingeni enkulu, njengokuswela inkxaso-mali eyineleyo ukuze abafundi basekhaya bakwazi ukuqhubeka nezifundo zabo ngaphandle kokubandezeleka yimali. Urhulumente wephondo ukwabhengeze umgaqo-nkqubo omtsha wokuphucula izinga lemfundo kuzo zonke izikolo, kuqala kwizikolo zasezilalini apho imfundo isebenza gadalala khona.

Imeko le ibangelwa kukungabikho kweeziko zempilo ezaneleyo kumazwe amakhulu asezilalini, apho abemi basoloko behamba imigama emide ukuze bafumane uncedo. Ukuphendula le ngxaki, iSebe lezeMpilo likhuphe uhlelo olutsha lokusondeza iinkonzo zempilo kwabantu abahlala kude nezixeko, kusetyenziswa iiyunithi zempilo ezihambayo. Ezi yunithi zihamba iikhilomitha ezingamakhulu amaninzi ngeveki, zifika kwimizi yasezilalini, zinika abantu isixa sezithambiso, ziqeqesha nokuyalela ngeendlela zempilo entle. Abasebezi bezempilo abaqeqeshwe ngokupheleleyo bakhona kule msebenzi, benika unikelo lwamachiza ngenani eliphantsi ukuze wonke ubani akwazi ukufikelela kulo.

UMasipala ukhuphe isibhengezo esithi izixhobo ezintsha zohlupheko lwamanzi ziza kufakwa kwiilokishi ezahlukeneyo ukuqala kwikota yesibini yonyaka wezimali. Ngokwengxelo yomthombo wasemthethweni, iinkqubo zokubuyisela izisombululo kwezi ndawo zinqongophele amanzi zizongezelela ukuyenzeka kwezinto eziluncedo kuluntu. Urhulumente wesifundazwe ugxininise ukubaluleka kokusebenzisana nomasipala ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali yoluntu isetyenziselwa izinto eziyiyo. Amaqumrhu amalungelo oluntu ayacelwa ukuba ahambisane neenjongo zomasipala ukuze abahlali bazi ngaphandle ukuba zithethwa ntoni na. Ngaphandle koko, ikomiti yezamanzi yepalamente yesifundazwe ibhengeze umhla wenzululwazi yokujonga inkqubo yokunikezela ngamanzi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni.

Urhulumente weli lizwe uye waseka iinkqubo ezahlukeneyo ezijoliswe ekuncedeni abantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, ukuze bafumane inkxaso abayidingayo ukuphila ubomi obufanelekileyo. Kule minyaka idlulileyo, umzamo omkhulu wenziwa ngurhulumente ukuqinisekisa ukuba iimali zenkxaso zifikelela kubo bonke abafanelekileyo, ingakumbi abo bahlala ezilalini nabanqongopheleyo izixhobo. Iziko lezentlekele nezinye iinkqubo zikarhulumente ziye zaqhuba iinkqubo zokufundisa uluntu malunga namalungelo abo nendlela yokufaka izicelo zenkxaso-mali. Umphakathi waseMonti, ngokomzekelo, ucace gca ekuxhomekekeni kwezibonelelo zikarhulumente njengoko abasebenzi abaninzi bachaphazeleke bubuhlwempu obuthe kratya emva kobhubhane.

Ezi zibonelelo ziquka inkxaso yabadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, kwaye zisebenza njengenxalenye yegxalaba lomzamo omkhulu wokuphelisa ubuhlwempu. Amakhaya amaninzi asezilalini axhomekeke ngokuphangaleleyo kule mali njengendlela yokuqinisekisa ukuba izidingo zasendlini zifezwa. ISebe leMicimbi yeNtlalo likuqinisekisile ukuba amakhaya angaphezu kwezigidi ezintathu kweli lizwe lonke asanda kufumana inkxaso yeqonga lezibonelelo elitsha, elichukunyiswayo. Lo mzamo wokujonga kwakhona uluhlu lwabafumana inkxaso wenzelwe ukuqinisekisa ukuba amaxabiso afanelekileyo kuphela axhamlayo. Urhulumente wephondo uphinda wabhengeza ukwandiswa kweenkqubo zezindlu zoluntu kwiidolophu ezibonakala zinezidingo eziphambili, okuquka izithili zaseKapa, iDrakenstein, naseGeorge.

Esi siganeko senzeka emva kweminyaka eliqela apho iintsapho ezininzi zaziphila ngaphandle kwamanzi ahlambulukileyo, nto leyo eyabangela iingxaki ezinzulu kwezempilo. Umasipala ucacise ukuba uhlelo olutsha luya kuthi luqale ngokomyinge phakathi kwenyanga kaTshazimpuzi noMarch wonyaka ozayo, kusetyenziswa imali engangoR45 yezigidi. Iingcinga zabahlali zazivakalisiwe kwiintlanganiso zomphakathi ezazibanjelwe kwizithili ezahlukeneyo, nalapho abantu babonisa ukukhathazeka ngokuphazamiseka kwenkonzo. Phakathi kwezigqibo ezibalulekileyo ezenziwa ngumasipala, kukho nokunikezelwa kwezixhobo zokuphekela izikolo zaselungelweni, eziza kusetyenziswa ngokuba iinqwelo zihambe ngokwexesha elibekiweyo.

Izifunda ezinjenge-OR Tambo kunye nase-Joe Gqabi zibonakala zisingathe inani elikhulu labalimi abancinci abangenawo umhlaba omangalisayo, kodwa abanakho ukufikelela kwiindlela zokutyala ezisebenzayo. INkqubo yoPhuhlisp loLimo eMpuma Koloni ithe yaqhuba amaphulo okwenza izinto ngokungathandabuzekiyo, nangona iingxaki zomhlaba zisaqhubeka nokwenza izinto nzima kubantu abahlalayo emakhaya. Abahlali baseKomani baxelele abezindaba ukuba amaplasi amaninzi aye eswela amanzi ekuseni nasemalanga, nto leyo ebangela ukonakala kwezityalo ngexesha lobushushu. URhulumente wephondo ubhengeze ukuba ubeke bucala imali engange-R450 yezigidi ukuze kuxhaswe urhwebelwano lolimo kuzo zonke izifunda, nto leyo abalimi abaninzi abathi wayalela inkululeko entsha.

Izibonelelo ezifana nentsusa yobudala, inkxaso-mali yabantwana, kunye nemali yabakhubazekileyo ziyimfuneko enkulu kubantu abaninzi abahlala kwiimeko ezinzima kakhulu. IRhulumente yesizwe iqhubeka nokwandisa ubalo lwabantu abamkelayo ezi zibonelelo ukuze akho umntu oshiyekele emva. Iinkonzo zika-SASSA, ezinika abemi amaxabiso okuphila, ziyasebenza kwizixeko nakuzo zonke iindawo zasemaphandleni. Abasemagunyeni baxelele ukuba amakhaya amaninzi asezifundazweni zasemaphandleni asafumana ubunzima ekufumaneni unxibelelwano neziko lokuhlawulwa kwezibonelelo. Ukuze kuxazululwe le ngxaki, amaziko entolongo zezimali avulwe kwimizi-mveliso emitsha ukuqinisikisa ukuba abantu abadlelane nobuqhetseba bafikelele ngokukhawuleza kwimali yabo.

Urhulumente wePhondo, ngokusebenza ngokuthe ngqo nemiphakathi esemaphandleni, uqhube amaqela okusebenza aye kohlola iimeko zokuhlala kwabahlali abahlelelekileyo ukuze ancede abo abasweleyo kakhulu. Abahlali baseMonti, ikakhulu abo bahlala kwizindlu ezigungxulwayo nezingenaziseko ezifanelekileyo, bayavuma ukuba le nkqubo iye yabanceda ngokubavulela ithemba ebebelihleli kumnyama. Iinkqubo zikaSebe lezokuHlaliswa kwabantu zizimisele ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu unelungelo lendawo yokuhlala ekhuselekileyo, ecocekileyo neneempawu ezifanele abantu. Ngokutsho kwezikhululo zeendaba zasekuhlaleni, iimali ezikhutshwa ngurhulumente ukuxhasa lemikhosi yezindlu ziye zandiswa ngokulingana neenqanaba zokuphila ezibuhlungu zabahlali abangathathi ntweni.

Izifunda ezifana naseQumbu naseBizana zibonakalisa imeko ekhathazayo, apho abalimi abancinane bengakwazi ukuvelisa ukutya okunaneleyo ngenxa yokusweleka kweenkqubo zenkxaso ezifanelekileyo. URhulumente weMpuma Koloni, ngokusebenzisana nomNyango wezeMveliso yoMhlaba, uqalise inkqubo entsha yokuxhasa abalimi basemaphandleni ngezixhobo zolimo kunye noncedo lwemali ukuze bakhulise imveliso yabo. Le nkqubo iquka ukufikelela kwemfundo ngezindlela ezintsha zokulima, inkxaso yezityalo, kunye noncedo lokufumana iimakethe ezintsha zokuthengisa imveliso. Abalimi abangabantu abafazi baqatshelwe njengoqoqosho olukhulu kweli candelo, ngenxa yoko ke umzamo ufakwe ukuba bafumane inkxaso enkulu kwezi nkqubo.

Usodolophu wenhloko-dolophu uqinisekisile ukuba lo msebenzi wokufaka imijelo emisha uya kuqalwa ngexesha eliphezulu eloNtlasa kulo nyaka, kwaye uya kuqhuba de abe ugqityiwe ngaphakathi kweminyaka emibini. Umasipala uxelele uluntu ukuba iinkampani eziya kuqashwa kule projekthi kumele zilandele imigaqo ethile yokuqesha abasebenzi abasuka kwaLo mmandla, ukuze uluntu lwangaphakathi lufumane inzuzo yezomnotho kwaye ingagaywa ngaphandle. Ngaphezulu koko, uMphathiswa weZekhaya nomPhakathi ephondweni wabhengeza ukuba imibutho yoluntu iya kunikiwa amathuba okubonakalisa izimvo zabo ngokusemthethweni kwingxelo yeenkonzo zomasipala ngaphambi kokuba igqityiwe yenziwe umthetho opheleleyo.

Ezi nkqubo, eziquka imali yenkxaso yabantwana, imali yamaxhoba omhlaba, kunye nenkxaso yabadala, zisebenza njengentsika yobomi kwabaninzi abahleli ngaphandle kwemisebenzi esisigxina. Umba wezindlu ezintsha uyaqhubeka ukuba ngunobangela wokukhathazeka okukhulu kubahlali abahlala kwiindawo ezingenamakhaya afanelekileyo. UMasipala waseMdantsane ubhengeze ngokusesikweni ukuba amakhaya angaphezu kwekhulu azakwakhiwa ngalo nyaka ukuze kuphunyezwe amalungelo abahlali afanelekileyo. Olu lwakhiwo luzakuba nenxaxheba enkulu ekunciphiseni ubunzima obujongene nabantu abangenazo izindlu ezifanelekileyo kule ndawo. Amakhosikazi nabantwana abangaphandle kwenkxaso yasemzini bafumana ingqalelo eyodwa kwezi nkqubo zorhulumente zokunceda abahluphekileyo.

Urhulumente weli lizwe uyaqhubeka nokuzama ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu onelungelo loncedo lwezindlu uyalufumana ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ngaphandle kokuba afumane imiqathango enzima engasenakufikelela kuyo. Iinkqubo zoncedo loluntu, eziquka imali yenkxaso yabantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, ziye zabaluleka kakhulu ekuncedeni iintsapho ezisebenzayo eziphila phantsi komda wentlupheko. Ukuze kufezekiswe injongo yokunceda abantu ngempumelelo, amagosa aphondo ahambele imizi emine eyahlukeneyo kule nyanga ukuze anikeze ulwazi oluchanekileyo ngeendlela zokufaka izicelo. Ikomiti yolondolozo lwentlalontle iphinde yaxelela abahlali ukuba abanakho ukuhlawula imali yokuqesha ngenxa yeemeko ezinzima bafanele bafake izicelo zemali yenkxaso ngokukhawuleza.

IRhulumente yePhondo ixelele uluntu ukuba isigqeba esiphezulu sezisombululo zeenkonzo siza kuqalisa umsebenzi walo kwizithili ezine phakathi kweli nyanga. Ezi zithili zibandakanya iMasipala yaseKing Sabata Dalindyebo, iMasipala yaseMalahleni, nakwezinye iindawo apho abantu bendile bejongana nobunzima bokungafikeleli ngokufanelekileyo kwamanzi. Ngokutsho kweenkcukacha ezikhutshiweyo nguSekela-Mongameli woMkhandlu, abahlali abangaphezu kwamashumi amane amawaka baya kuzuza kwezi zicwangciso zokuphuhlisa ukufikelela kwamanzi ngexesha lonyaka ozayo. Urhulumente ukwabalule nokuba imali efikelele kwizigidi ezimashumi mathathu zerandi iye yabekwa bucala ukuze yenziwe le ngqesho yezisombululo.

Ibhunga lesithili sazisa ukuthi lihlwayele imali efikelela kwizigidi ezingama-R120 zokuzikhulula ezikhundleni ezibalulekileyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iinkonzo ezisisiseko zifika kubo bonke abahlali. Umphathiswa wezakhiwo noondoqo wephondo leMpuma Koloni uvakalise ngokucacileyo ukuba amathuba omsebenzi awanakudalwa ukuba ingqalelo ayinikiwa imisebenzi yezakhiwo ezibolileyo. Eziindaweni zasemaphandleni, abantu abahlala kude nezixeko baxela ukuba izinqwelo zamanzi zifika kangaphi kanye ngenyanga, okuthi kubenze bathathelele ngamanzi angenasiqinisekiso sokucoceka. Urhulumente wesifundazwe uphuhlise iqela elitsha eliza kuphanda le meko ngokukhawuleza ukuze lifike nezisombululo ezisebenzayo.

Kwiindawo ezininzi, abantu baxhomekeke kumaqula amanzi aneziqwenga neenqwelo-mafutha, into edale imeko engabhangi empilweni yabantwana nabadala. Umgaqo wezolawulo karhulumente uyabuqinisekisa ilungelo lamanzi kubo bonke abantu, kodwa uguqulelo lwalomgaqo lusithe emgangathweni oyiminqweno kuphela. Iimeko ezifumaneka ezibelekweni zoMasipala wasesixekweni zibonakalisa ukuba isidingo sokulungiswa kwemithambo yamanzi sifuna ingqwalasela esheshayo nokwaneleyo. Ngokwengxelo eyaziwe nguMasipala, zikhona iinkqubo ezisisiseko ezilungiswa kwimizi engama-1 500 kummandla waseMitchells Plain, apho amapipi amanzi ebedala nokubonakalisa impazamo enkulu. Isebe lezolawulo lweziseko zoluntu lithe lizimisele ukugqiba umsebenzi wokuhlaziya lo mthambo nangaphambili kokuphela konyaka wesixhenxe.

Ekhaya laseKhayelitsha, abahlali balo lonke iphondo liMpuma Koloni bathe gqolo ukuhlangana ukuze baxoxe ngeengxaki ezikhona kwakunye nendlela yokuziphucula iimeko zokuphila. Umbutho wolutsha waseMonti, owaziwa ngegama elithi Isizwe Esilungileyo, ubungise isigqibo sokwakha izakhiwo ezintsha zoqeqesho lwezorhwebo kuzo zonke iziphaluka. Ngaloo ntanjana, amawaka abantu asifumene ithuba lokufunda izakhono ezintsha zemisebenzi nokuqeqeshwa kwezoqoqosho. Iindibano eziqhutywa emaphandleni zibonakalise umdla omkhulu wabantu abangaphezulu kwamawaka amathathu abaye bakhona ngokuthe kratya. Amakhosikazi asixeko naasemaphandleni athe ntsho phambi kwamanye amaqumrhu kaRhulumente ukuze athethele amalungelo abo kwakunye neentsapho zabo.

Urhulumente wesifundazwe uzibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba amafama amancinci enza inxaxheba enkulu ekuphuhliseni iindawo zasemaphandleni, kwaye inkxaso yezinto ezifana nembewu, izichumisi, nezixhobo zolimo iyafumaneka ngokubeka phambili iimfuno zabahlali. Ngaphezu kwaloo nto, amaphulo kaRhulumente ahlose ukunceda abalimi ukuba baphuhlise imihlaba yabo ngendlela esebenzayo nenenongo ukuze imveliso yezilimo ibe phezulu. Iingxelo ezivela kumasebe ezoLimo zibonisa ukuba amafama amaninzi asebenzisa iindlela ezintsha zokulima ekuqinisekiseni ukuba umhlaba uhlala unempilo kwaye uvundileyo unyaka wonke. Ukusetyenziswa komhlaba ngendlela efanelekileyo kuyinxalenye ebalulekileyo yomgaqo-nkqubo kaRhulumente wophuhliso lwezolimo, kuba umhlaba ngumthombo ophambili wokuphila kwabantu abasemaphandleni.

Abantu abaninzi phakathi kwabo bahlala kwizindlu eziwa phantsi, nezingenamandla okujolisa imozulu eqhaqhazelisayo yasebusika. Umbutho wabahlali wendawo uveze ukuba inkqubo yokufaka izicelo zeendlu akucocanga ngokwaneleyo, ibe ibanga ixinelaniso phakathi kwabahlali nabaphathi besixeko. Kuyamangalisa ukufumanisa ukuba abanye abantu bafaka izicelo zabo ngaphezu kweminyaka elishumi eyadlulayo, kodwa bona basalinde impendulo esemthethweni ukuza namhlanje. IRhulumente wephondo weBhunga leNtshona Koloni uqinisekile ukuba unikezela ngeendlu zamahlwempu ngokomgaqo-sikhelo wokuxhasa uluntu oluhluphekayo. Iinkonzo zentlalo-ntle, kuquka inkxaso-mali yeNkamnkam yabantwana kunye neMali yoMantyi, ziyaqhubeka zibanjelwa ngabantu abanelungelo lokuzifumana minyaka le.

Olu dano lubonakalisa ubungakanani bendlela apho abantu baselula, abadala, nabanye abasemngciphekweni besalinda inkxaso efanelekileyo ngokuyimfuneko yabo yemihla ngemihla. Iinkqubo zenkxaso yoluntu, eziquka iinkxaso zemali zabantwana, abadala, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, ziyaqhubeka nokufika kwiinqanaba eziphantsi kunalokho okufunekayo ukuze zikhusele onke amalungu omphakathi. Abacuphi bezentlalo abangaphezulu kwama-200 baqhuba uphando olubanzi kulo nyaka, beveza ukuba iintsapho ezininzi azifumani iinkonzo njengoko kumiswe ngumthetho wakuleli. Iingxaki ezibangelwa kukungabikho kweendlela ezifanelekileyo nokushota kwabasebenzi ziyaqhubeka zithintela ukufikeleleka kwenkxaso kubantu abasweleyo.

IMasipala yeSithili waseMzantsi uMzimkhulu ixelele uluntu ukuba umsebenzi wokubeka iingxelo zomnatha wamanzi uya kuqalisa ngenyanga ezayo, emva kweenqubo zobugcisa ezazibambe umgaqo-nkqubo wokusebenza. Kule nyanga, iikomiti zeenkonzo zoluntu zihlanganile ukuxoxa ngamacebo okuphucula ukufikiswa kwamanzi kunye nophucuko lwezindlu zangasese kulo mmandla. Iinjongo ezibekiweyo zibonakala zilungiselelwe ukuhlangabezana neemfuno zabantu abangamatyotyombe abahlala kwiindawo ezikufutshane nezixeko. Ngokwenqaku lelo, amaqela aliqela asekelwe emiphakathini ayivumelanga indlela ekujanyaziswa ngayo imicimbi yabahlali abahluphekileyo, ebebalula ukuba izithembiso zeenkonzo zomasipala azifezeki ngexesha elifanelekileyo.

IRhulumente yeMmandla yaMasipala ithe izakuqinisekisa ukuba iingxaki zokuhanjiswa kwamanzi zizakusombululwa ngokukhawuleza, ingakumbi kwilokishi iKhayelitsha nasezindaweni ezingqonge idolophu yaseBhayi. Amaxwebhu asemthethweni athunyelwe kwiziphathamandwa zamadolophu zibonisa ukuba ngaphezulu kwabantu abazikhululo ezingamashumi amathathu basengxakini ngenxa yokungabi namanzi acocekileyo. UMkomishinala weMicimbi yoLuntu uthe abasebenzi bezakusebenza imini nobusuku ukuze izinto ziphinde zihambe kakuhle kwimihla emibini. Amaqumrhu oluntu asebeke amangeno eSigungu soBulawu ukuze abe nethuba lokuthetha ngale ngxaki ebalulekileyo.

Umbutho weNgqongqoshe uhambele iindawo ezahlukeneyo kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, apho amadam namathanga amanzi athetha khona ngezingxaki zamanzi amdaka awonzakalisayo impilo zabantu. Inyathelo elitsha likarhulumente liquka ukwakhiwa kweziseko ezibolekwa ngurhulumente kazwelonke, nalapho abahlali abamele ukusebenzisana namasebe ohlukeneyo ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali isetshenziswa ngendlela efanelekileyo. Ngaloo ndlela, amagosa esithili aya kufumana imfundo eyongezelelekileyo yokulawula amakhonkco amanzi namanzi acocekileyo ukunciphisa umonakalo owenziwa zizifo ezidalwa ngamanzi angcolileyo. Iinkqubo zokuqeqesha abasebenzikazi bezibhedlele nabasebenzi bezempilo nabo zikwaqukiwe kwesi sikhokelo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba abantu bayakwazi ukuchonga iimpawu zokufa kwamanzi ngokukhawuleza.

Ngonyaka wezi-2024, ingxelo yemfundo ibonakalise ukuba ngaphezulu kwesigidi sabantwana abafunda ezikolweni zasemaphandleni baseNtshona Koloni babhekana nobunzima obukhulu ekufumaneni izixhobo zemfundo ezifanelekileyo. Ezi zikolo azinamagumbi okufunda aneleyo, kwaye amaxabiso ezincwadi ahlala ephakame ngendlela engabavumeli abazali abaninzi ukuzithenga. Iinkqubo zeNtlalo-ntle zixhasa abantwana abampofu ngokubaxhasa ngezixhobo, kodwa le nkxaso ayifiki ngaxesha elifanelekileyo kwizikolo ezikude nezixeko. Amagosa emfundo aphondo abike ukuba abasebenzi beendleko zikarhulumente badla ngokungafiki ngethuba, nawe umoya ophilileyo wohlulwe lilona qela lamfundo ekufuneka lincede kakhulu.

Lo masipala uhambise inkcazelo ejolise kumawadi amaninzi ukuba umsebenzi wokumbiwa kwezikhokelo zamanzi uza kuqala kwinyanga ezayo, uqinisekisa ukuba uluntu luzakubona umahluko omhle ngaphakathi kweminyaka emibini. Iziphathamandla zithethe ngokucacileyo ukuba imali ekumgangatho wezigidi ezingama-R120 yabelwe kwesi siteyitimenti sokuqala, ize imali eyongezelelweyo inikezelwe ngamazwe angaphandle ukuze inkqubo iphumelele ngokupheleleyo. Amagosa karhulumente aqinisekisile ukuba izincedisi zendawo zizakuqeqeshwa ukuze zihambelane nemithetho emitsha yamanzi ekhutshwe nguMnyango wezaManzi. Ekunikezeleni inkcazelo ethe vetshe kumaphephandaba, usihlalo womasipala uthethe ngokubaluleka kokuxhasa amakhaya angafikeleli kakuhle ezibonelelweni ezisisiseko zoluntu.

Ikomiti yolawulo lwasesixekweni saseNgqushwa ibambe intlanganiso eyayinabameli bokwenyani bemibutho yabahlali, apho kwaxoxwa khona ngezinto ezibalulekileyo eziphathelele ukuhanjiswa kwamanzi acocekileyo, ukuqokelelwa kwelindle, kunye nokumiswa kwezibane ezisebenza ngamandla elanga kwiindawo zasemaphandleni. Inkulumbuso yesixeko saxelela ukuba iqumrhu lolawulo luzimisele ngokupheleleyo ukuqhuba umsebenzi wokuphucula iinkonzo zikarhulumente ngaphakathi kweenyanga ezintandathu ezizayo, ngokuxhomekeka kwimali equkiweyo kwisabelo-mali seminyaka yoqoqosho. Kubikwa ukuba abantu abangaphezu kwamawaka amathathu kwisithili saseNgqushwa basafumana amanzi kuphela ngamanqwanqwa asesidlangalaleni, nalapho ezinye zawo azasebenzi kakuhle ngenxa yoqhekeko kunye nokuphelelwa kwamaqhosha axovulayo.

IRiphabhlikhi yoMzantsi Afrika iqhuba inkqubo yokwandisa inani lamaziko asedolophini nasemaphandleni ukuze abantu bafumane uncedo ngokukhawuleza nangokuthe ngqo. Izibonelelo ezifana nePension yeNdala, iNcediso-mali yabantwana, kunye neMpeshana yabaPhila nokuKhubazeka zisondele ngokwenene ekupheleni kwezidingo zoluntu oluphila ngomqolo. Abahlali abaninzi abakwaziyo ukuthetha ulwimi lwesiNgesi baye bafumana ubunzima bokuchankcatha izicelo zabo, ibe lento yayibangela ukulibaziseka nokungafikeleli kubonelelo. Ngokulandela esi simo, uMasipala wePlaaslike Rhulumende uzimisele ukuqeqesha abasebenzi ababalelwa kwizinkulungwane ezine ukuba bakhonze uluntu ngezilwimi zabo zeenkobe.

Isebe lezeNdlela namaZiko oLuntu lixelele amalungu omphakathi ukuba zizakuqhubeka iinkqubo zokwakha iziseko ezibalulekileyo kwizithili ezahlukeneyo zeli phondo. Amagosa karhulumente axelele abahlali ukuba iinkqubo zokuphucula iindlela ezaphukileyo nezisebe zamanzi ezindaweni zasemaphandleni ziza kuqala ngaphambi kokuphelela kuka-Epreli. Oku kuza emva kwemibonisano emininzi eyenziwa phakathi kweziko lolawulo lwedolophu nabantu abachaphazelekayo kule ngxaki. Umasipala wase-George ubhengeze ukuba ngaphezulu kweekhilomitha ezingama-45 zeendlela ziza kulungiswa ngeli xesha lohlahlo lwabiwo-mali olutsha. Iinkokheli zoluntu zikhuthaze abahlali ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zohlahlo lwabiwo-mali ukuze izidingo zabo zivakale kakuhle kumagosa.

IRiphabliki yoMzantsi Afrika inezibophelelo zomgaqo-siseko wokunika bonke abantu abahlala kuyo inkonzo ezibalulekileyo, kuquka amanzi, umbane, kunye nezindlu. Izimvo zabahlali ziye zaqokelelwa nguMasipala weSithili ngexesha lophando olukhulu oluqhutyelwe kwizithili ezahlukeneyo phantsi kwephulo likazwelonke lokujonga iinkonzo zikarhulumente. Iziphumo zophando olo ziye zabonisa ukuba malunga neziphathamandla zisebenza nzima ukuze zifezekise izethembiso zenziwa ngexesha leenkampani zokhetho, kodwa imali engonelanga ihlala iyingxaki enkulu. INtloko yoMasipala, ekuthe ukuthetha kwayo kwabonakala kwiintlanganiso zomphakathi ezimbini ezazibanjwe ngala masonto, ithethe ngokukhululekileyo ngezingxaki ezijongene nabantu beenkalo zamasipala.

Ikomiti lolawulo lwasekuhlaleni liqaphele ukuba ingxaki yomelana phezulu ngethuba lembalela yokuqala kule nyanga. UMasipala weBuffalo City uqinisekisile ukuba uphando lwemisebenzi yengqalelo luze luqaliswe ngokukhawuleza ukuze kufunyanwe iindlela zokusonjululwa kwengxaki. Imisebenzi yokuhlaziywa kwamapayipi amanzi kulindeleke ukuba iqaliswe kwisithuba seeveki ezine ezizayo, ngokweenkcukacha ezikhutshwe ngabathetheli bolawulo. Kwakhona, ukusilela kwamanzi acocekileyo kuphumela ekuphulukanisweni nempilo entle yabantu abadala nabantwana abancinci. Iziphumo zophando lwezempilo zibonisa ukuba izifo ezibangelwa ngamanzi angahlanzekanga zanda ngamasimi kule mmandla ukusuka ngonyaka wamashumi amabini anamabini.

Umasipala waseNxuba Kemntu uwaxelele amakhaya ukuba umsebenzi wokuvuselela izisombululo zamanzi uza kuqala ngoLwesihlanu wale veki, emva kwezinyanga eziliqela kokuxhumana noluntu ngale ngxaki inkulu. Iingxaki zokuxhaphaza kwezixhobo zomnatha wamanzi ezindlini zemizi-mveliso ezichaphazela unxibelelwano lomnatha wamanzi ziye zanqanda inkqubo yokufezekisa izidingo zowamanzi. Izimvo zenkonzo kamasipala ziye zaxela ukuba urhulumente wesifundazwe seMpuma Koloni ugqibe ekubeni wabelane ngexabiso lemali ukuze kuhlaziywe ezi zisombululo zamanzi eziphelelwe ngamandla. Ngokwengxelo yeSebe lezaManzi nezaHlanjululwa, izicwangciso ezintsha zokuphumeza umsebenzi wokubuyisela amanzi azakwenziwa ngamashishini achaseneyo ukuze kugwenywe ukoyisakala okwenzekayo ngexesha lama-tender.

Iinkqubo zoncedo-mali zikarhulumente, eziquka isibonelelo sabantwana, isibonelelo sokukhubazeka, kunye nesibonelelo sabadala, zibonakalisa uzinikelo lwalo rhulumente ekukhuseleleni abantu abasemngciphekweni. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni, uninzi lwabantu luyathemelela kwezi nkqubo njengendlela ebalulekileyo yokuxhasa iintsapho eziswele. Iinkqubo zokuhlaliswa kwabantu nazo zibonakalisa inkqubela ephambili, apho amawaka abantu afumana amakhaya ngonyaka ngamnye ngaphantsi kohlelo lweRDP. Nangona kunjalo, abahlali abaninzi basazibhenca ngobunzima bokufumana iinkonzo ezifunekayo kuba iindlela zokufaka izicelo ziyazibandakanya kwaye azikho ngqalelo. Izisombululo zifunwa ngokukhawuleza ukuze kuncedakale abo bangafumaniyo ezi nkxaso-mali nangona benemfuneko.

Inkqubo yezempilo yomphakathi ibonakala ngokwanda kwabantu abafika ezikhulwini ezahlukeneyo befuna iinkonzo ezingundoqo, nto leyo ebonisa ukuba amava abantu asiyahambelana neemfuno zabo. Amacandelo enkampani yezempilo karhulumente asetyenziswa ngamandla ukufezekisa ezilayikhense eziseBhisho nasezilalini, apho abantu abaninzi bebedla ngokuhamba imigama emide ukuze bafumane uncedo. Kunyaka ophelileyo, iinkqubo zempilo zafikela kummandla obanzi, zihlaba imijelo yokunyanga izifo ezinjengesifo sikagawulayo, uqaqacho, nentshukumo yokuphucula impilo ngokusetyenziswa kwezidlo ezinempilo. Abasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo bathi iziphumo zikhuthazayo, kodwa zisafuneka izicelo zovelwano nenkxaso kwezinye iindawo.

Aba bantu babandakanya abadala, abantu abakhubazekileyo, kunye noomama abaneentsapho ezinqongophele izixhobo zokuphila. Iinzame zokuphucula inkqubo yokunika iinkcukacha ezibhalisiweyo nezimfuneko zokuhlawulwa kwezi mali zenziwe ngokusebenzisa iindawo ezintsha zoluntu ezivulelekileyo. Amagosa asebenza ngaphakathi komphakathi aqinisekisa ukuba abantu abafanelekileyo bafumana uncedo ngokungagqaleli indawo abahlala kuyo. Abahlali baseMonti sebekhathele ukulinda ixesha elide phambi kokuba bafumane iinkcukacha zabo, ngakumbi abo bahlala kwiindawo ezikude nezixeko. Iinkqubo ezintsha zokubalisa abantu kwezezwe zenza lula ukufikelela kwezi nkxaso-mali ngokusetyenziswa kobuchwepheshe obutsha.

Ngokunjalo, inkxaso yezindlu namanzi ayipheli ngaphakathi kwezikhungo zikarhulumente.

Amaqela ezempilo asebenza ngokuthe ngcembe ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu, ingakumbi abo bahlala kude nezixeko, uyafumana unyango olufanelekileyo nangexesha elifanelekileyo. Ukubhekelelwa kwezempilo zokulawula izifo ezifana nesikrelemnqa, isifo seswekile, kanye nengqumba yegazi eliphezulu kusebenze njengesiseko salo lonke uhlelo lokugcina impilo yoluntu. Kwiindawo eziphambili neembali zasezilalini, abasebenzi bezempilo baye bangenela imizi ukuze babike, baxubushe, baze bafundise ngokugcina impilo ngokunyaniseka. Umphakathi wonke ucetyiselwa ukuba ufike kwizixeko zezempilo zasekuhlaleni ngaphandle kwenkcaso, kuba ukusinda nokudinga uncedo yimfuneko engenakukhanyiwa mntu.

Izibonelelo zentlalontle, eziquka isibonelelo sobudala, isibonelelo seenkonzo zokholo, kunye nesibonelelo sokukhula komntwana, zisebenza njengesiseko esixhasa iintsapho ezininzi ezihlala phantsi komgca weendleko nentlalo. Iinzame zenziwa nguRhulumente wePhondo laseNtshona Koloni ukuqinisekisa ukuba abantu abanelungelo lezi zibonelelo bafumana ulwazi olufanelekileyo malunga nendlela yokufaka izicelo. Imizi emininzi esezilalini iye yabanengxaki enkulu yokufumana iinkonzo, njengoko imigaqo yezindawo zamakhaya yona ibibhekene nemiceli mngeni yesixeko. Ukwenzela ukusombulula le ngxaki, i-Ofisi yeNkqubo yoNgcebiso loLuntu isebenza ngokusebenzisana namasebe ahlukahlukeneyo ukuphumeza amaphulo okufundisa uluntu ngokufanelekileyo.

Isithili iEnoch Mgijima Local Municipality sikhuphe isaziso esisemthethweni sokuba umsebenzi wokuphucula iziseko zobudidiyele bamanzi uza kuqala ngenyanga ezayo, emva kweminyaka emithathu yokulibaziseka kweenkqubo zokucwangcisa. Amagosa omasipala axelele abameli bomphakathi ukuba imali elingana namashumi amahlanu anesihlanu ezigidi zeRandi yenikiwe ngurhulumente wesifundazwe weMpuma Koloni ukuze izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezine zifumane amanzi ngqo. Inkqubo entsha iza kubandakanya ukwakhiwa kwezipeyipi ezintsha kunye nokulungiswa kwezitishi zamanzi ezindala ezazisilela rhoqo ngenxa yokonakala. Isikhulu esiphezulu somasipala, owaqinisekisa le ngxelo, sithethe ngokucacileyo ukuba abaqhubi beenkontrakthi baza kuqeshwa ngokwamalungiselelo abekiweyo ngenyanga ezayo.

Iimeko ezinzima zokunqaba kweendlu ziqhubeka ukuphazamisa ubomi bemindeni emininzi, ngakumbi kwezithili zasemaphandleni apho iziseko zolwakhiwo azizange zifikelele khona ngendlela efanelekileyo. URhulumente wePhondo, ngokubambisana namasebe kazwelonke, uqale uhlelo olutsha lokuqinisekisa ukuba imindeni engenayo ingena kwizibonelelo zokuhlala ngokukhawuleza nangaphandle kweengxaki ezininzi zobureaukhrasi. Olu hlelo luquka ukubhalisa kwabahlali abangapheliswanga nokunikezwa kweendlu ezenziwe ngokwemigaqo yezempilo nezokhuseleko. Amakhaya amaninzi asezilalini asebehlala iminyaka emide ekulindele inkxaso esuka kuMasipala, kodwa inkqubo yokunikeza yayihamba kancinci ngenxa yokungabikho kweenkcukacha ezifanelekileyo.

Iindawo ezininzi zasemaphandleni zisafundisa kumagumbi angagqibelanga, apho izitulo nezincwadi zinqongophele ngoburhalarhume. Ukuntswela kwezona zixhobo zifanelekileyo kwenza abantwana bangakwazi ukufunda ngokupheleleyo, ibe imiphumo yabo kwiimviwo ibonakalisa loo nto ngokuthe ngqo. Oogqirha bemfundo bathi eli ngxaki alisoloko liqondwa ngokuthelekiswa namava abantwana abahlala emadolophini, apho iimfuno zemfundo zifezekiswa ngokulula. Urhulumente wephondo uxelele uluntu ukuba iinkqubo ezintsha zokunika izikolo inkxaso yezezimali sele ziqalile ukusebenza kumazwe amaninzi. Ootitshala abaninzi bathemba ukuba ezi nguqu ziya kuzisa utshintsho oluzinzileyo, kodwa bayacela ukuba zona zisebenze ngokukhawuleza nangempumelelo ukuze bangalindi ixesha elide.

Abahlali bamazinge asezilalini baxele ukuba imeko yabo iye yabhetele emva kokuba basebenze kunye neenkqubo zenkxaso yezindlu. Ezi zikhundla zinkxaso ziye zaveliswa zathi zasasazwa kwiindawo ezininzi ezikhethiweyo, kuquka iilali ezingakhathalelwanga ngaphambili kwindawo zasemaphandleni. Ulawulo lwephondo luqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu oneemfuno ezikhethekileyo ufumana inkxaso efanelekileyo ngaphandle komkhawulo. Iinkonzo ezibandakanya ezezindlu, ezezemfundo, nezempilo zisebenza ndawonye ukwakha isiseko esiluqilima somphakathi. Amagosa aphondo athe asebenze ubusuku nemini ukuze izi nkonzo zifikelele ebantwini abangakwaziyo ukuhamba imigama emide. Izibonelelo zokukhathalela abantwana namalunga amakhulu ziye zanabiswa nanjengoko isidingo sibonakale sikhula kwiindawo ezitsha.

Ehlathini laseMpuma Koloni, abahlali belali iNgqeleni bahlangane ngomqombothi nezinto zesiko ukuze bahloniphe amaQhawe omphakathi wabo. Le mbonambi yesithethe yabanjwa ngoMgqibelo ophelileyo, apho izakhono zomdaniso kanye nengoma yesiXhosa zahlatshwa umlomo ngabadala nabatsha. Izindlu zabantu bezigcwele abantu, neenkosi zezona ndawo ezixhaswe kakubi ezo zingaphandle kwesixeko zifikile ngezikhulu zikhathi ukuzokubona besibone. Umphakathi waleli lali usekunye kakhulu kwiindaba zemfundo, izempilo, nengeniso yomhlaba. Kumele sikhumbule ukuba amasiko ethu awayi kudlulwa ngokutshiswa njengamalangatye nje kuphela, koko afanele ukunyamelezwa ngezandla zabantu abakhulileyo baze bathumele izinto ezintle kwisizukulwana esitsha.

Abantu abaninzi phakathi kwabo ngabahlolokazi, amadoda amadala, kunye nabantwana abakhokelwa ngabanye abazali abodwa, yaye imeko yabo yokuhlala yayingalunganga ngaphambi kokufumana le nkxaso. Umbutho kazwelonke oqhuba lolu hlelo uxelele uluntu ukuba iinkqubo zokufaka izicelo ziye zachukumiseka ukuze zisebenze ngokukhawuleza kwaye zifumaneke lula kunaxa kwakunjalo ngaphambili. Abasebezi bakarhulumente bangene kuqoqosho lwemimandla ukuze bafundise abantu ngendlela yokufaka izicelo, nto leyo eyanceda kakhulu abantu abahlala kude nezixeko. Ezilalini zaseMpuma Koloni, inkxaso yezindlu inikezwa ngendlela ehlanganise nokunikezwa kwezinto zokwakha nokuqeqeshwa kwendlela yokwakha ngokwabo.

Umasipala webhantji we-Hhohho ushaye emacala ekutsi wonkhe umuntfu lohlala emaphandleni kufanele atfole lusito lolufanele ngekwemtsetfo welive. Loluhlelo lwemukelwa ngetikhathi tekucindezeleka kwemnotfo, lapho titulu tetindlu bekungafinyeleli khona abahlali labanyenti ngekudla kwemizamo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wabakhulumeli bomphakathi evikini leledlule, intfo lebalulekile lekhulunywako yayingetanyelwa nguMeluleki Lomkhulu walelo masipala, lapho aphawula khona ngetindlela tekugucula loluhlelo lube nelisho elifanele emphakathini. Kubikwe kutsi tindlu letintfaka-ntfaka letakiwa ngaphansi kwenhlelo lehlelwe kahle tawunikwa emindeni lehlala emacansini lacinene noma emagcekeni lanemangozi.

Hulumende unesifiso sekuqinisa umnotfo wasemaphandleni ngekwakhiwa kwemibhalo lemisha yekusetjentiswa kwemihlaba, leyetfulwa kulo nyaka wemali lova. Lenqubomgomo ikhombisa kutinikela kwahulumende ekuciniseni kutsi umhlaba webhekwa njengesidingo lesiphambili selive leSwaziland. Abalimi labayingcosana babika kutsi betfola lusito olubalulekile emkhakheni wekucija, lapho bafundziswa khona ngendlela yekulima lencono nangekusetjentiswa kwemitfombo yemanti ngekuhlakanipha. Ema-ofisi ehulumende asezindaweni tasemakhaya asebenta ngekushesha ekufikiseni tinhlelo tekusita tifike kulabalimi labaswele kakhulu, kuhlanganise labo labahlala emigceleni yetindzawo.

Umkhandlu wasemadolobheni ukhiphe sitatimende lesichaza kahle kutsi bonkhe labo labafake tifomho ngaphambili bazokwaziswa ngesikhathi sekuhlolwa kwetincwadi tabo nekutsi bangaletsa tichazimazwi letidingekako. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi lowabanjwa ePrimary School yaseNhlangano, iNdvuna yeVele yeSifundazwe ibhekise emuva ngeminyaka lemine lebonakale kuba nokucindezelana kwezindlu kanye nekusweleka kwemisebenti ekwakha. Ihlelo leli elisha liniketa inhlangano yabahlali nethuba lokubamba inyange ekuhlolweni kwetifanelo kwabasolo abanikwa lusito. Kutsi tindlu letintsha takhiwe ngekugcwala kwemgomo wekuvikeleka ngekwakhiwa kwato, sikhatsi lesimisiwe kukutsi wonkhe umsebenzi uphele ngaphambi kweNyoni yemnyaka wekuphela.

Emuva kwemcimbi lomkhulu lowentiwa eGege, imiphakathi yetifundza letihlukene ibuthane ndawonye kuze ihloniphe intiambo yamasiko neziMswati. Umcimbi lona bewubanjelwe eHholo leNdlu yeMphakathi, nalapho bantfu labangaphezulu kwemakhulu lamabili babengenile kute bazobona imigido yamasiko kanye nezindzaba temagembu lamakhulu. Tinhlanganisela letitsite tebuchwepheshe, tifundvo, kanye nokukhuluma ngalokusha kwetikhatsi lamanje betikhona, tinika bonkhe labebakhona lithuba lekufundza ngamasiko abo nangabawo. Tikhulu tekhatsi lebephiwe labangu-mtfweli wemphakathi, labetfutfukisile umsebenzi wokusita ema-volunteer labasebenta ngenhlitiyo lehlobile, nato bese tikhambisa umoya wekubambisana.

Ngesikhathi semkhosi wemadlelo locheme nemvelo, imiphakathi yaseNgwane ibutsene ndvawonye kute kugujwe lusikompilo lwesive lekhule emaveni amaningi. Lomkhosi, lowawubanjelwe emadolobheni lamaningi kulo lonkhe live, wawukhombisa budvumisa bentsandvo yesive kanye nebuciko lobubalulekile ekuphileni kwemadlotfwana. Abantu labebeyingxenye yalomkhosi bafike ngekucamba kwetihlandla letahlukene, lapho batikhulula khona ngekucula, kwetana, nangekwenta imisebenzi yetandla leyayivusa tifiso takulo lonkhe lugwadule. Baholi bemiphakathi bakhuluma ngato tonkhe letintfo letifanele kwenteka kuze kutfutfukiswe lusikompilo lwetfu ngobe lolo lusikompilo lusinika similo nesisekelo sekuphila kwetfu njengesive.

Hulumende wesifundza ubeke eceleni imali lenkhulu lekhetsiwe kucwalisa tihlelo tekusekelwa kwekulima, ikakhulukwa kuletikhalo lapho kukhiqitwa khona tinhlanyelo tentsango kanye nemabhoyisi. Leti tihlelo ticondziswe kubatsandzi bakulima labancane, lababuye babe ngibo labaphakamisa umnotfo wendawo ngekusebenta gadalala. Ngemuva kwemhlangano lowawubanjwe enyangeni leyengcile, tigcwegcwe tekusebentisa umhlaba tashiwo nguchwepheshe wetimbuzi tekubaluleka kwekuhlola inhlabathi ngaphambi kwekutsala tinhlanyelo letitsite. Kucedzelwa, kuvezwa kwatiwa kutsi umsebenti wekucwaninga inhlabathi sewusite abalimi labangaphezulu kwabangema-4 500 kulo mnyaka kuphela, labasele betfola lusito olufanele ngetinhlobo tetimbuzi letisheshisako.

Loluhlelo lolusha lweHulumende luzakuqala kusebenta ngekuqala kwenyanga letikhona, njengobe tigciwane tekungcola kwemvelo tite ekupheleni kulamadolobha. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi lowawubanjwe eSibayeni seNdvuna, umNtungwa Simelane wachaza kutsi tindlela letingakahleleki kahle tikhuba inkhambiso yabantu lababuyela ekhaya ngemuva kwemisebenti. Hulumende wetifundza usamalele indzaba yetikhalo tabahlali ngekushesha nangekwetsembeka, njengobe kulandzela imitsetfo yemgomo wemphakatsi loyabekelwa ngulowo nyaka lowetfuliwe. Tiphrojekthi letisemkhatsini waloluhlelo letitsite tibalwa nekwakhiwa kwaletindlela tetitimela letintfwa kanye nekufakwa kwemibhobho lemikhulu yemanti lahlantekile emikhatshini lemidze.

Lomcimbi, lowawubukwa ngubantu labengaphezulu kwema-500, wawuhlanganisa emadansi esiSwati, tingoma, netinkhundla lapho labandzini bafundisa tinsatfo ngemphi yamasiko esiSwati. Tifundze letimbalwa letisuka emadolobheni laseduze taletsa ematintsele etinkhundla letitsite temphakathi, kuhlanganisa nemibuto leyayihambisana nenhlalakahle yabantu. Baholi bemiphakathi bakhuluma ngelimi lolucacile mayelana nentsengo yekusita tinsatfo tekufunda esikolweni, baphindze bacosha tindlela tekuphakamisa umuntfu wonkhe emiphakathini lesele emuva. Kuhlanganiswa kwenhlalo nemikhosi yemvelo kwasita kutsi batali betikhona batekukhuleka netikhondlo tawo letenta kuphila kwemuntfu kube luhle.

Lomhlangana wentiwa khona lapho ekhaya emgwaqweni lophekeme, lapho bantfu labaningi behlangana khona bekhuluma ngemibuto lebalulekile emacondzana nemphilo yabo yemihlalaho. Emkhatsini wetikhalo letavetiwa ngulabahlali, sikhulume ngetintfo letifana nekungatfolakali kwamanzi lahlantekile kanye nalezo tindlela letidala ubumangalanga ekuphumeleleni kwetemfundvo etikolweni tase-ekhaya. Sikhuluma ngemibuto yemphakathi, loholi waseNgwempisi uMnumzane Sibusiso Dlamini ukhulume ngekutsi bahlanganyeleni njengemphakathi ukulungiselela lisasa leliphumelelako. Uthe kubalulekile kutsi abantwana babuyele esikolweni ngobe imfundvo yiwo umgogodla wekulingana nalomhlaba lohamba ngekushesha lamuhla.

Emuva kwemihlangano leyentiwa emiphakathini yonkhe lenkhulu ngesonto leledlulile, kuhlanyelwe tindlela tetintfo letintsha tekuphucuka kwaleyo micondvo yemiphakathi. Umsebenti wekuhlangana uye wabonisa kutsi bahlali labanyenti bayafuna kutsi tinsita talokal sebe tifike ngekushesha nekwetsembeka. Ngemuva kwaloko, iButhokwami leSifundza saseNhlangano selikhiphe sitatimende lesitsi kuzakhiwa timpheme tekuphilisa letintsha etindzaweni letisese ngemuva nasemalokishini. Lititjelo letintsha tidzinga imali lenkhulu, kodvwa hulumende wesifundza utsi ubeke eceleni imali lengu-R47 million yalomnyaka wemali.

Uhulumende weFundze yeHhohho uvumile kutsi lenkinga iseyindala, futsi ubalele tindlela tekusita umphakathi ngekushesha. Umkhandlu webantfu weHhohho ukhiphe sitatimende lesibalula kutsi imali yekwakha imigwaqo yekugeleta kwamanzi sekelungiselelwe nguNgwenyama kanye neKhabhinethi, kutsi ingukhokha lenkhulu yekucala wemnyaka lowu. Emagciwane emigwaqo lemisha atakwakhiwa ngekushesha kwamaviki lamatfupha, ngalesinye sikhathi kutakwenteka kutsi abantu babone kuchibiyela kwesikhashana ngaphambi kwekwakhiwa lokuphelele. Bonkhe abahlali labatfola lindzaba leyo bagcizela kutsi babonga kulandzelwa kwemibango yabo ngemnyaka lowedlule. Ngetinsimu letiseceleni kwemigwaqo lesha, tindlela tekulima tiyawutfola nekuncedakala ekugeleta kwamanzi lokuphephile.

Hulumende weSouth Africa sewungenile ngekusebentisa tinhlelo letintsha tekwesekwa kwabalimi, lapho kuniketwa khona insita yemali, imbewu, kanye nemishini yekulima kumaphandla lahlukene. Loluhlelo luhlose kusita labahlala emaphandleni kutsi bakwate ukulima ngendlela lehlelekile futsi yinzuzo, ngalokuchubeka nemphilo lehle yemiphakathi. Ngetikhatsi takamuva, iSikhundla Sekulima kanye Nekuthuthukiswa Kwemaphandla sitfumele emagosa kuyo yonkhe indlela, lafika asetsenzisana nabalimi beli, asebenta nawo ngesikhathi sekuhlela futsi sekuvuna izitfumo. Loluhlanganyelo lwakhela balalisi base-emaphandleni setsembe futsi lulabela nolwati lolusha ngendlela lemintfweni ikhula ngayo kahle, kutsi imvula iphatswa kanjani, futsi kutsi umhlaba usetjentiswa kanjani ngendlela lefanele.

Umnyango Wetindlu naNekwakhiwa Kwemitsetfo ukhiphe sitatimende lesishiwo nguNgwenya Sifundza, lapho atsandza khona kutsi umsebenzi wokwakhiwa kwaleti tindlu sewuphotfuliwe ngendlela lencomekako, ngaphandle kwemitfunti yetindlela ebeyivimbela kuchubekela embili. Labatsatfwa njengabadvuna balomsebenzi nakho nalatimphakathi lababelindze iminyaka leminengi bafika etikhwameni tegijima kulwa nenhlalo lengesilo ngekwekhono. Kukhanyiswa kwetindlela tasemalokishini nakho sekwenteke ngalesisikhundla sikaHulumende, kutsi iLokishi laseNyamane kanye nele-Matsapha selinemlilo lowonele emagcekeni nasetimphakathi tetindlu. Tigciwane tentiwe kutsi tidluliswa emphakathini ngendlela yemihlanganisi yetifundza lapho abahlali batfola khona tindlela tekucalisa izikhalazo kanye nalokukhulunywa.

Loko kwenteke ngesonto lelidlulile, lapho babelingana khona bantfu labadzala balapha ntalala, batikhumbula emalanga lasabese ngaphambi kwemhlaba wesimanje. Lihhovisi lehulumende laselakalini belinelabambeli, kantsi neNdvuna yetive yafika ngematfuba lalinqobile kutsi ibabingelele emihlangano yabo. Lomcimbi bewukhombisa bukhulu bencabo yesive, njengoba sigodlo sabesilisa nasebasati besilungiselela kucina intsaba njengesinkhwa semphakathi wonkhe. Ngekwengezelela kwaloko, badzala bemphakathi bahlangana phansi kwemutfombu welikhulu, batjela tinchunu letinsha ngendlela lapho nekumtsemba kwenteka khona ngeluvalo nangenhlitiyo leyentiwe kahle.

Inhlangano yeMnyango Wetekutfola Kudla NaNgubho sekhiphe umbiko losho kutsi ngaphezulu kwabalimi labalelwa ku-60 pesenti emaphandleni asemakhaya abate lusito lolwanele lwekuvuselela imitsi kanye nekuthenga imishini lemisha yokulimagodvo. Lombiko uphindze ukhombise kutsi lulwimi lwembila nelesigodi lwehla kakhulu ngemuva kweminyaka lembalwa, lokwetfusa ngobukubi budlula loko bekuhlongozwa nguHulumende esilinganisweni sakhe seminyaka lesikhombisa. Ngenhloso yekuguqula lesimo, Hulumende wasekhiphe Isikhungo Sekulima Sasemakhaya — inhlelo lensha lehlele kusita abalimi ngekubaphatsa kunye nabo ngekwabelana ngolwati lwetemvelo yemhlaba kanye netemnotfo.

Lihlelo leHulumende lelibhekene nekusekela abalimi, lelaziwa ngelibito lelitsi iComprehensive Agricultural Support Programme, selisebente kakhulu ekuhlinzekeni abalimi ngemishini yekusebentelana kanye nembewu lecondzile. Labalimi sebetfole lusito lolubalulekile ngekwemali nangekwemfundo, lokusita kakhulu ekukhiciteni kudla lokwanele emaphandleni. Sibalo sabalimi labatfole lusito lolu selenyuke ngemaphesenti lamakhashane ngalomnyaka losedlule, njengoba iHulumende yandza tinhlelo tekufinyelela tindawo letikhashane. Tingcweli tekulima titfunyelwe etindaweni lapho abalimi badzingeka khona kakhulu, tibaniketa imibono ngendlela tekugcina inhlabathi ikhona futsi ivundze.

Hulumende wetive uyasebenta ngekuzimisela kuhlinzeka ngaleyo nkece lefanele kubo bonkhe labo labancike kulimo njengendlela yekuphilisa. Ngemuva kweminyaka leyimbalwa yekuhlela imibuso yemhlaba longasetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele, sikhalo semphakathi sabuye sentikitika ngekushesha kulabochwepheshe babehlelwe nguhulumende. Laba balimi, labanyenti babo bakhona emifini lemincane, sebanikwa emtsetfo lomusha lowamukelwa nguPhalamende nje nje, lowuchaza ngemtsetfo elicacile wendlela yokutfola usekelo lwelilima. Lemitsetfo isha iyacindzetela bukhona bendlela yekutfola imfuyo kanye nembewu yalokufanele ngaphansi kwezinhlelo tekusekela temkhiqizo.

Umkhandlu weSifundza usite kutsi imali lengu-R45 million isetsentiselwe loluhlelo lokuphila kwemphakathi, futsi imisebenti lebalulekile itawuqalwa ngelinyanga letandvulo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni lowawubanjelwe eHholo leMphakathi, iMeya yeManzini ikhulumile ngemcebo lofanele kumphakathi wonkhe webantfu labaphila kulelidolobha kanye nasemaphandleni. Lutfo lolubalulekile lolungatsi aluchazwa kahle nguye, ngumsebenti wekufaka amanzi lahlobile kulamakhaya langu-800 lasangakayitfoli insita yaloluhlobo. Tikhungo tekuphilisa letintja titawubakhelwa emiphakathini lemibili emaphandleni, lokutakwenta kubemnyandzisi kutsi bantfu bahambe ibanga lelifutfumine kuyofuna insita yekugula.

Emagcoleni aseSwatini, bantfu labanyenti sebabone kutsi kufundza kwabanye bantfwana kusagcina kunebunzima lobukhulu ngesizatfu sekusweleka kwetimphahla tekufundza. Tifundvo teNdlovukati tikhombisa kutsi ngaphezulu kwabantwana labayi-40 000 basafika esikolweni ngaphandle kwetincwadzi kanye netimphahla letidzingekako letifana netindvwangu tekufundza nebhuku. Hulumende webuzwe sewukhuphule imali lebekwe eceleni ngesinhloso yekusekelela ezikhungweni tekufundza letisemaphandleni lasekude, lapho bantfwana bavame kubhekana nebunzima bokufinyelela imfundvo lenemehluko. Ticwaningo letentiwe nguMnistri wetemfundvo tikhombisa futsi kutsi titfoli temfundvo tesifundza setintsaba tigcina zingakatfoli tinsita letilingene naletinikwa tifundza letisedvute nemadolobha lamakhulu.

Hulumende usekumemezele lisu lelitsha lekuthuthukisa imfundvo yalenkhaba yelive, leligcileta kakhulu ekwakheni tindlu tetimfundvo letinsha kanye nekubuyeketa letindza. Lisu leli licondziswe nguNgwenyama, kute bantfwana bese baphelelwa yimfundvo lencono ngenxa yekusweleka kwetinsita letifanele. Tinhlangano tebantfwana tetifundze letabikele kahle kutsi ngaphezulu kwemashumi lamatfatfu emakolishi ezifundazweni akanaphasindza lelelanele, lokuba nemtselela lobi esikhumulweni sebantfwana. Hulumende usekhiphe inkhomba yekutsi ungumtsatsa lisisombululo lesigcwele sekuphela kwemnyaka wekufundza lomusha, ngaloko betfuse leti tindlela kute tikwati kufaka bantfwana labantfu labatigcugcutela.

Emuva kwemhlangano lomkhulu lowabanjwa evikini lelidlulile eHholofa leNdvuna yeSifundza, tiphatsimandla tembudzuko tivumile kutsi tihlelo tekuphambilisa imisebenti yemapayipi emanti emaphandleni aseFunkwini nataseNhlanganos titawuqalwa ngekushesha. Labamphakathi labahluphekile ngenxa yekuntfola emanti lahlanta bebevele sebalamule ngemihla leminyenti, kepha manje kunekutfemba lokusha ekuphileni kwabo kwemihla ngemihla. Yonkhe imisebenti lemikhulu letawentiwa isifundza itawubandakanya tigceme tekusebenta temisebenti yeNdvuna yeSifundza, iMasipala nayo futsi yatsetseleka ngekunikezela ngalabo basebenti labatiwa kahle emsebentini wato.

Umphakathi wase-emalokishini nawo sewutsandza kufaka tifiso tawona ekhutisweni lolusha loluphutfumile lolwabiwa nguMnyango WeMabhizinisi eMhlabeni WeMalokishi. Ehlelo lelikhona manje, hulumende uhambe inyanga yonkhe ekhangela imifundvo yabantu leyehlukene, ayivumele kutsi ifike kulowo muntu lomdze kunakho konke. Tifundvo letitfolakalako tibalwa kulabo labahlala emaphandleni lasitfupha ngesikhatsi. Kumbe ngabe sinekusho? Hulumende weshiye licebo lelisha emasini lebekelwe kuhlanyelwa ngebusika, aphindze atsi emadubulwana ezikhungo temfundo atiwe ngebunyenti. Emunicipal-ini yaseNhlangano, umkhandlu ukhiphe sitatimende lesitoliwe ekhuluma ngalwati loluphelele ngokuguculwa kwamabhizinisi ayengela ngilondoleko.

Loku kubangela kutsi imikhakha yetilimo ihlale ngemumva, kantsi nemidvwebo yekudla yehlele kakhulu ezindaweni lasemakhaya. Hulumende weNingizimu Afrika sewubonile lenkinga, wase wethula tinkinga letifanele tiphendulwe ngekushesha ngetichibelo letintsha letijutshelwe kulekelela balimi labancane. Ngekwesikhundla sekunciphisa inombolo yalabagibeli betilimo, hulumende ufuna kukhulisa inombolo yemindeni lephila ngetilimo, kuhlinzeka netintfo tekusebenta kanye netimbuto letimcoka. Imiphakathi leyemukelé tinhla letiletfwa nguMnyango weTilimo itiphumelelise yakhela bupilo lobusha ngetilimo letinsha, letifaka ekhatsi ummbila, tinyanga, nawo-ayikhosi. Lemisebenti iphindze isite netindlela tekulima leticinile, letihlonipha imvelo ngetulu kwekuphilisa umhlaba wetilimo.

Lehlelo lekusita, lelabikwa nguNgqongqoshe weTindaba tasekhaya, selisebenta ngekushesha etigodzini letinyenti nalapho abantu bahlala khona ngekuhluphekezela. Emiphakathini leyo sekuphehla intsandvo lenkhulu, njengoba abahlali bakhombisa kutfokota ngesimemo lesite, futsi becelela kutsi lehlelo likhuliswe kuye nakuletigodzi letisasele. Kuhambisana naloku, iMkhandlu waseManzini ushicilele sitfatfwana sekubika lesetjengisako kutsi imigwaqo yasekhaya lengemuva emaphandleni izakwakhiwa busha ematsambo lamabili lasemuntfwini, kantsi nemitfombo yamanzi ilekelele kulungiswa kwaletinye tindawo. Lokunikelwa kwesevisi lekusebenta kahle kuvelele ngemuva kwekukhaliseka labekwentiwa yimiphakathi emhlangweni lowabe usendzaweni yetinhloko talapha ekhaya ngenyanga leyendlulile.

Emuva kwehlelo lokuhlangana lomphakathi lowabanjwa evikini leliphelile, kwalandza inkhulumomphendvulo lensha mayelana nemsebenti webhasi lowusemadolobheni. Tiphatsimandla talendawo tikhombise kutsi tisebentela kufaka emagagasi lamatfsha esikhundleni salawa laguga, futsi lotjelwa umphakathi ukuthi usebenti lona utawucinisekiswa ekupheleni kwenyanga lenkhulu leyetako. Bukhona betigaba tesimame kanye netinkhundla tebantfwana nako kufakiwe etigabeni letitawukhiwa emjovo laungakacali. Tindvuna temilamu tivumile tathi tiyasebenta ngekushesha kutsi tikhandle budzala betimphahla letedlulele hlandze, tivikele nako imphilo yemphakathi wonkhe ahlale kahle.

INhlangano yeMkhandlu yeNdvulo ibambe umhlangano omkhulu ngesonto lelidlule lapho itatamele khona tinhlelo letintsha tekuncita tinkhinga leto. Emhlanganweni lowawubitwa ngeNgci, iNdvulo ikhiphe sitatimende lesishito kutsi tilwimi tekusebentisa imali tekuphendvulela imikhakha yetindvulo titawusetjentiswa ngendlela lecondzile naphindze yalinganisiwe. Ikhomishana yekuhlela kutsi kunikezwa kanjani emasevisi emiphakathini itsatse sinqumo lesincomekile sekutsi ibhilidi lelinetingilazi elikhulu laseofisi liyakwakhiwa njengesivivane lesikhutazela umphakathi wonkhe. Kungakapheli tinyanga letintsatfu, umkhandlu wetsi utakwetama kucedza tikhukhula letibangela tonkhe tinkhinga kuto tonkhe tindlela letisetjentiswa ngumphakathi wetinze.

Hulumende wesive ukhiphe inhlelo entsha yokusekela abalimi labancane, inhlelo leyo lengagcugcutela kutfutsela kwephamukalembu emifundvweni yonkhe lenye neleyo. Ngemuva kwehlelo lokuhlangana nemiphakathi yasemagcekeni, tinkhundla letiningana tibone kutsi kuyimfuneko kunikela abalimi imishini yekulima kanye netimbewu letihle, njengobe kutfutselwa kwemkhiqizo kusemcoka kakhulu. Umnyango Wetekuphila Kwelive ubonakalise kutsi wetsembeka ekulwisaneni netikhalo tabalimi labancane, hhayi letamalishwa kulendlela. Inhlelo yekusekela emave ekulima ibalela lusito lwemali, imfundvo yetekuphila, kanye nemishini lemisha lesize abalimi bakhuphule umkhiqizo wetintfo letitfunyelwa tiye kwemanye emave.

Hulumende webhange laseSintu ukhiphe umbiko lokhombisa kutsi ngaphezulu kwabalimi balelive labangema-60% basebenta emhlabeni longakaphakanyiswa ngemtsetfo wemnyaka lowedlulile. Lenhlangano yemveliso yinesikhungo lesisha lekuSithobeni, lapho abalimi bafundiswa khona ngetindlela tesimanjemanje tekuhlanyela kanye nekugcina umhlaba unesimilo. Sikhungo lesi sivule eminyango yaso evulekile kubantfu bonkhe labahlala kulelive, ikakhulukati labasemaphandleni labancamela kuphucula imiphumela yemklamo wabo wesimo sokuphila. Hulumende ubenesihlelo sekusita labalimi labancane ngemtsetfoshisekelo lomtsetfo wakamuva lohlanganisa nkece lengetele nguR200 yigidi, lekhetselwe kukhulisa imveliso yematsanga, yembatata, kanye neyemabhontjisi emifundazweni lemisha.

Ekhuluma emhlanganweni lomphakathi lowawubanjelwe eNhlambelo, iNdvuna yeSifundza ibeke licace kutsi imali leyo izosetjentiswa ekwakheni tindlela, ekulungiseni tiphelo tamanzi, kanye nasekukhanyiseni tindlela temadolobha. Ihlelo leli selibhaliswe ngokusemtsetfweni njengengcenye yenhlelo yenkhani yeNational Development Plan, futsi uhulumeni wazisa kutsi ukusetjentiswa kwemali kuzoniketwa phansi emabhansini labekiwe ngoMarch unyaka losemkhatsini. Sifundza lesinelibanga leliphakeme lekusweleka kwemisebenti nalesinekushoda kwezinsiza tikakhokho-mholo, sikhombise kutsi emaphrojekthi lamasha atoba nemtselela lomkhulu ekukhuliseni inhlalo yabantu.

Iphrojekthi letikhulu letekugcwalisa imigodzi yemigwaco kanye nekufaka emanti lahlanta kuhle seyicelwa nguMasipala waseKwaDukuza, kani imali lehlongotwako yakhona ifinyelela ku-R42 miliyoni. Abasebenzi bephrojekthi batloliswe lapha ekhaya, kuhloswa ngalokho kuniketa emtsetfweni bahlali lababobonkhe letifundzweni kuze batfole imisebenti lecinile kanye naletinye tintfo letibalulekile. Emakomiti emiphakathi asebentise imasipala nguloyo wavuma kutsi tikhalo tabahlali tatikudzingeka kukuphangisa ngemva kweminyaka lemibili yekugcugcutela. Umhlangana webhodi wemphakathi lotele embili emasontweni lamabili agcile wabeka sikhatsi sekuphelela kwalelinye nyaka njengelilelo lekuqedza lonkhe lusiko lwekuya ematapwini ngetinyawo takakhulu.

Lomkhandlu usememetele kutsi umsebenzi lowo utawuqala ngekucindzeleka kwenyanga yeSikhombisa, futsi utawuphela ngekuphela kwemnyaka wali-2025. Abahlali labanyenti bafike bashayakalela ngekusweleka kwemanti lacolekile, ikakhulukati kulabo labahlala emakhaya lahlabeka libele ngesimangalo leso. Tinhloko tetindlu tasemakhaya tikhulume ngekushesha, tifinyelele eMkhandlwini ngetikhalo tekutsi izingxabo temapayipi lidzala tivimba kuhambiseka kwemanti kahle emalokishini lashiywe emuva. Ngemuva kwemichibiyelo leyentiwa tichwepheshe tetindzawo letehlukene, kuvele bucala kutsi imigwaqo leyehlukene leli-47 iyatfola lomsebenzi wekuhlela kabusha ngekuphutfuma. Lomkhandlu uphumele embili usekhuluma ngalomsebenzi, usho kutsi imali lesikhombisa wemiliyoni yemalangeni iseniketwe kulomsebenzi ngekufanele.

Umkhandlu webantfu wase-Mbabane sewukhiphe sitatimende lesitsi umsebenzi wekuphindvela tindlela temanzi utawuqala ngekushesha nje. Umkhandlu lowatiwa ngekusebenta kahle sewulungiselele imali yenkhulungwane yemaMalangeni langangetimphahla nabasebenzi labadzingekako kulomsebenyi. Emuva kwemhlangano lowentelwa ngenyanga leyadlulile, bantfu labamele imiphakathi yabo bavumisana nelisiko lokutsi kufanele kukhishwe imibiko yentfutfuko njalo emuva kwezinyanga letintsatfu. Tindvuna letiphatseke ekuphatiweni kwetindlela talo lonkhe lodvelo tikhombise kutitama kwato emsebentini lowembulwa nguLodvelo. Ngaphandle kwaleyo nkambiso, abalimi kanye nalabafuya tilwane etigodzini letisedvute kuba naletinhlupheko letikhulu ngesikhatsi sihlasela esomiso.

Hulumende ubeke eceleni imali lenkhulu ngemgomo wekukhulisa ekulimeni, lekuhlose kusita abalimi labancane kutsi bakhulise imivuno yawo ngendlela lebonakala kahle. Lomgomo ubandakanya kusimamisa umhlaba wemapulazi kanye nekupha abalimi tinhlanyelo letingesabi tibetse letivamile, lokutawubasita kutsi bakhiqize kudla lokuningi emasimini abo. Ngaphandle kwaloko, kukhona nehlelo lekuqeqeshwa kwalabalimi, lapho bafundiswa khona tindlela tekulima letisha letisebentisa machimu lasemandzisi kanye nekugcina indzawo yomhlaba iphilile sikhashana lesidze. Emiphakathini leminyenti, bafati bangena ngekugcwele kuletihlelo, babonakalisa kutsi bakhona kulima ngemandla kanye nebuhlakani lobukhulu.

Umkhosi lona bewuhanyelwa ngabantu labaphuma kutikhungo letahlukene tesifundza, kufaka ekhatsi labadvala, batjoli, kanye netingcondvo letisebentela tive letahlukene. Ekhuluma embikwemgomo wetigcoko, inkhosi yalendzawo yakhuluma ngentfo yelusito lwemasiko, yaphindze yagcizelela kutsi tikhatsi tekutiphatsela kahle tinyanga yetamasiko kufanele tihlonishwe ngulowo nalowo emphakathi. Tigcoko temasiko letahlukene tatentwa nguletihle letabuka, tafaka ekhatsi imigcemelo yemahewu kanye nemidlalo yetamasiko leyabita emehlo alabo bonkhe ababekhona emphakathini wonkhe. Sabelo sekulima, semphilo, kanye netekuchumana sona futsi sanikwa tigele letitsite tebantfu labehlangana laphaya, ngobe kwehluleka kwekumiswa kwetindlela temphilo lefanele kuyinselelo lenkhulu esifundazweni.

Abahlali baleso sigodzi sebakhuluma ngalokucacile ngekuhlushwa kwabo yikulala emnyameni iminyaka leminingi, baphikelela kutsi tikhuleko tabo tigcine tibhekiwe nguHulumende. Ikhomishini letekhnolojiyelikhona liphakamise kutsi kufanele kusetjentiswe emandla elilanga njengendlela yekusita imiphakathi leseduze nemaphakelo emandla. Umnyango wama-R200 million lobekwe eceleni nguHulumende wase-Eswatini lowasabalalisiwa ngemaphephandaba liphakamise lo-mprojekhi emazingeni labitfwa ngelitjeni. Ngaloku, tigodzi letingema-17 letisadinga ugesi tilandzela luhlelo lokuhleleka lolusanda kuguculwa nguNgwenyama kanye neMphumeleli yeLizwe.

Umkhandlu weSifundza weMkhondo uwumemezele ngaloku emhlanganweni lowawubanjelwe eviki ledlule eKwaMhlanga, lapho iNdvuna yeNkhundla ibibhekene nabameleli bemiphakathi yonkhe lenkhundla. Ngemuva kweminyaka lemibili yekucela kanye nekukhulumela likusasa labantwana babo, abahlali batsi batikhululile kwekucabanga kutsi imisebenti lemihle ingazofika ngempela. Kulungiselela lomklamo lomkhulu, umbuso wetfule imali lefinyelela ku-R48 wemiliyoni, lenganyelwe nguMnyango Wetimphilo Temvelo kanye neleManzi, kuze kufakwe tindlela temanzi letintsha futsi tibuyiswe letindvuna letindze emaphandleni lahlukene. Leli tsiya lelibalulekile litawufaka emitholampilo, ticolo, nemakhaya lamakhulu lalinganiselwa ku-1 200 evela eNhlangano kuya eMazini naseNkomati.

Lomhlangano, lowawubanjelwe ngeledza leSabelo, wawuhandzwa ngema-500 emadvodza nalabantu besifazane, labaphuma kuletindzawo letahlukene telive. Bukhona baletibhedlela temphilo, tifundza temfundvo, kanye netiphatsimandla talombuso bekukhona, bekubona bona bonkhe basebenta ndzawonye ekufudziseni inhlalakahle yabantu. Ingucuko yalomcimbi yabonakala ngelibomu, ngobe bantfu labadzala labanemlando wematfuba lamaningi nakambe benelela ngekusho kwabo emsebentini wekwakha live. Letinkhehle temasiko naletinhle tetindlela temvelo tekuphila kwaSwaziland tabanjelwa ekukhanyiseleni tsine tonkhe ngaleyo nsuku. Emalunga emiphakathi azimisele ekusebentisaneni netiphatsimandla ngekwakha tindzawo letinhle naletikhulumako kubo bonkhe bantfu.

Hulumende weSive uyanakile lendzaba, futsi usekeluleke tinhlelo letintfsha tekweseka abalimi lababalelwa kutigidzi letimbili kuleli nyaka wemali. Lenhlelo ibandakanya kuniketwa kwembewu lenhle, kuniketwa kwemtfombo wekuphusha emanti endzaweni yekutsala, kanye nekutsatfwa kwetinhlelo tekufundzisa balimi ngeticucu tekutsala lasetulu. Tifundza letifana neLubombo kanye neHhohho tivele titfole lusu lwekusetsa tinhlitiyo tabo, njengoba kahulumende usekelele timphahla tekutsala ekunyakeni kweminyaka lemibili leyendlulile. Umnyango Wetekutsala kanye neTekutfutfukisa Emaphandleni ususandzise nemibango yakhe, njengoba sekube nemibiko levela kuHulumende lotsi imiphumela iyabonakala emagcekeni abalimi labancane.

Hulumende webantfu ukhiphe inhlelo yekusekela emalimin labehluleka kukhokhela imali yemikhiqizo nekutenga imbewu lenesigqi. Ngalenhlelo, abalimi labangaphansi kwelizinga lekuphila lamisiwe batawutfola lusita lwembewu, lomanyelo, kanye netindlela tekusebenta emasimini ngaphandle kwekukhokha imali manje. Inhlela yekusetjentiswa kwemhlaba leyenziwe nguHulumende ibeka sigcifo kutsatsa emasimi lamalele ngelita kose emkhakha wemindzi, kuze kutsite imindzi yonkhe itfole indzawo yekutsala tikhonkwane tekudla. Umkhankaso lowentiwako ungatsatsa inyanga letintsatfu, bese kubikwa kwekwenziwa kwako emphakathini ngekucacile.

Lendlela yekuhlinzeka emanti kumphakathi itsite nekunganakwa lokukhulu nguHulumende weNdlovukazi, ngakho-ke emakhansela langena emhlanganweni we-Ward Committee ngesonto leledlule asekhulumile ngalomkhandlu losemusweni. Kuphendula inhlalo yetikhalo letifike kuMasipala, inhloko yetimphahla tase-Manzini City Council ikhulumile ngekuphekelelana kwalawo mabanga labalulekile. Imibono yemphakathi ikhombisile kutsi tingoti tekuhlinzekwa ngamanzi tikhula nsuku zonke, ngakho-ke tinhlaka tebese-infrastructure kumele tivuselelwe ngaphambi kwekutsi unyaka lomutsa ufike. Hulumende weSifundza seManzini ushicilele sibhengezo lokutsi imali yemali-mboleko yekuphashwa kwemibhobho emisha iyelekelelwa nguMkhandlu weNdlovukazi.

Lehlelo lentsela basemphakathi ngekubapha tigciwane tetigulane letibalulekile, kubandakanya netigciwane telufuba nemakhaza. Emaphandleni lasekhatsi, bantfu labanyenti bebengakakwati kutfola lusito lwemphawo yemphilo ngebhekwa kwetindlela letifile kanye netinkinga temali. Ngetfuba lelikhona manje, hulumende ukhuthaza bonkhe labo labadze iminyaka lengema-18 kutsi bete emalokishini lalangatelelwe banikwe lusito lolufanele. Tigcwaneti tetindzawo tabika kutsi labochwepheshe bemphawo yemphilo sebente umsebenzi lomuhle ngekusebentela imiphakathi leseduze nebonkhe bafana nabalobokwe. Ekhuluma emsebentini lowentiwa ngaleli sonto, sikhulumeli sehhovisi leliphetswe nguMfundvo waNgcondvo weMiphilo wakhulumela ngalobukukhulu behlelo lekupha umphakathi emandla ekucaphela tinhlupho tekugula.

Emuva kwemihlangano leyabanjwa emadolobheni lamabili lakhulu evikini leledlulile, kuye kwacaca kutsi baphetse bemine ngemsebenti wekuhlela kabusha tindlela tekulethwa kwemanti emalokishini lagcwele bantfu. Baphati bemunicipal sebachiте kutsi tindlela tekusebenta letidze tiphele, bese kusetjentiswa tinhlelo letisha letingakukhipha leyo ngcuphe yekushoda kwemanti. Umbuso wemmango utsite kutsi imali lehlelwe lendaba iyatfolakala, ngani kutsi kubalulekile kutsi bafika bantfu basekhaya ngaphambi kwelilanga lekuphela kwekuhlela kwemali yalonyaka. Emaphandleni lapho bafike bakhona labanye bema-Councillor, bantfu babonakalise injabulo ngale ndzaba, kodvwa babeka nasemibutweni leyatiwa ngemalanga lamanyenti.

Umkhakha wekulima usabambe indzima lenkhulu ekuphileni kwemphakathi wetfu, ngobe abantu labangaphezulu kwemashumi lasikhombisa enkhulungwane baseSwatini baphila ekufuyeni nasekutsangwa kwemhlaba. Ngemuva kwehlelo lekusita balimi labancane, liHulumende selibetse ematfuba lamaningi ekutsi intsambeko yekulima ikhule ngendlela lebonakala ekuphileni kwemphakathi. Lehlelo lihlose kutfutfukisa kwemhlaba wasemaphandleni ngekupha balimi licebo lelisebentako, kanye netjebo tebulimo letingasita ekukhuliseni imivuno yawo. Abalimi labatfola lusito lwale nhlangano sebabone intfutfuko lenkhulu ekulimeni kwemindeni yabo yonkhe, futsi bangabonakali bashiyelwe emuva njengalokubekiwe nguMnyango Wetekufuyela.

Tinhlelo leti tikhombise indlela lehle yokusita abalimi kutsi batsatse indzima enkulu ekusunguleni emabhizinisi akulima lamatimbili. Hulumende waseSwatini ukhiphe imali lengetulu kwemalilangeni latsatfu ema-bhiliyoni ukuze asekele letinhlelo tekuthuthukiswa kwelimo futsi asite abalimi labancane ekuthenga tilandzelo temidvwebo nemishini yekulima. Ngelesikhathi saloku, iMnyango Wetimo Nekutfukula Emaphandleni ukhombise kutsi kuyimcoka kutsi bafuyi nalabalimi bemidvwebo batfole umsebenzi wekuceceshwa ngalokukahle. Tikhungo tekufundzisa letisebenta emadutsini nasemagabheni temaphandleni setisite ema-5 000 abalimi kutsi bakhone kusebentisa tinzindza lanetindzima tekusita tikhula tabo.

Uhulumende waseSwatini kanye nalahulumende baletindzawo baseSwatini bakhiphele phambili sichibiyelo lesisha sekulima lesinentfutfuko yengeziwe, lesicondzise ekuphakamisa imikhiqizo yalabalimi labancane emaphandleni. Sichibiyelo lesi sifaka ekhatsi nekusebentela abalimi tihlangano temali letancusa ekutsengeleni imbewu kanye nemishanguzo yekuvikela tinhlanyelo. Ngekusebentisana nalabaholi bemiphakathi, tiphiko tenhlanganiso yekulima ticondzise ekufundzisa abalimi ngetindlela tesimanje tekulima, letinika inzuzo lenkhulu kunanakho lababekhiqita ngaphambilini. Buningi babalimi labaphendvula kulesi sichibiyelo ngemibono lemihle, betfola litsemba lekutsi imphilo yabo itawuchumana ngemsa wetikhathi letita.

Umncintiswano lokhiwe nguSifundza seNhlangano bewungeniswe nguHulumende wasifundzazwe, futsi bewuhlanganisa ticumbi letinengi letisuka kuyo yonkhe indzawo yesifundza. Bagijimi, titjentjele, kanye netintfombi letifaka indzalo yemlandvo babehlangene kulelichweba bekhombisa ngekutikhukhumeta intsandvo yabo ngamasiko netigaba takukhulisa umphakathi wabo. Ngemuva kwemsangano lowengamele imikhosi, uNkhosi lomunye wabasekela bakhe wabiwa kukhuluma kubahlali naletimphilo talobogogo lebasekuphileni. Ngekwentela kubabonga labadzala labanikele kakhulu emsebentini wekwakha imiphakathi, hulumende uphendvule ngekunikela ngemaketelo ekudla netigwegwe letingelwa ngumsebentini.

Hulumende ulandzele lolukhuni lolubhekene nabalimi laba ngekwethula uhlelo lwekunakekelwa kwemhlaba kanye nekusekela ekulimeni, kuhlose kutsi kukhiqitwa kwekudla kunyuke ngesilinganiso lesingcono. Uhlelo lolu luhlanganisa kusabela kwesidingo sendzawo yemapulazi, kuhlinzekwa kwetjalo letinhle, kanye nekufundziswa kwebalimi ngendlela yekulima lehloniphela imvelo. Sikhuluma ngakho, Umphathiswa Wendlela Yokuphucula Imiphakathi Yasemagcekeni uphawule kutsi luhulumende luyibona ingcindvo lefaka onkhe emakaya asemaphandleni, ngakho-ke umsebenzi waloluhlelo kufanele ufike kubo bonkhe. Tingane letisafundza, labadala, nabashadikazi labafelwe bonkhe kumele batfole inzuzo kuloluhlelo lwekusekelwa kwemaphasi ekudla.

Hulumende weSwatini sewungenile nge-emsebentini lotsite wokusita labafuyi kanye nebafeli labancane, ugadzele letinsimu kanye nematje emhlaba labangakasebentisi ngebufanele. Sikhungo sekulima lesisha sase-Lubombo sesivulile eminyango yaso kubo bonke labo labafunana nolwati nangetelikhemikhali letingatisita ngekukhula kwensimu nangase sikhatsini lesishisiwe kanye nasesikhatsini semvula. Kulwati lokusetjentiswa kwemhlaba kuyindlela lebalulekile ekusiteni labafuyi kutsi bente tihlelo tetinsimu tawo ngulunye ngulunye nangekwemhlaba lokhona. Hulumende sewukhiphe maphakela etimbewu letinsha kanye nentinyoni letifuyelwako kubafeli labancane kuleta leyo nleyo khandza neyisifundze.

Inhlangano yeLikhuba neMikhiqizo ilwela kutsi labafuyi baletindzawo batfole lusito loluphelele, kuhlanganisa imbewu lehlolwe kahle kanye nemitfombo yekucwayiswa ngekufuya ngendlela lemukelekile. Hulumende wesifundza ugcizelela kutsi ukwenziwa kwemhlaba wetimphahla tekukhiqiza kufanele kulandele nhlelo lebhalwe ngulabo labatiwa ekuphathweni kwemhlaba. Loluhlelo lolusha lolumenyetiwe nguMnyango Wetekufuywa Kwetilwane kanye Nekulima luhlose kufinyelela emindeni lemakhulu lamabili ngemva kweminyaka lemibili. Abalimi labaningi babika kutsi babhekana nenselelo yetemhlaba longacondzakali kahle, futsi lesimo siyathikameta imizamo yabo yekukhiqita kudla lokwanele. Ngaphandle kwekwatsatfwa kwanhlelo tekuhlinzeka ngekucosha tilimo, ticumbi letinjalo tiyawuhlala tibhekene nembili lengazwakali.

INdvuna yeSifundza ikhiphe sitatimende lesibalulekile, itsi hulumende wetifundza uzimisele ngekuqeda lonkhe luhlupheko lokuswelakala kwamanzi ngaphambi kwekuphela kwalo nyaka wezimali. Loluhlelo lokuniketwa kwamanzi lufaka ekhatsi kwakhiwa kwetindzawo tetibuko letinsha, kanye nekubekwa kwemapayipi lamaningi emitini lemikhulu nasemakhaya lamancane. Tiphatsimandla tebhodi lelikhetha tichaze kutsi imali lengangemiliyoni lemine yerandi isetjentiselwe loluhlelo, futsi umsebenzi wetekwakha usuqalile ngaleli sonto. Ekhuluma kuhlangano lomphakathi lowabanjwa eTown Hall eNhlangano, inkhosi yendvuna itsite abahlali kufanele batise boke imibuzo nemibiko ngetibhuko lekukhontelwa kwalesisevisi.

Urhulumente wasekhaya uthi iinkqubo zokulungisa imibhobho emidala ziyaqhubeka, ngelixa amaqela ezobunjineli esebenza ubusuku nemini ukuqinisekisa ukuba amanzi abuyiselwa ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa kamasipala athi le ngxaki ibangelwe kukudodobala kwezixhobo ezindala kunye nokunyuka kwemfuno yabemi. Abahlali bacelwa ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngobulumko ngexesha lokulungiswa, kwaye iinkonzo zokuhambisa amanzi ngeetanki ziyaqhubeka kwiindawo ezichaphazelekayo. Urhulumente uthe uza kuqhubeka nokunxibelelana noluntu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho mntu ushiywa ngaphandle kweziseko ezibalulekileyo. Amanyathelo okuqinisekisa uzinzo lwamanzi aqaliswe kwiiveki ezidlulileyo kwaye kulindeleke ukuba anike iziphumo ezibonakalayo kwiinyanga ezizayo.

Kwisigqibo esitsha esibhengezwe kwintlanganiso kawonke-wonke, urhulumente uchaze utshintsho kwimigaqo yokuhanjiswa kweenkonzo zoluntu ukuze kuphuculwe ukusebenza kwamasebe kamasipala. Esi sigqibo sijolise ekunciphiseni ukulibaziseka ekunikezelweni kweenkonzo ezifana nokuqokelelwa kwenkunkuma, ukulungiswa kweendlela, kunye nokuphendula izikhalazo zabemi. Abaphathi bathi iinkqubo ezintsha ziya kusebenzisa indlela edityanisiweyo yokulandelela izikhalazo ukuze kuqinisekiswe uxanduva olungcono. Uluntu lukhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zoluntu ukuze lunike izimvo zalo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iza kunceda ekwakheni ukuthembana phakathi kwabemi namasebe olawulo lwasekhaya, ngelixa kusomelezwa ukusebenza ngokufanelekileyo kweziseko zenkonzo.

Izitalato ezininzi ezisemaphandleni zedolophu yaseGqeberha zifumene inkqubo entsha yokulungiswa kweendlela emva kokuba abemi bechaze ukonakala okukhulu okubangele ubunzima bokuhamba. Umasipala uthi amaqela okwakha asele eqalile ukugcwalisa imingxunya kunye nokuphucula iindlela eziphambili ezisetyenziswa mihla le. Le projekthi ijolise ekuphuculeni ukhuseleko lwabahambi ngeenyawo kunye nezithuthi, ngakumbi kwiindawo ezixakekileyo. Abahlali bavakalise ulwaneliseko oluthile kodwa bacela ukuba umsebenzi ugqitywe ngokukhawuleza ukuze kuthintelwe ukuxinana kwezimoto. Amagosa athi kukho ucwangciso olucacileyo lokuqinisekisa ukuba zonke iindawo ezichaphazelekayo ziyafikelelwa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka.

Abahlali banikwe ithuba lokuveza izikhalazo zabo malunga nokungabikho kwezibane ezitalatweni kunye nokulibaziseka kokuqokelelwa kwenkunkuma. Amagosa kamasipala athe aqinisekisa ukuba ezi ngxaki ziya kufakwa phambili kwinkqubo yohlahlo lwabiwo-mali lwonyaka ozayo. Le ntlanganiso ikwajolise ekomelezeni intsebenziswano phakathi koluntu norhulumente wasekhaya. Abathathi-nxaxheba baceliwe ukuba baqhubeke nokubika iingxaki ukuze kuphuculwe iinkonzo.

Ezi projekthi zibandakanya ukwakhiwa kwezikolo ezintsha, ukuphuculwa kwezibhedlele, kunye nokwandiswa kweenkonzo zamanzi. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso esibanzi sokunciphisa intswela-ngqesho kunye nokuphucula umgangatho wobomi. Uluntu lukhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba kwiinkqubo zokuqeqeshwa ezikhoyo ukuze lufumane izakhono ezintsha.

Le nkqubo iza kusebenzisa iishedyuli ezintsha kunye nezithuthi ezongeziweyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba inkunkuma iqokelelwa ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Amagosa athi le ndlela iza kunciphisa ukugcwala kweendawo zokulahla inkunkuma kunye nokuphucula ucoceko lwesixeko. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba basebenzisane namagosa ngokugcina inkunkuma kwiindawo ezichongiweyo. Urhulumente wasekhaya uthe uza kuqhubeka nokubeka iliso ukuze kuqinisekiswe impumelelo yale nkqubo.

Amapolisa asekuhlaleni athe aqinisa ukugada kwiindawo ezichaphazelekayo kwaye aqhuba iiprojekthi zokubambisana noluntu ukuze kuncitshiswe ulwaphulomthetho. Iinkokeli zoluntu zikhuthaza abemi ukuba basebenzisane namapolisa ngokunika ulwazi olufanelekileyo. Urhulumente uthi izicwangciso ezongezelelweyo zokuphucula ukhuseleko loluntu zisemsebenzini kwaye ziya kubandakanya ukwandisa ukukhanya kwezitalato kunye neekhamera zokubeka iliso.

Urhulumente wesizwe ubhengeze inkqubo entsha yokuphucula ukufikelela kwizibonelelo zoluntu kwiindawo ezisemaphandleni, ejolise ekuncedeni iintsapho ezihlala kude nezixeko ezikhulu. Le nkqubo iza kubandakanya ukwakhiwa kweendawo zokusebenza ezisondeleyo, kunye nokuphuculwa kweendlela zonxibelelwano. Amagosa athi oku kuya kunciphisa umthwalo wokuhamba kwabemi kwaye kuphucule ukufikelela kwiinkonzo ezibalulekileyo. Uluntu lukhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba ekubhaliseni iinkqubo ezintsha ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba bonke abafanelekileyo bayazuza.

Izibane ezitalatweni kwiindawo ezininzi zaseMthatha sele ziqalisiwe ukulungiswa emva kwezikhalazo zabahlali malunga nokwanda kweengozi ebusuku. Umasipala uthi amaqela asebenzayo asele etshintshe izibane ezindala kwaye afaka ezintsha ezonga amandla. Le projekthi ijolise ekuphuculeni ukhuseleko kunye nokunciphisa ukusetyenziswa kombane ngokungafanelekanga. Abahlali bavakalise ulwaneliseko kwaye bacela ukuba umsebenzi wandiswe nakwezinye iindawo ezingekachaphazeleki. Umasipala uthi uya kuqhubeka nokulandelela imeko ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba zonke iindawo zifumana inkonzo efanelekileyo.

Ngexesha lentlanganiso yophuhliso lwasekuhlaleni, abahlali kunye namagosa kamasipala bavumelene ngokuseka amaqela asebenzayo ajolise ekuphuculeni iinkonzo zenkunkuma, amanzi, kunye neendlela.
