Ezi qela ziya kusebenza njengonxibelelwano phakathi koluntu norhulumente ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iingxaki zisonjululwa ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa athi le ndlela iza kunceda ekwandiseni uxanduva kunye nokuphendula ngokukhawuleza kwizikhalazo. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba bathathe inxaxheba ngokuzimisela ukuze kuqinisekiswe impumelelo yale nkqubo yentsebenziswano.

Umasipala uthi izisebenzi zawo sezithunyelwe ngokushesha ukuze zilungise le nkinga eqale ngesonto eledlule ngesikhathi kuqhuma ipayipi elidala elalisesimweni esibi. Abahlali batshelwe ukuthi basebenzise amanzi ngokonga ngesikhathi kulungiswa lo monakalo ukuze kugwenywe ukushoda okukhulu. Amaqembu ezobuchwepheshe asebenza ubusuku nemini ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amanzi abuyela ngokushesha emakhaya abantu. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi le nkinga igqamisa isidingo sokuvuselelwa kwengqalasizinda yamanzi ezindaweni eziningi. Umasipala uphinde wathi kuzokwethulwa uhlelo olusha lokuhlola njalo imigqa yamanzi ukuze kugwenywe ukuphinda kwenzeke izigameko ezifana nalezi esikhathini esizayo.

Emhlanganweni obusePitoli, uhulumeni umemezele uhlelo olusha lokwandisa amathuba emisebenzi entsheni ezweni lonke ngokugxila ekuqeqeshweni kwamakhono asemqoka ezimbonini ezikhulayo. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa izinga eliphezulu lokuntuleka kwemisebenzi ngokunikeza abantu abasha amathuba okufunda nokusebenza ngesikhathi esisodwa. Izikhulu zikahulumeni zithi izinkampani ezizimele zizobambisana nohulumeni ukuze kuqeqeshwe abafundi ezindaweni zokusebenza zangempela. Abahlanganyeli balolu hlelo bazothola amathuba okuthola ulwazi olujulile emikhakheni efana nezobuchwepheshe, ezokwakha kanye nezinsiza zomphakathi. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuzokwakha umnotho oqinile ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.

Le nhlangano ibihlose ukuxoxa ngentuthuko kanye nezinkinga ezibhekene nomphakathi nsuku zonke. Abamele umasipala bachaze ukuthi kunezinkinga zokushoda kwemishini kanye nesabelomali esilinganiselwe esithinta ijubane lokusebenza. Abantu abebekhona bacele ukuthi kube nokuphendula okusheshayo kanye nokwethulwa kohlelo lokuxhumana olucacile phakathi komasipala nomphakathi. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthe uzobeka phambili lezi zinkinga ezinhlelweni zawo ezilandelayo zokuthuthukisa izindawo zasemadolobheni. Abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokubambisana ukuze izinsiza zifinyeleleke ngokulinganayo kubo bonke abantu abahlala kule ndawo.

Emadolobheni amancane aseMpumalanga Kapa kuqale uhlelo olusha lokulungisa izibani zomgwaqo ezilimele ezindaweni eziningi ezibikwe njengezimnyama ebusuku. Umasipala uthi le projekthi izogxila ezindaweni ezinengozi ephezulu ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuphepha kwabantu abahamba ebusuku. Izisebenzi zikamasipala sezivele zishintshe izibani ezindala zafaka ezintsha ezonga ugesi futhi ezisebenza isikhathi eside. Abahlali baveze injabulo ngokuthi lokhu kuzonciphisa ubugebengu obuvame ukwenzeka ebumnyameni. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi le misebenzi izoqhubeka kuze kube zonke izindawo ezithintekile sezilungisiwe. Abantu bacele ukuthi kunwetshwe lolu hlelo lufinyelele nakwezinye izindawo ezisemakhaya ukuze kuphuculwe izinga lokuphepha kuzwelonke.

Uhulumeni umemezele izinguquko ezintsha kunqubomgomo yokuhlinzekwa kwezindlu zomphakathi ngenhloso yokusheshisa inqubo yokuthola izindlu kubantu abadinga usizo. Le nqubomgomo entsha izogxila ekunciphiseni ukubambezeleka nasekukhuphuleni ukubeka phambili imindeni esengozini enkulu. Izikhulu zithi kuzokwenziwa uhlelo olusha lokubhalisa oluzoba sobala futhi olulula ukulusebenzisa ukuze kugwenywe ukungahleleki. Abantu abamukele izindlu zomphakathi bazocelwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekuhlolweni kwenqubomgomo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza kwayo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yokuzibophezela ekwakheni imiphakathi ehlala kahle nenokulingana. Abaholi bomphakathi bakubonge lokhu kodwa bagcizelela isidingo sokuqapha ukuqaliswa kwalolu hlelo ukuze kuzuze abantu abahlosiwe.

Lezi zinhlelo zibandakanya ukwakhiwa kwemigwaqo emisha, ukulungiswa kwezibhedlela kanye nokwandiswa kwezikhungo zemfundo. Uhulumeni uthi le misebenzi ihlose ukwakha amathuba emisebenzi nokukhuthaza ukukhula komnotho. Izikhulu zithi izifunda eziningi sezivele zibona izinguquko ezibonakalayo ngenxa yalezi zinhlelo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekuqashweni kwezinhlelo zokuqeqeshwa ezihambisana nale misebenzi. Uhulumeni uthi uzoqhubeka nokubeka phambili ukuthuthukiswa kwezindawo zasemakhaya ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi intuthuko ifinyelela kubo bonke abantu ngokulinganayo.

Lezi zinhlelo zihlose ukunciphisa ubugebengu ngokwandisa ukubambisana phakathi kwabahlali nabomthetho. Abaholi bomphakathi bathi ukubika izigameko ngesikhathi kusiza kakhulu ekuthathweni kwezinyathelo ezisheshayo. Uhulumeni uthi izinhlelo zokukhanyisa imigwaqo nokufaka amakhamera ezindaweni ezithile sezivele ziqalisiwe. Abantu bakhuthazwa ukuthi bangesabi ukubika izenzo ezingekho emthethweni ukuze kuvikelwe imiphakathi yabo. Le ndlela entsha yokubambisana ibhekwa njengendlela ebalulekile yokwakha ukuphepha okuhlala isikhathi eside.

Izinkinga zokugcwala kukadoti ezindaweni ezithile zaseKhayelitsha seziqalile ukubhekwana nazo ngohlelo olusha lokuqoqwa kwenkunkuma olumenyezelwe umasipala. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukwandisa imvamisa yokuqoqwa kukadoti kanye nokusebenzisa izimoto ezintsha ezithuthukisiwe. Abaholi bakamasipala bathi lokhu kuzonciphisa izingozi zezempilo ezibangelwa udoti onqwabelene. Abahlali bacele ukuthi kube nokulandelela okuqhubekayo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi uhlelo lusebenza kahle. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi uzosebenzisana nemiphakathi ukuze kufundiswe abantu ngokuphathwa kahle kukadoti. Le misebenzi ihlose ukwakha izindawo ezihlanzekile nezihlala kahle kubo bonke abantu.

Uhulumeni wesifundazwe umemezele uhlelo lokukhulisa ukufinyelela ezinsizeni zomphakathi ezindaweni ezisemakhaya ezikude nezikhungo ezinkulu. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuletha izinsiza ezibalulekile ezifana nezempilo, imfundo kanye namathuba okuqeqeshwa eduze kwabantu. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuzonciphisa isidingo sokuhamba amabanga amade ukuze kutholakale usizo. Abaholi bomphakathi bamukele kahle lezi zinhlelo kodwa bacele ukuthi kuqinisekiswe ukuthi zifinyelela ngokulinganayo kubo bonke abantu. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nemikhandlu yendawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuqaliswa okuphumelelayo kwalolu hlelo ezweni lonke.

Ngaphakathi kwesu elisha likazwelonke lokuthuthukisa ezemfundo, uhulumeni uthi uzogxila ekuthuthukiseni izikole zasemiphakathini entulayo ngokunikeza izinsiza ezengeziwe kanye nokuqeqeshwa kothisha. Le nqubomgomo ihlose ukunciphisa umehluko phakathi kwezikole ezisemadolobheni nezasemakhaya. Izikhulu zithi izinhlelo zokuhlola ukusebenza kwezikole zizothuthukiswa ukuze kuqinisekiswe ikhwalithi yemfundo. Abazali nabafundi bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuthuthukisa imfundo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokwakha ikusasa eliqinile lezwe ngokutshala imali emfundweni yabantu abasha.

Umasipala kanye nezinkampani zikagesi basebenzisana ukuze kubuyiselwe ugesi ngokushesha emakhaya athintekile. Izisebenzi zobunjiniyela zisebenza ubusuku nemini ukulungisa izingxenye ezilimele ukuze kugwenywe ukulibaziseka okukhulu. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba basebenzise ugesi ngokonga uma usubuyile ukuze kugwenywe ukugcwala ngokweqile kwenethiwekhi. Uhulumeni uthi le nkinga igqamisa isidingo sokutshalwa kwemali engeziwe ekuvuseleleni ingqalasizinda kagesi ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Izinhlelo zokuvikela imigqa kagesi ezimweni zesimo sezulu esibi sezibekiwe njengengxenye yohlelo lwesikhathi eside lokuthuthukisa ukuqina kwengqalasizinda.

Emadolobheni ase-Eastern Cape kuqale uhlelo olusha lokulungisa imigwaqo emikhulu eyonakele kakhulu ebangele izingozi eziningi ezinyangeni ezedlule. Umasipala uthi le projekthi igxile emigwaqweni exhumanisa izindawo ezisemqoka zomnotho kanye nezikhungo zomphakathi. Amaqembu okwakha asevele eqalile ukugcwalisa imigodi nokuvuselela izingxenye ezigugile zomgwaqo. Abashayeli bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise eminye imigwaqo ngesikhathi sokulungiswa ukuze kugwenywe ukuxinana kwezimoto. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi uzosebenzisa izinhlelo zokubeka iso ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi umsebenzi wenziwa ngokuhleleka. Abahlali bamukele kahle lolu hlelo kodwa bacele ukuthi umsebenzi usheshiswe ukuze kuncishiswe ukuphazamiseka kwempilo yansuku zonke.

Abantu abebekhona baveze ukukhathazeka ngokuthi lezi zinkinga zihlala isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokuxazululwa okucacile. Umasipala uthe kunezinhlelo ezisasebenza zokuthuthukisa ukusebenza kwamasevisi ngokwengeza abasebenzi kanye nemishini emisha. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba babike izinkinga ngokushesha ukuze kube lula ukungenelela. Uhulumeni uthi ukubambisana nomphakathi kubalulekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe izinga lokuhlinzekwa kwezinsiza. Le ngxoxo ibhekwa njengengxenye ebalulekile yokwakha ukwethembana phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuhlinzeka ngosizo lwezimali kanye nokuqeqeshwa kosomabhizinisi abasha ukuze bakwazi ukukhulisa imisebenzi yabo. Izikhulu zithi kuzokwakhiwa izikhungo zokweseka amabhizinisi ezindaweni ezahlukene ukuze kube lula ukufinyelela usizo. Abahlanganyeli bamukele le nqubomgomo kodwa bacele ukuthi kube nokulandelela okuqinile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusebenza kwayo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokukhuthaza ukukhula komnotho okusimeme ezweni lonke.

Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukwakhiwa kwamathangi amasha nokulungiswa kwemibhobho emidala. Izisebenzi zikamasipala zithi seziqalile ukuhlola izindawo ezisengozini enkulu ukuze kubekwe phambili ukungenelela. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekongeni amanzi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusimama kwalesi simo. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi uzosebenzisa izinhlelo zokwazisa umphakathi ukuze abantu baqonde kangcono indlela yokuphatha amanzi. Le projekthi kulindeleke ukuthi ithuthukise kakhulu ukuzinza kokuhlinzekwa kwamanzi esifundeni.

Uhulumeni wesifundazwe umemezele izinguquko ezintsha kumigomo yokuhanjiswa kwezinsiza zomphakathi ukuze kuncishiswe ukubambezeleka ekuphenduleni izikhalazo zabantu. Lolu shintsho luhlose ukwenza kube lula ukulandelela izikhalo kusetshenziswa izinhlelo zedijithali. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuzokwandisa ukubeka obala kanye nokuthuthukisa ukuphendula ngokushesha. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise lezi zinhlelo ezintsha ukuze babike izinkinga ezikhona emiphakathini yabo. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela izosiza ekwakheni izinsiza zomphakathi ezisebenza kahle futhi ezithembekile.

Emapulazini aseFree State abalimi babhekene nezinselelo zokwehla kwesivuno ngenxa yokushintsha kwesimo sezulu kanye nokuntuleka kwemvula eyanele. Uhulumeni uthi useqalile uhlelo lokweseka abalimi ngokuhlinzeka ngembewu ethuthukisiwe kanye nokuqeqeshwa kwezindlela zokulima ezisimeme. Lezi zinhlelo zihlose ukwandisa ukukhiqizwa kokudla nokunciphisa ukuthembela ekungenisweni kokudla kwamanye amazwe. Abalimi bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izindlela zesimanje zokonga amanzi nokuvikela umhlabathi. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezinhlangano zezolimo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi abalimi abancane nabo bayazuza kulezi zinhlelo.

Ezindaweni zasemakhaya aseKwaZulu-Natali kuqale uhlelo olusha lokuthuthukisa ingqalasizinda yezolimo kanye nokufinyelela ezimakethe kubalimi abancane. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukwakha imigwaqo yokuxhuma amapulazi nezikhungo zokuhweba ukuze kube lula ukuthutha imikhiqizo. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuzokwandisa amathuba emisebenzi futhi kuthuthukise umnotho wasezindaweni zasemakhaya. Abaholi bomphakathi bamukele le projekthi kodwa bacele ukuthi kuqinisekiswe ukuthi iyafinyelela kubo bonke abalimi ngaphandle kokukhetha. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezinhlaka zendawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuqaliswa okuphumelelayo kwalolu hlelo.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukukhulisa ukukhiqizwa kokudla okuyisisekelo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuphepha kokudla ezweni. Abalimi bazophinde bathole ukuqeqeshwa mayelana nokusebenzisa imbewu ethuthukisiwe kanye nokulawula izinambuzane ngendlela efanele. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokuqinisa umnotho wezolimo. Abahlanganyeli emkhakheni wezolimo bakubonge lokhu kodwa bacele ukuthi kube nokubeka iso okuqinile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusatshalaliswa okufanele kwezinsiza.

Emiphakathini yasemakhaya aseMpumalanga Kapa kuqalwe uhlelo lokuthuthukisa ukufinyelela emanzini okuhlanzekile kanye nezinsiza zokunisela emapulazini amancane. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa ubunzima ababhekene nabo abalimi ngesikhathi sezomiso ezinde. Izisebenzi zikahulumeni zithi seziqalile ukufaka amapayipi amasha kanye nokulungisa imithombo yamanzi endala. Abalimi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise lezi zinsiza ngendlela esimeme ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusimama kwesikhathi eside. Uhulumeni uthi le projekthi izodlala indima enkulu ekuthuthukiseni ukukhiqizwa kokudla ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezintathu ezweni lonke sebezuze ezinhlelweni ezintsha zokukhokhwa kwezibonelelo zikahulumeni ezibhekiswe emindenini esengozini enkulu. Uhulumeni uthi le nkqubo ihlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abantu abadala, izingane kanye nabakhubazekile bathola ukwesekwa okufanele ngesikhathi. Izikhulu zomnyango wezenhlalakahle zithi izinhlelo zokukhokha sezithuthukisiwe ukuze kuncishiswe ukubambezeleka nokwandisa ukufinyelela kwabahlomulayo. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izindlela ezisemthethweni zokubhalisa ukuze bagweme ukukhwabanisa. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokunciphisa ubuphofu nokwakha imiphakathi ezinzile.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukubhekana nenkinga yokushoda kwezindlu eziphephile nezingabizi kubantu abahola kancane. Izikhulu zithi izindlu ezakhiwayo zihambisana nezindinganiso zokuphepha kanye nengqalasizinda eyisisekelo efana namanzi nogesi. Abahlali abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi babhalise ngokusemthethweni ukuze bakwazi ukufinyelela kulolu hlelo. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nemikhandlu yendawo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ukwabiwa kwezindlu kwenziwa ngendlela efanele. Abaholi bomphakathi bacele ukuthi kube sobala ekukhethweni kwabahlomulayo ukuze kugwenywe ukungqubuzana.

Emiphakathini eminingi yasemadolobheni kuqale uhlelo olusha lokweseka imindeni ebhekene nobunzima bokungasebenzi kanye nokushoda kokudla. Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukuhlinzekwa ngamaphakethe okudla kanye nezinhlelo zokuqeqeshwa kwamakhono ukuze abantu bakwazi ukuzimela. Izisebenzi zenhlalakahle zithi ziyasebenzisana nezinhlangano ezizimele ukuze kwandiswe ukufinyelela kosizo. Abahlali abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuqeqeshwa ukuze bathuthukise amathuba abo emisebenzi. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokulwa nobuphofu emiphakathini esengozini enkulu. Abaholi bomphakathi bamnkele lolu hlelo kodwa bagcizelela isidingo sokuqhubeka nokwesekwa isikhathi eside.

Lolu hlelo olusha lusebenzisa izinhlelo zedijithali ukuqinisekisa ukubhaliswa okunembile nokunciphisa ukukhwabanisa. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi bavuselele imininingwane yabo njalo ukuze bagweme ukuphazamiseka ekukhokhelweni. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezikhungo zomphakathi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukufinyelela okulula kosizo. Abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokubeka iso ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izinsiza zifinyelela kubantu abahlosiwe kuphela.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuthutha imindeni iye ezindlini ezakhiwe ngokusemthethweni ezinezinsiza eziyisisekelo. Izisebenzi zikamasipala zithi seziqalile ukuhlonza izindawo ezibeka abantu engcupheni yezikhukhula kanye nokulimala. Abahlali baceliwe ukuthi basebenzisane nohulumeni ngesikhathi sokuthuthwa ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuphepha. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokwakha imiphakathi ehlala kahle nenokuphepha. Abaholi bomphakathi bacele ukuthi kube nokuxhumana okucacile ukuze kugwenywe ukudideka ngesikhathi sokuthuthwa.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa umthelela wobuphofu ngokunikeza abantu amathuba okusebenza ezinhlelweni zomphakathi. Izikhulu zithi izinkampani ezizimele nazo zizobamba iqhaza ekwakheni amathuba emisebenzi. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise leli thuba ukuthuthukisa amakhono abo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokwakha umnotho onamathuba alinganayo kubo bonke.

Izikhulu zithi lokhu kukhuphuka kuhloswe ukusiza abantu abadala ukuba bakwazi ukuhlangabezana nezidingo zabo eziyisisekelo. Uhlelo lokukhokha luzoqhubeka ngendlela ejwayelekile kodwa luthuthukiswe ukuze kuncishiswe ukubambezeleka. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise iziteshi ezisemthethweni ukuze bathole ulwazi oluqondile. Uhulumeni uthi uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izakhamuzi ezisengozini enkulu azishiywa ngaphandle kosizo.

Emiphakathini yasemakhaya kuqale uhlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu ezibhekele imindeni ehola kancane ukuze kuthuthukiswe izinga lokuphila. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokubhalisa ukuze bakwazi ukufakwa ohlwini lwabahlomulayo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yokuzibophezela ekwakheni imiphakathi ephephile nenokulingana. Abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokuba sobala ekukhethweni kwabahlomulayo.

Ngaphakathi kwezinhlelo ezintsha zokweseka imiphakathi esengozini, uhulumeni usungule izikhungo zosizo ezizohlinzeka ngokudla, izeluleko kanye nokwesekwa kwezempilo kubantu abaswele. Lezi zikhungo ziqale ukusebenza ezindaweni ezithile ezihlushwa izinga eliphezulu lobuphofu. Izisebenzi zithi inhloso enkulu ukunciphisa umthelela wokungalingani emphakathini. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise lezi zinsiza ukuze bathuthukise izimpilo zabo. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezinhlangano zomphakathi ukuqinisekisa ukusimama kwalezi zinhlelo zesikhathi eside.

Uhulumeni uthi lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa izinga eliphezulu lokwehluleka ezikoleni ngokunikeza othisha ukwesekwa okukhulu kanye nezinsiza ezengeziwe zokufundisa. Izikole eziningi sezithole izincwadi ezintsha, amathuluzi okufundisa kanye nezinhlelo zokuqeqesha othisha ukuze bathuthukise indlela yokufundisa. Abazali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekufundeni kwezingane zabo ngokubambisana nothisha ukuze kuthuthukiswe imiphumela yezemfundo. Izikhulu zemfundo zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokwakha isizukulwane esinamakhono aqinile okuzimela. Abafundi nabo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise amathuba okuqeqeshwa angeziwe ukuze bathuthukise ikusasa labo futhi babe nempumelelo emkhakheni abawukhethayo.

Ezinhlanganweni zemfundo ephakeme ezweni lonke kuqale uhlelo olusha lokweseka abafundi abasuka emiphakathini esengozini ngokubanikeza izibonelelo zokufunda kanye nokusekelwa kwezindlu. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela ihlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho mfundi oshiywa ngaphandle ngenxa yezimo zezimali. Izinhlangano zemfundo ephakeme zisebenzisana nohulumeni ukuhlinzeka ngezinhlelo zokuqeqesha ezihambisana nezidingo zomnotho wanamuhla. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izinsiza zokwelulekwa ukuze bakwazi ukuphumelela ezifundweni zabo. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yokwakha umnotho onolwazi oluqinile noluncintisanayo. Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukuqeqeshwa okusha kothisha kanye nokwethulwa kwezinsiza zesimanje zokufundisa. Lezi zinhlelo zibandakanya ukwakhiwa kwamagumbi okufundela amasha kanye nokulungiswa kwezakhiwo ezindala. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokunciphisa umehluko phakathi kwezikole ezisemadolobheni nezasemakhaya. Abaholi bezemfundo bakwamukele lokhu njengesinyathelo esibalulekile sokuthuthukisa izinga lemfundo ezweni.

Abafundi abaningi ezikoleni eziphakeme ezweni lonke bazuze ohlelweni olusha lokufundisa olusebenzisa ubuchwepheshe besimanje ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuqonda kwezifundo ezinzima. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela ihlose ukwenza ukufunda kube lula futhi kube nentshisekelo enkulu kubafundi. Othisha bathole ukuqeqeshwa okusha ukuze bakwazi ukusebenzisa la mathuluzi ngendlela efanele ekilasini. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izinhlelo zokufunda ezengeziwe ukuze bathuthukise amakhono abo. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yokulungiselela abafundi umnotho wesikhathi esizayo. Abazali bakubheke njengokuthuthukisa okuzokwenza izingane zabo zibe namathuba angcono emhlabeni wokusebenza.

Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yokwakha isizwe esisekelwe olwazini nasekusunguleni.

Emiphakathini eminingi yasemadolobheni kuqale umkhankaso omusha wokugoma abantu ukuze kuncishiswe ukusabalala kwezifo ezithathelwanayo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza kulo mkhankaso ukuze bavikele imindeni yabo. Izisebenzi zezempilo zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokuthuthukisa impilo yomphakathi. Amagosa karhulumente achaze izicwangciso zokwandisa iinkonzo kwezi ndawo. Urhulumente uthi sele kuqaliswe iiprojekthi zokuphucula uthungelwano lwamanzi kunye nokwandisa iikliniki. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiinkqubo zophuhliso. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi kufuneka kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho ndawo ishiywa ngaphandle kweenkonzo ezibalulekileyo.

Urhulumente wesifundazwe ubhengeze inkqubo yedijithali yokuphucula ulawulo lwezikhalazo zoluntu ukuze kuncitshiswe ukulibaziseka. Le nkqubo iza kuvumela abahlali ukuba balandele imeko yezikhalazo zabo ngexesha lokwenyani. Amagosa athi oku kuza kwandisa uxanduva nokungafihli kulawulo lweenkonzo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise le nkqubo ukuze bakhawulezise ukusonjululwa kweengxaki. Urhulumente uthi le ndlela iya kuphucula ukusebenza kweenkonzo zoluntu ngokubanzi.

Le nkqubo igxile ekwandiseni ukufikelela kumanzi acocekileyo, umbane ozinzileyo, kunye neendlela ezikhuselekileyo ezidibanisa uluntu. Amagosa karhulumente athi umsebenzi uza kwenziwa ngokwezigaba ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba zonke iindawo zifumana ingqwalasela efanelekileyo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zophuhliso ukuze banike izimvo zabo ngeemfuno eziphambili. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso esibanzi sokunciphisa ukungalingani phakathi kweendawo ezisemaphandleni nezisezidolophini. Uluntu luthi lulindele ukuphucuka okubonakalayo kwiinyanga ezizayo njengoko iiprojekthi ziqhubeka nokuphunyezwa ngokuthe ngcembe.

Le nkqubo yezibonelelo ijolise ekunciphiseni indlala nokunceda abantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo ukuba bakwazi ukuhlangabezana neemfuno zabo zemihla ngemihla. Amagosa karhulumente athi iinkqubo zokuhlawula ziphuculwe ukuze kuncitshiswe ukulibaziseka nokwandisa ukufikelela kwabahlomulayo. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise iindlela ezisemthethweni zokubhalisa ukuze kuphetshwe ukukhwabanisa. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yomzamo wokwakha uluntu olulinganayo noluzinzileyo apho kungabikho mntu ushiywa ngaphandle kwenkxaso eyimfuneko. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi kubalulekile ukubeka iliso ukuqinisekisa ukuba uncedo lufikelela kubantu abahlosiweyo kuphela.

Emva kokukhula kwemfuno yezindlu ezikhuselekileyo nezifikelelekayo, urhulumente ubhengeze uhlelo olutsha lokwakhiwa kwezindlu kumaphondo ahlukeneyo. Le nkqubo ijolise ekuncedeni imindeni ehlala kwiindawo ezingekho mthethweni okanye ezisemngciphekweni wezikhukhula. Izindlu ezakhiwayo ziya kubonelelwa ngamanzi acocekileyo, umbane, kunye nenkqubo yogutyulo eyaneleyo. Amagosa athi uluhlu lwabahlomulayo luza kulawulwa ngokusesikweni ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubulungisa. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba babhalise kwiiofisi zikamasipala ukuze bakwazi ukufakwa kuluhlu. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi ijolise ekuphuculeni izinga lokuphila kunye nokwakha imiphakathi ekhuselekileyo nenokuzinza ixesha elide.

Ngaphakathi kwemiphakathi emininzi ezidolophini kuqaliswe inkqubo yokuxhasa iintsapho ezijongene nobunzima bezemali nokungaqeshwa. Le nkqubo ibandakanya ukuhanjiswa kokutya, iingcebiso zengqesho, kunye noqeqesho lwezakhono ukuze abantu bakwazi ukuzimela. Amagosa eenkonzo zentlalo asebenzisana nemibutho yasekuhlaleni ukwandisa ukufikelela kolu ncedo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiinkqubo zokuqeqeshwa ukuze baphucule amathuba abo emisebenzi. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokunciphisa indlala nokwakha uluntu olunamandla. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu ncedo lubalulekile ngakumbi kumakhaya angenayo ingeniso ezinzileyo.

Urhulumente wesizwe ubhengeze ukuba izibonelelo zabantu abadala ziya kuhlaziywa ukuze zihambelane nokunyuka kweendleko zokuphila. Le nkqubo ijolise ekuncedeni abantu abadala ukuba bakwazi ukuhlangabezana neemfuno ezifana nokutya, amayeza, kunye neendleko zezindlu. Amagosa athi iintlawulo ziya kuqhubeka ngendlela eqhelekileyo kodwa ziphuculwe ngokweendlela zokuhlawula zedijithali. Abahlomulayo baceliwe ukuba baqinisekise ukuba iinkcukacha zabo zihlaziywa rhoqo ukuze kungabikho ziphazamiso. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo ibonisa ukuzibophelela ekukhathaleleni abantu abasengozini. Uluntu luthi olu tshintsho luzisa ithemba ngakumbi kumakhaya amaninzi axhomekeke kwezi zibonelelo.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni umngcipheko wezikhukhula kunye nokudilika kwezakhiwo ezindala. Amagosa kamasipala athi iintsapho ezichaphazelekayo ziya kufuduselwa kwizindlu ezikhuselekileyo ngexesha lomsebenzi. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzisane nabasebenzi ukuze kuqhutywe umsebenzi ngokukhawuleza nangokukhuselekileyo. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi ijolise ekwakheni iindawo zokuhlala ezizinzileyo nezihambelana neemfuno zabantu. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi le nkqubo iza kuzisa ukuphucuka okukhulu kumgangatho wobomi.

Emva kokunyuka kweengxaki zokungabikho kwemisebenzi kulutsha, urhulumente ubhengeze inkqubo yokuxhasa abantu abatsha ngemisebenzi yesikhashana kunye noqeqesho lwamakhono. Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni indlala nokwandisa amathuba engqesho kumacandelo ahlukeneyo. Amashishini abucala nawo aya kubandakanywa ekuboneleleni ngamathuba oqeqesho. Abantu abatsha bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise eli thuba ukuze bakhe ikamva elizinzileyo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokwakha uqoqosho olubandakanya wonke umntu. Uluntu luthi olu ncedo lubalulekile ekuphuculeni amathuba abantu abatsha.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekuncedeni imiphakathi echaphazelekayo yintlupheko kunye nokungabikho kwemisebenzi. Amagosa athi ukuhanjiswa koncedo kuyenziwa ngokucwangcisiweyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho mntu ushiywayo ngaphandle. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba babike naziphi na iingxaki zokufikelela kuncedo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo yinxalenye yomzamo wokunciphisa indlala nokuphucula impilo yoluntu. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu ncedo lubalulekile ngakumbi kwiindawo ezikude.

Le projekthi ijolise ekuboneleleni ngeendawo zokuhlala ezikhuselekileyo nezisemthethweni. Amagosa athi uluhlu lwabahlomulayo luza kulawulwa ngokungqongqo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubulungisa. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba basebenzisane ngexesha lokufuduswa ukuze kugwenywe ukungqubana. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iza kuphucula izinga lokuphila kwaye inciphise umngcipheko weentlekele zemvelo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi kubalulekile ukuba inkqubo iqhutywe ngokungafihli.

Ngaphakathi kwemiphakathi yasemadolophini kuqaliswe inkqubo yokuxhasa abantu abangenayo ingeniso ezinzileyo ngokubanika ukutya, iingcebiso, kunye noqeqesho lwamakhono. Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni indlala nokwandisa ukuzimela kwabahlali. Amagosa eenkonzo zentlalo asebenzisana nemibutho yasekuhlaleni ukwandisa ukufikelela kolu ncedo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiinkqubo zokuqeqeshwa ukuze baphucule amathuba abo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yomzamo wokwakha uluntu oluzinzileyo nolunamathuba alinganayo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu ncedo luzisa ithemba kumakhaya amaninzi.

Urhulumente ubhengeze inkqubo entsha yokuphucula ukuhanjiswa kwezibonelelo kubantu abakhubazekileyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba bafumana uncedo ngokukhawuleza nangokufanelekileyo. Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni ukubambezeleka kunye nokwandisa ukufikelela kwiinkonzo ezibalulekileyo. Amagosa athi iinkqubo zedijithali ziya kusetyenziswa ukulandelela iintlawulo kunye nokunciphisa ubuqhophololo. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuba baqinisekise ukuba iinkcukacha zabo zihlaziywa rhoqo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo ibonisa ukuzibophelela ekuxhaseni abantu abasengozini. Uluntu luthi olu tshintsho luzisa ithemba kunye nokhuseleko olungcono kubahlali abaxhomekeke kolu ncedo.

Emva kokunyuka kweengxaki zentlupheko kwezinye iindawo, urhulumente ubhengeze inkqubo yokwakha amaziko oncedo olungxamisekileyo aya kubonelela ngokutya, indawo yokuhlala, kunye neengcebiso kubantu abasengxakini. La maziko aya kusebenzisana nemibutho yasekuhlaleni ukuqinisekisa ukuba uncedo lufikelela ngokukhawuleza. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise ezi nkonzo xa besengxakini. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni indlala nokukhusela abantu abasengozini enkulu. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi la manyathelo abalulekile ekwakheni uluntu olunenkathalo noluxhasanayo.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekwandiseni imveliso yokutya kunye nokunciphisa indlala kwiindawo ezisemngciphekweni wokungabikho kokutya. Amagosa ezolimo athi abalimi baza kufumana uqeqesho olongezelelweyo malunga neendlela zokulima ezimelana nokutshintsha kwemozulu. Abahlali basemaphandleni bakhuthazwa ukuba babhalise ukuze bafumane le nkxaso. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi iyinxalenye yesicwangciso esibanzi sokuphuhlisa ezolimo ezizinzileyo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu ncedo luzisa ithemba elitsha kumakhaya axhomekeke kwezolimo.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekwakheni iindlela ezintsha kunye nokulungisa ezonakeleyo ezixhumanisa iilali nezixeko ezikufutshane. Amagosa karhulumente athi oku kuza kunciphisa iindleko zokuthutha kwaye kunyuse ingeniso yamakhaya asemaphandleni. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiingxoxo zophuhliso ukuze bachaze iimfuno zabo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokuphuhlisa uqoqosho lwasezilalini. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi le projekthi iza kuzisa utshintsho olubonakalayo kubomi babahlali.

Ngexesha lonyaka omtsha wokulima, urhulumente ubhengeze inkxaso eyongezelelweyo kubalimi bombona kunye nengqolowa ukuze konyuswe ukhuseleko lokutya. Le nkxaso ibandakanya izibonelelo zemali, izixhobo zokulima, kunye noqeqesho kwiindlela zokulima ezisebenzayo. Amagosa athi injongo kukunciphisa ukuxhomekeka ekuthengisweni kokutya kumazwe angaphandle. Abalimi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise iindlela ezonga amanzi ukuze bakwazi ukumelana nemozulu eyomileyo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iza kunceda ukwakha ukhuseleko lokutya oluzinzileyo. Iinkokeli zezolimo zithi le nkxaso ibalulekile ekuphuculeni imveliso yezolimo.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni ubunzima bokufikelela emanzini kubahlali abasemaphandleni. Amagosa kamasipala athi iipayipi ezintsha sele zifakwa kwezinye iindawo ezichaphazelekayo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngendlela enoxanduva ukuze kugcinwe uzinzo. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokuphucula iziseko ezingundoqo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi le nkqubo iza kuphucula kakhulu umgangatho wobomi.

Abalimi abancinci kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo zelizwe bafumene inkxaso entsha yokugcina izilwanyana kunye nokuphucula imveliso yobisi. Le nkqubo ibandakanya uqeqesho lweendlela zokukhathalela izilwanyana kunye nokuthintela izifo ezifumaneka kwiifama. Amagosa ezolimo athi oku kuza kunceda ukwandisa ingeniso yamakhaya asemaphandleni. Abalimi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise iinkonzo zikarhulumente ukuze bafumane uncedo olufanelekileyo. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi ijolise ekwakheni uqoqosho lwezolimo oluzinzileyo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi le nkxaso iza kuphucula uzinzo lokutya kwiindawo ezininzi.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekuphuculeni iziphumo zabafundi kwizifundo ezibalulekileyo ezifana nezibalo nesayensi. Ootitshala bafumana uqeqesho olongezelelweyo ukuze bakwazi ukusebenzisa iindlela ezintsha zokufundisa. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwizifundo ezongezelelweyo ukuze baphucule iziphumo zabo. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi iyinxalenye yesicwangciso semfundo eside. Iinkokeli zemfundo zithi olu phuculo luza kuzisa utshintsho oluhle kwizikolo zasemaphandleni.

Emva kokukhula kwenkxalabo malunga nokuphumelela kwabafundi, urhulumente ubhengeze inkqubo yokuxhasa abafundi kwiiyunivesithi ngokunyusa izibonelelo zokufunda. Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni ukulahlwa kwabafundi ngenxa yeengxaki zemali. Iiyunivesithi zithi ziza kusebenzisana norhulumente ukuqinisekisa ukuba inkxaso ifikelela kubafundi abafanelekileyo. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise iinkonzo zokuxhasa ezifumanekayo ezikhampasini. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iza kunceda ukwakha isizukulwana esinamakhono aphezulu. Iinkokeli zemfundo zithi le nkxaso ibalulekile ekuphuhliseni uqoqosho lwexesha elizayo.

Le nkqubo ibandakanya iikhompyutha ezintsha kunye nezixhobo zokufunda zedijithali. Ootitshala bafumana uqeqesho lokusebenzisa obu buchwepheshe ekufundiseni. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise izixhobo zedijithali ukuphucula ukuqonda kwezifundo. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi ijolise ekulungiseleleni abafundi imisebenzi yexesha elizayo. Iinkokeli zemfundo zithi oku kuza kuphucula iziphumo zabafundi ngokubanzi.

Emva kweengxoxo zikazwelonke ngemfundo, urhulumente ubhengeze izicwangciso zokwakha izikolo ezintsha kwiindawo ezinemfuno ephezulu. Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni ukuxinana kwabafundi nokuphucula umgangatho wokufunda. Izikolo ezindala nazo ziza kulungiswa ukuze zihambelane nemigangatho yokhuseleko. Abazali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiikomiti zesikolo ukuze kuphuculwe ulawulo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso semfundo esibanzi. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu phuhliso luza kuba nefuthe elihle kwizizukulwana ezizayo.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekuphuculeni ukuzimasa kwabafundi nasekunciphiseni ukulahlwa kwezikolo. Ootitshala bathi oku kunceda abafundi ukuba bagxile ngakumbi kwizifundo zabo. Abazali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzisane nezikolo ukuze kuqinisekiswe impumelelo yabafundi. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokuphucula imfundo esisiseko. Iinkokeli zemfundo zithi le nkxaso iza kunceda ukwakha ikamva eliqinileyo labafundi.

Ngaphakathi kweeyunivesithi ezahlukeneyo kuqaliswe inkqubo yokukhuthaza uphando kunye nophuhliso lwezakhono ezintsha phakathi kwabafundi nabaphandi. Le nkqubo ijolise ekwandiseni inani lophando olusombulula iingxaki zoluntu. Abafundi bafumana inkxaso yemali kunye noqeqesho ukuze bakwazi ukwenza iiprojekthi zophando ezisemgangathweni ophezulu. Iiyunivesithi zithi le nkqubo iza kunceda ukwakha uqoqosho olusekwe kulwazi. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise eli thuba ukuphuhlisa amakhono abo. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokwakha isizwe esisekelwe kwisayensi nolwazi.

Amagosa ezempilo athi le nkqubo iza kubandakanya ukuhanjiswa kolwazi ezikolweni, kwiikliniki, nakwiintlanganiso zoluntu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba abantu bafikelelwa lulwazi oluchanekileyo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise iinkonzo zeekliniki zikamasipala ukuze bahlolwe kwangexesha. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokuphucula impilo yoluntu nokunciphisa ukufa okunokuthintelwa. Iingcali zempilo zithi ukufundisa uluntu kudlala indima ebalulekileyo ekuthinteleni ukusasazeka kwezifo. Uluntu luthi luyalwamkela olu phulo kwaye lulindele ukuphucuka kwempilo kwiindawo zalo.

Izibhedlele zikawonke-wonke ezikumaphondo ahlukeneyo ziye zaqalisa inkqubo yokunciphisa ixesha lokulinda kwizigulane ngokwandisa abasebenzi kunye nokuphucula inkqubo yokwamkelwa. Amagosa ezempilo athi le nkqubo ijolise ekuphuculeni umgangatho weenkonzo kunye nokunciphisa ukuxinana kwizibhedlele ezinkulu. Iikliniki ezikufutshane nazo zikhuthazwa ukuba ziphathe iimeko ezingxamisekileyo ezincinci ukuze kuncitshiswe uxinzelelo kwizibhedlele. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise iinkonzo zokuqala phambi kokuba baye kwizibhedlele ezikhulu. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iya kuphucula ukusebenza kwenkqubo yezempilo ngokubanzi. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu tshintsho liza kunceda kakhulu abantu abasengozini.

Amagosa ezempilo athi le nkqubo ijolise ekukhuseleni abantu abadala, abantwana, kunye nabantu abaneemeko zempilo ezibuthathaka. Iindawo zokugonya ziye zasasazwa kwiikliniki nakwiindawo zoluntu ukuze kufikelelwe abantu abaninzi. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bathathe inxaxheba ukuze bakhusele iintsapho zabo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yomzamo wokuphucula ukhuseleko lwempilo yesizwe. Iingcali zithi ugonyo luyindlela ebalulekileyo yokuthintela izifo.

Umasipala uthi amaqela okwakha sele eqalile ukugcwalisa imingxunya kunye nokuphucula umgangatho weendlela. Le nkqubo ijolise ekwandiseni ukhuseleko lwabashayeli nabahambi ngeenyawo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba balandele imiqondiso yokwakha ngexesha lomsebenzi. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi iza kunciphisa ukulibaziseka kwezithuthi kunye neengozi ezindleleni. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi olu phuculo luyimfuneko ekuphuhliseni uqoqosho lwengingqi.

Le nkqubo ijolise ekunciphiseni ukushoda kwamanzi okuhlala kuchaphazela imiphakathi ngexesha lasehlotyeni. Amagosa kamasipala athi umsebenzi uza kwenziwa ngezigaba ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukufikelela ngokulinganayo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngokonga. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi iyinxalenye yesicwangciso sokuphucula iziseko ezingundoqo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi le nkqubo iza kuphucula kakhulu umgangatho wobomi.

Emva kweminyaka yokulinda, abahlali baseQonce bagqibe ekubeni babhiyozele ukuvulwa kweholo entsha yoluntu esiza kusetyenziswa kwiintlanganiso, imicimbi yolutsha, kunye nemisebenzi yenkcubeko. Le holo yakhiwe njengenxalenye yenkqubo karhulumente yokuphuhlisa iindawo zoluntu. Amagosa athi le ndawo iza kunceda ekomelezeni ubudlelwane phakathi kwabahlali. Abahlali bavakalise uvuyo ngokuba ngoku banendawo efanelekileyo yokuhlangana. Urhulumente uthi le projekthi ijolise ekwakheni uluntu olunxibeleleneyo nolusebenzisanayo. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi le holo iza kudlala indima ebalulekileyo ekuphuhliseni ulutsha.

Ngexesha lomnyhadala wenkcubeko waseMpuma Koloni, abahlali abavela kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo babonise umculo, umdaniso, kunye nobugcisa bemveli. Lo mnyhadala ujolise ekugcineni nasekukhuthazeni inkcubeko yabantu bommandla. Amagosa karhulumente athi imisitho efana nale inceda ekukhuthazeni ukhenketho lwengingqi kunye nokwakha uqoqosho lwasekuhlaleni. Abathathi-nxaxheba bavakalise ulonwabo ngokukwazi ukwabelana ngamasiko abo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yokuxhasa imvelaphi yenkcubeko yesizwe. Iinkokeli zoluntu zithi inkcubeko idlala indima ebalulekileyo ekwakheni ubunye phakathi kwabantu.

Lolu hlelo lugcile ekukhuliseni emanti ahlobile, kugucula tinkinga temandla kagesi, kanye nekulungisa imigwaco lebalulekile. Tikhulu temmango titsi lomsebenti utawentiwa ngezigaba kuze kuqinisekiswe kutsi tonkhe tindzawo tiyafinyelelwa ngaphandle kwekubambezeleka lokukhulu. Bantfu bakhutsatwa kutsi babambe lichaza emihlanganweni yemphakatsi kuze banike imicabango yabo ngekutsi yikuphi lokubaluleke kakhulu. Uhulumeni utsi lolu hlelo luyincenye yesu lelikhulu lekunciphisa kungalingani emkhatsini wemadolobha netindzawo tasemaphandleni. Bantfu bemmango batsi balindzele kubona lushintjo lolubonakalako emnyakeni lotako njengoba emaphrojekthi achubeka asebenta ngekucophelela.

Lomsebenti ugcile etigwacweni letisetjentiswa kakhulu bantfu labahamba ngema-vehikeli kanye nalabahamba ngetinyawo. Tikhulu temasipala titsi emacembu ekwakha asebenta ngekushesha kugcwalisa imigodzi kanye nekulungisa tindzawo letigugile. Bantfu bakhutsatwa kutsi basebentise tindlela letinye uma imigwaco itsiwa isalungiswa kuze kugwenywe kuphatseka kabi kwetimoto. Uhulumeni wasekhaya utsi lolu hlelo lutawunciphisa tingozi futsi lukhuphule kuphepha emigwacweni. Emiphakatsi yemukele lolu hlelo kepha yacela kutsi umsebenzi usheshiswe kuze kuphila kwansuku tonkhe kungaphazamiseki kakhulu.

Emhlanganweni wemphakatsi lobewubanjelwe edolobheni, bantfu bavakalise tinkinga tabo mayelana nekubambezeleka kwetinsita letifana nekulandvwa kwedoti kanye nekukhanya kwemigwaco lokungasebenti kahle. Tikhulu temasipala tichazile kutsi kukhona kushoda kwetinsita kanye nesabelomali lesilinganiselwe lokuchaphata kushesha kwemsebenti. Uhulumeni wasekhaya utsi sewucale luhlelo lwekukhulisa tisetjentiswa kanye nekutfola basebenti labanye kuze kuncishiswe tinkinga. Bantfu bakhutsatwa kutsi babike tinkinga masinyane kuze kube lula kulungisa. Emholi wemphakatsi utsi kubambisana kubalulekile ekuphuculeni tinsita. Lomhlangano ubukwa njengendlela yekucinisa budlelwano emkhatsini wemphakatsi nohulumeni.

Uhulumeni welive umemetele luhlelo lolusha lwekukhulisa ematfuba emsebenti kulusha ngekugxila ekuqeqesheni emakhono lasetjentiswako. Lolu hlelo lutawuhlanganisa kufundza ekilasini kanye nekusebenta etimbonini kuze bantfu labasha batfole lwati loluphelele. Emabhizinisi labucala atawubambisana nohulumeni ekunikeni ematfuba ekuqeqesha. Lusha lukhutsatwa kutsi lubhalise kuze lutfole emakhono ladzingekako emakethe yemsebenti. Uhulumeni utsi lolu hlelo lutawunciphisa liphasi lelikhulu lekungasebenti. Emiphakatsi itsi ilindzele kubona lushintjo loluhle ekusaseni lebantfu labasha.

Lolu hlelo lugcile ekwakheni ematanki lamasha kanye nekulungisa emapayipi lamadzala. Tikhulu titsi sekucalile kuhlolwa tindzawo letisengotini lephakeme kuze kubekwe kuhle kusebenta. Bantfu bakhutsatwa kutsi basebentise emanti ngekuwonga kuze kugcinwe kusimama kwalomsebenti. Uhulumeni wasekhaya utsi utawusebentisa tindlela tekwazisa umphakatsi kuze bantfu bati kahle ngalokubalulekile. Lomsebenti ulindzeleke kutsi unciphise kakhulu tinkinga temanti esifundzeni.

Bantfu baseNelson Mandela Bay babambe umhlangano wekukhuluma ngentfutfuko yetinsita temmango kanye netinkinga letibhekene nekuphila kwansuku tonkhe. Kukhulunywe kakhulu ngekuntuleka kwemanti, tinkinga tetindlu, kanye nekubambezeleka kwetinsita letitsintsa bantfu ngco. Tikhulu temasipala tichazile kutsi kunezinhlelo letisachubeka tekuphucula kusebenta kwetinsita. Emiphakatsi itsi kudzingeka kube nekukhuluma lokuchubekako kuze kuncishiswe tinkinga. Uhulumeni utsi kubambisana kubalulekile ekwakheni imiphakatsi lehlala kahle. Lomhlangano uphetse ngemibono lekhombisa isifiso sekubona lushintjo loluhle.

Lolu hlelo lutawusebentisa tindlela tedijithali kuze kulandzelwe kahle konkhe lokwentekako. Bantfu batawukwati kubona simo setikhalo tabo ngesikhatsi sangempela. Tikhulu titsi loku kutawukhuphula kubeka obala kanye nekutiphendvulela. Emiphakatsi ikhutsatwa kutsi isebentise lolu hlelo olusha kuze kusheshiswe kulungiswa kwetinkinga. Uhulumeni utsi lolu shintjo lutawuphucula kakhulu kusebenta kwetinsita.

Emadolobheni lamancane aseMpumalanga, umasipala ucale luhlelo lwekukhanyisa imigwaco lobekuvamise kuba mnyama ebusuku. Lolu hlelo lugcile ekufakeni emalambu lamasha langasebentisa mandla lamancane futsi ahlala sikhatsi leside. Tikhulu titsi loku kutawunciphisa tingozi kanye nekukhuphula kuphepha kwemphakatsi. Bantfu bavakalise kujabula ngalomsebenti kepha bacela kutsi uhlanganiswe kahle kuze kufinyelelwe tindzawo tonkhe. Uhulumeni wasekhaya utsi lomsebenti utawuchubeka kuze kuphele tindzawo letibalulekile. Loku kubukwa njengentfutfuko lebalulekile emphakatsini.

Uhulumeni wesifundza umemetele luhlelo lwekukhulisa kufinyelela kwetinsita temmango etindzaweni tasemaphandleni letikhashane nemadolobha. Lolu hlelo lutawugxila ekunikeni emasevisi eliphilo, kufaka emakhliniki, ematfuba emfundo kanye nekuphucula imigwaco. Tikhulu titsi loku kutawunciphisa sidzingo sekutsi bantfu bahambe emabanga lamade kuze batfole lusito. Emiphakatsi itsi iyalwemukela loluhlelo kepha ifuna kube khona kubeka obala ekusetjentisweni kwetinsita. Uhulumeni utsi utawusebentisana netinhlangano temmango kuze kuqinisekiswe kuphumelela kwalomsebenti.

Ngaphakathi kwemphakatsi waseGoli, bantfu bahlangene emhlanganweni wekukhuluma ngentfutfuko yetindzawo tabo kanye netinsita letidzingekako. Kukhulunywe kakhulu ngekulungiswa kwemigwaqo, kukhanyisa tindzawo letimnyama, kanye nekuphucula tinsita temanti. Tikhulu tichazile kutsi kunetinhlelo letisachubeka tekuphucula onkhe la masevisi ngekucophelela. Bantfu bakhutsatwa kutsi bahlale babika tinkinga kuze kulungiswa kusheshiswe. Uhulumeni utsi kubambisana kwemphakatsi kubalulekile ekwakheni tindzawo letihlala kahle. Lomhlangano uphetse ngemoya wekusebenta ndzawonye nekutfutfukisa imphilo yabantfu.

Loku kubukwa njengentfutfuko lebalulekile ekuphuculeni imphilo yansuku tonkhe.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukusondeza izinsiza zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu kubantu abahlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya ikakhulukazi labo abanobunzima bokufika emadolobheni amakhulu lapho kukhona khona izibhedlela. Izakhamuzi zakulezi zindawo bezilokhu zikhala isikhathi eside ngenxa yokushoda kwezithuthi zomphakathi eziziyisa ezikhungweni zezempilo eziseduze kakhulu nezindlu zabo ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Manje lolu hlelo olusha selulethe usizo olukhulu ngoba abantu sebethola imithi yabo yezifo ezahlukene ngaphandle kokukhokha izindleko ezisindayo zokuhamba amabanga amade. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziqinisekise ukuthi lolu hlelo luzoqhubeka unyaka wonke ukunakekela wonke amalungu omphakathi adinga lolu sizo olusemqoka kakhulu emimpilweni yawo yansuku zonke.

Lokhu kulungiswa kwemigwaqo kulandela izikhalazo eziningi ezivela kubashayeli bezimoto nabantu abahamba ngezinyawo abathi le migwaqo corresponds ayisaseleki ngenxa yemigodi emikhulu. Uhlelo lolu luhlinzeka ngamathuba emisebenzi eminingi entsha kubantu abasha abangasebenzi abahlala kuleyo miphakathi ethintekayo kulolu hlelo lwentuthuko. Ngaphandle kokwenza ngcono ingqalasizinda yezokuthutha lolu hlelo luletha ithemba elisha kwezoqoqosho lwasemakhaya ngokwenza ukuba kube lula ukuthuthwa kwempahla. Izinkampani ezincane zendawo nazo zithole amathuba okwenza imisebenzi engaphansi kwale phrojekthi enkulu yentuthuko kamasipala wasendaweni.

Kulandela le nkinga iziphathimandla zikamasipala zihlangene nomphakathi ukudingida amasu amasha azosetshenziswa ukulungisa amaphayipi amadala adala ukuvuza kwamanzi amaningi nsuku zonke. Inkinga yamanzi ibaphazamise kakhulu abantu bakule ndawo ikakhulukazi izikole nemitholampilo emincane edinga amanzi ngaso sonke isikhathi ukuze isebenze ngendlela efanele. Uhlelo oluphuthumayo lokuthutha amanzi ngamaloli seluqalile ngenkathi kuza isixazululo esihlala njalo sokwakhiwa kwechibi elisha lokugcina amanzi amaningi. Izakhamuzi zamukele lolu hlelo lwamaloli nakuba zicela ukuba umsebenzi wokulungisa amaphayipi ushisekiswe ngamandla amakhulu ukuze konke kubuyele kwayizolo.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angcolile kulezi zindawo zasemijondolo sekudale ukuba iziphathimandla zithathe izinyathelo ezinqala zokuhlanza indawo yonke ngenhloso yokuvikela impilo yomphakathi jikelele. Uhlelo lokuhlanza imvelo oluqalwe kuleli sonto luholwa ngamalungu omphakathi ngokwawo abambisene nezisebenzi zikamasipala ezengamele ezempilo nemvelo kulezo zindawo ezithintekile kakhulu. Kunqwabelana kukadoti ezitaladini kukhonjwe njengenye yezinto ezidala izifo eziningi kubantwana abancane abadlala kulezi zindawo ezisondeduze nemizi yabo. Ngo-opharetha bama-skhiphu bazoletha izitsha ezinkulu zokulahla udoti ukuze abantu bangabe besalahla izibi noma kuphi ezindaweni zomphakathi ezivulekile.

Isikhungo lesi sizofaka ngaphansi kwaso amahhovisi oMnyango wezeKhaya, awezeMisebenzi kanye nendawo lapho intsha ingathola khona ulwazi ngezifundo namathuba emisebenzi ekhona ezweni. Umphakathi ukhombise ukuthokoza okukhulu ngalesi sinqumo ngoba sizobasiza kakhulu ekugcineni isikhathi nemali ebingachithwa ngokuya emadolobheni amakhulu amade. Intsha yakule ndawo izokwazi ukusebenzisa i-inthanethi yamahhala kulesi sikhungo ukufuna imisebenzi nokufaka izicelo zokufunda emanyuvesi ahlukene ezwe lonke. Kwakhiwa kwalesi sikhungo kuzoqala ngokushesha kule nyanga ezayo kulandela ukuphothulwa kwezinhlelo zokwabiwa kwezimali ezidingekayo kule phrojekthi yomphakathi.

Leli su elisha lokwabiwa kwezimali zentuthuko lihlose ukwenza ukuba izidingo ezisondelene kakhulu nabantu kube zona ezibekwa phambili ngaso sonke isikhathi sokusebenza. Abahlali bacelwe ukuba baphakamise amaphrojekthi abona ukuthi aqakathekile kakhulu njengokwakhiwa kwezinkulisa, izikhungo zentsha kanye nokufakwa kwezibani ezitaladini zendawo ukulwa nobugebengu. Kamasipala uzobamba eminye imihlangano kulezi zigodi ezahlukene ukuze kutholakale imibono yabantu abaningi ngangokunokwenzeka ngaphambi kokuba ibhajethi iphasiswe ngokusemthethweni. Indlela endala yokuthatha izinqumo ngaphandle kokubonisana nabantu igxekiwe ngoba ivame ukuletha izinto abantu abangazidingi ngaleso sikhathi esithile sokuthuthuka.

Lolu hlelo luphawula isinyathelo esikhulu esibhekiswe ekunikezeni intsha amathuba amahle okuziphilisa ngokwakha izinkampani ezincane noma ngokuthola imisebenzi ezimbonini zendawo ezinkulu. Abafundi abangenile kulolu hlelo bazoletha usizo olukhulu emiphakathini yabo ngoba bazoqeqeshelwa imisebenzi efana nokushisela, amapulangwe, ukulungisa amagesi kanye nokwakha ngezitini. Izikhungo zemfundo yezandla zendawo zibambisene nohulumeni ukuhlinzeka ngalolu qeqesho oluzothatha isikhathi esiyizinyanga eziyisithupha zomsebenzi onzima kodwa ovuzayo. Kulindeleke ukuba emva kwalesi sikhathi abafundi bathole izitifiketi ezivunyelwe ngokusemthethweni ezizobasiza ukuba bangene emakethe yezabasebenzi kalula.

Emaphethelong amadolobha amakhulu kunezinselelo eziningi ezithinta ukutholakala kwezindlu zomphakathi ezisezingeni elamukelekile ngenxa yokwanda okusheshayo kwesibalo sabantu abafudukela kulezi zindawo ezintsha. Uhulumeni useqalise iphrojekthi enkulu yokwakhiwa kwezindlu zoxhaso ezizohlomulisa imindeni eminingi ebihlala ezindaweni ezingalungile nezisengozini ngezikhathi zezikhukhula nemililo emibi. Lolu hlelo lokwakha luzohlanganisa nokufakwa kwengqalasizinda eyisisekelo njengemigwaqo yetiyela, amaphayipi amanzi ahlanzekile kanye nezixhumi zikagesi ezisemthethweni emizini yonke emisha ezokwakhiwa. Abantu abazohlomula kulezi zindlu bakhethwe ngokulandela uhlu lwabantu abalinde izindlu isikhathi eside ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi kutholwa ubulungiswa nenkohlakalo iyaphela.

Le paki eyakhiwe endaweni ebiye yaziwa ngokuba yindawo yokulahla udoti ngokungemthethetho isiguqule ukubukeka kwayo yonke le ndawo ebihlezi inukela abantu kabi. Masipala usebenzise izimali ezikhethekile ukuthenga izinsiza zokudlala ezifana nama-swing nezindawo zokuhlala zomphakathi ngenkathi kutshalwa nezihlahla ezinhle eziletha umthunzi. Umphakathi uzibophezele ukulinda nokuphatha le ndawo ngendlela efanelekile ukugwema ukuba icekelwe phansi ngabantu abangafuni ukubona intuthuko ezindaweni zethu. Amaphisa omdabu kanye namalungu ezokuphepha omphakathi bazohlala bepatrola kule ndawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izingane zidlala ngokukhululeka ngaphandle kokwesaba abaphuli bomthetho.

Izindlela ezintsha zokuxhumana phakathi kukamasipala nezakhamuzi zethulwe kuleli sonto ngenhloso yokwenza ngcono isikhathi esithathwayo ukulungisa izinkinga ezifana nokunqamuka kwemisebenzi kagesi nokuvuza kwamanzi. Lolu hlelo olubandakanya uhlelo lokuthumela imiyalezo elula kumakhalekhukhwini luzosiza abantu ukuba babike izinkinga ngokushesha futhi bathole nezinombolo zolwazi zokulandelela umsebenzi lowo owenziwayo. Phambilini abantu bebekhala kakhulu ngokuthi izingcingo zabo aziphendulwa emahgovisini amakhulu ezikhalazo okubenza bazizwe benganakekile neze nguhulumeni wabo wasendaweni. Manje ngalolu hlelo olusha isikhalazo somuntu ngamunye sizoya ngqo ethimbeni eliseduze labasebenzi bezobuchwepheshe ukuze bayolungisa inkinga leyo ngokushesha okukhulu.

Uhulumeni unqume ukwaba izimali ezikhethekile zokuvuselela la mahhovisi amadala amaningi awo asakhiwa eminyakeni eminingi edlule ebonakala ewohloka kakhulu kulezi zinsuku. Uhlelo lolu lokuvuselela luzofaka phakathi ukufakwa kwezinhlelo ezintsha zokuzivikela emililweni, ukulungiswa kophahla oluvuza amanzi kanye nokwenza izindawo zokungena zibe lula kubantu abaphila nokukhubazeka. Lokhu kwenziwa ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu uthola izinsiza ngendlela enesithunzi nasezindaweni ezihlanzekile nezivikelekile ngaso sonke isikhathi somsebenzi. Abasebenzi bezinyunyana bazwakalise ukusisekela lesi sinqumo sokuphuthumisa ukulungiswa kwezindawo zokusebenza ngoba bekuyinto isikhathi eside bezwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngayo emhlanganweni yabasebenzi.

Lolu hlelo luza njengesixazululo esibonakalayo sokuvikela izimpilo zabantwana besikole abavame ukuphuthelwa izifundo zabo ngezikhathi lapho imifula igcwala khona kakhulu kulezi zindawo zasemakhaya. Amabhuloho la azakhiwa ngokubambisana phakathi komnyango wezisebenzi zikahulumeni kanye nebutho lezobunjiniyela lazo zonke izinhlaka zokuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda ezweni lethu. Umphakathi uceliwe ukuba unikeze amagama ezindawo lapho kunesidingo esiphuthumayo khona ukuze izazi zezobuchwepheshe zikwazi ukwenza izinhlelo zokuhlola indawo ngaphambi kokuba umsebenzi uqale. Abazali bezingane bazwakalise ukukhululeka okukhulu emoyeni wabo kulandela lesi simiso ngoba bebehlezi besaba ukuthi izingane zabo zingasekelwa ngamanzi uma kuza izikhukhula ezizumayo.

Lolu hlelo luhloselwe ukusiza imindeni ehlwempu kakhulu naleyo ehlaselwe yizehlakalo ezingalindelekile ezifana nemililo ecekela phansi izindlu nempahla yabo yonke ngemizuzu embalwa nje. Isikole lesi esakhiwe ngokubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni nezinkampani ezizimele sinezindawo zokugcina izilwane nezitshalo lapho abafundi bezofunda khona ngendlela ephathekayo nenzuzo yokulima ngezindlela zesimanje. Izikhulu zezemfundo ziveze ukuthi lolu hlelo luzosiza ekutheni intsha ingagcini nje ngokufuna imisebenzi yasemahgovisini kodwa ikwazi ukuzivulela amathuba amabhizinisi ezolimo azothuthukisa umnotho wasemakhaya. Abazali babafundi bazwakalise ukuthokoza okukhulu ngalesi sikole bethi abantwana babo manje sebethola imfundo ezobasiza ngokushesha empilweni yabo yansuku zonke ngaphandle kokulinda imisebenzi iminyaka eminingi emva kokuphothula izifundo zabo zasemasekhondari.

Lo mtapo wezincwadi obulokhu ulindelwe isikhathi eside unendawo ekhethekile eyenzelwe abantwana abancane lapho bezokwazi ukufunda khona amabhuku anezithombe ngezimpelasonto ngenhloso yokukhulisa uthando lokufunda kubo besebancane. Uhlelo lolu lokwakha imizila yemfundo lusekelwe ngezimali ngumasipala wesifunda obone ukuthi abafundi bakule ndawo baphuthelwa amathuba amaningi amahle ngenxa yokushoda kwezincwadi ezidingekayo ezifundweni zabo ezinkulu. Amakomiti ezikole acele amalungu omphakathi ukuba baphathise la mabhuku kahle futhi bangawacekele phansi ukuze akwazi ukusiza nezinye izizukulwane ezizayo ezisadinga ukufunda nokuthola ulwazi. Kuzoba nabasebenzi abaqeqeshiwe abazohlala bekhona ukusiza abafundi ngezindlela zokuthola ulwazi emikhakheni ehlukene yezifundo zabo zasendaweni.

Izindlela ezintsha zokusekelwa kwabafundi bematrikhi ezifundeni zasemakhaya zethulwe ngomkhankaso wamakilasi angeziwe ngezimpelasonto nangezikhathi zamaholide ezikole ngenhloso yokwenziwa ngcono kwemiphumela yabo ekupheleni konyaka wokufunda. Lolu hlelo olubandakanya othisha abaneminyaka eminingi yesipiliyoni sizosiza abafundi ukuba babuyekeze izihloko ezinzima kakhulu ezifana nezibalo, isayensi yezinto eziphilayo kanye nezolimo ezivame ukuba nezinkinga kubantu abaningi. Uhulumeni unqume ukuhlinzeka ngokudla kwamahhala nezithuthi kubafundi bonke abazoba khona kulezi zinhlelo zokufunda ukuze bangabi nengcindezi yezindleko ezisindayo emakhaya abo ampofu.

Lolu hlelo lokuxhasa ngezimali luzohlanganisa nezindleko zendawo yokuhlala, izincwadi zokufunda kanye nemali yokudla yanyanga zonke ukuze umfundi ngamunye akwazi ukugxila ezifundweni zakhe ngokugcwele ngaphandle kokukhathazeka ngokuxoshwa. Izikhulu ziveze ukuthi zizosebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuza kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izimali zikhishwa ngesikhathi esifanele ukugwema imibhikisho nokuphazamiseka kwezifundo emakhemphasini ahlukene ezwe lethu phakathi nonyaka wokufunda olandelayo. Abafundi bacelwe ukuba baphase izifundo zabo ngendlela efanele ukuze baqhubeke nokuthola lolu xhaso olubaluleke kakhulu oluvela emphakathini wasendaweni yethu nasebukhosini jikelele.

Lazi izikhungo ezaziwa ngama-TVET amakolishi azohlanganisa izifundo zabo nezidingo zezimboni zendawo ukuze abafundi bathole amathuba okwenza imisebenzi ephathekayo ngezikhathi zokufunda kwabo phakathi nonyaka wokufunda olandelayo. Intsha yakule ndawo izokwazi ukubhalisela izifundo ezifana nezobunjiniyela bezimoto, ukwakhiwa kwezindlu kanye nezinhlelo zekhompiyutha ngaphandle kokuhambela kude nemizi yabo yasemakhaya. Umphakathi uwamkele ngomdlandla omkhulu lo mklamo omuhle bethi uzobasiza kakhulu abantwana babo ukuba bazuze ulwazi oluzobafaka emisebenzini ekhokhayo masinyane emva kokuphothula izifundo zabo zokuqala.

Uhlelo lolu luhloselwe ukusiza ikakhulukazi abantu asebabadala, abantwana abancane kanye nalabo abaphila nezifo ezihlala njalo emizimbeni yabo abasengozini enkulu yokungenwa yimikhuhlane eyingozi kalula emphakathini. Umnyango usebenzise izinkundla zomphakathi ezahlukene nezikhungo zomphakathi eziseduze ukunikeza lolu sizo lomgomo wamahhala ukuze wonke umuntu akwazi ukufikelela kulo ngaphandle kokukhokha izindleko zezokuthutha eziya ezibhedlela ezinkulu. Odokotela nabahlengikazi bendawo bakhuthaze abantu ukuba balandele izindlela ezifanelekile zokuzigcina behlanzekile ngezikhathi zonke ukugwema ukubhebhetheka kwezifo phakathi kwemindeni yabo emakhaya.

Lolu hlelo oluholwa yizisebenzi zezempilo zomphakathi luhlose ukunciphisa isibalo sabantu abasha abangenelelwa yilezi zifo ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi ngezindlela zokuzivikela nemicabango engeyona ekhona phakathi kwabantu. Abahlali bathole namathuba okuhlolwa mahhala igazi labo ukwazi isimo sabo sezempilo khona lapho emhlanganweni baphinde bathole nezeluleko ezinhle zendlela yokuziphatha neyokudla ukudla okwakha umzimba okufanele kulezi zinsuku. Uhulumeni unqume ukuthi imithi yokwelapha izifo ezihlala njalo izohlala itholakala ngesikhathi esifanele kuzo zonke izikhungo zezempilo ukuze abantu bangahlupheki ngenxa yokushoda kwayo emahgovisini ezempilo.

Lolu hlelo oluqhubeke izinsuku ezinhlanu lusize abantu abaningi asebabadala abebengasakwazi ukubona kahle ngenxa yokungabi nazo izimali zokuya kodokotela abazimele ababiza izimali eziningi kakhulu ezingaphezu kwamandla abo ezomnotho. Izisebenzi zezempilo zomphakathi zizohlala zihlola izimo zabantu emakhaya emva kwalezi zinhlinzo ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi amehlo abo ayalulama ngendlela efanele nenhlanzi ngaphando kokungenwa yizifo ezintsha zendawo. Umphakathi uwamkele ngolukhulu uthando lolu sizo bethi seluzobuyisela ukukhanya nethemba ezimpilweni zabo zansuku zonke njengoba manje sebengakwazi ukuzenzela izinto eziningi emakhaya abo ngaphandle kokuncika njalo ezihlotsheni zabo.

Lo mgwaqo obulokhu unodaka nemigodi emikhulu iminyaka eminingi ubuvame ukudala ukuthi amatekisi namabhasi angakwazi ukufika ezindaweni ezithile ngezikhathi zezimvula ezinkulu okwakubambezela abasebenzi nabantwana besikole abaningi. Uhlelo lolu lokwakha luzothatha izinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili futhi luzonikeza amathuba emisebenzi eminingi yesikhashana kubantu bendawo abangasebenzi abazothola amakhono ekwakhiweni kwemigwaqo nemisele yamanzi elungile emphakathini. Kamasipala ucele abashayeli bezimoto ukuba basebenzise eminye imigwaqo eseceleni ngesikhathi kusaqhubeka lo msebenzi omkhulu wokwakha ukugwema ingozi nokuminyana okungenasidingo phakathi nezinsuku zomsebenzi.

Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko luhlose ukubhekana nenkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile ebilokhu ihlupha abantu ngenxa yokwanda okusheshayo kwesibalo sezindlu ezakhiwayo kulezi zindawo ezintsha zokuhlala zomphakathi wethu. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziveze ukuthi zizosebenzisa izinto zokusebenza ezisezingeni eliphezulu kakhulu ukuze la maphayipi amasha akwazi ukuthwala amanzi amaningi isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokugqashuka noma okonakala kalula ngenxa yomfutho wamanzi. Abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngendlela efanele futhi babike noma yikuphi ukuvuza okubonakala emigwaqweni ukuze kuthunyelwe abasebenzi bezobuchwepheshe ngokushesha ukuzolungisa inkinga leyo ngaphambi kokuba amanzi amaningi achitheke phansi kabi.

Leli phulo lamalungiselelo eentsuku ezimbili lijolise ekuncedeni abemi abangakwazi kufikelela lula kwiiofisi ezinkulu ezisezidolophini ngenxa yeendleko eziphezulu zokuhamba ngezinto zokuthutha zoluntu kule mihla. Abahlali bakwazile ukufaka izicelo zomazisi bentsana bafumana neengcebiso ezimalunga namathuba emisebenzi ematsha anikezelwa ngumasipala wengingqi kulo nyaka-mali uqalayo. Amagosa emveli kunye neenkokheli zoluntu bazwakalise ungcangcazelo olukhulu ngenxa yale ndlela entsha nekhawulezayo yokuzisa uncedo ebantwini abampofu abasemaphandleni. Urhulumente uzibophelele ukuba lolu hlelo luza kujikeleza nakweminye imizana ekude kakhulu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho namnye ummi oshiywayo ngaphambili kwiinkonzo ezisisiseko zobomi bentsuku ngentsuku.

Le nqubo iqale ngemikhankaso yeendibano zoluntu apho wonke ummi enikwa ithuba lokubeka izimvo zakhe ezizakukunceda ekubumbeni umthetho wokugqibela ozakuthi uphasiswe yipalamente yelizwe lethu kungekudala. Iinkokheli zoluntu ziveze ukuba inkoliso yabantu ebihlelelekile ixesha elide phantsi kwemithetho emidala ngoku iza kufumana isidima samalungelo agcweleyo okuba nemihlaba yezolimo neyokuhlala. Amagosa omnyango wezemihlaba acacise ukuba le ndlela entsha iza kunciphisa neengxabano ezihlala zikhona phakathi kwemindeni malunga nokwabiwa kwemihlaba yezikhumbuzo emakhaya. Abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba bazimase le mi hlangano ngobuninzi babo kwaye bangabi naloyiko lokuthetha ngezinto ezibakhathazayo ukuze kuzuze isizwe sonke ngokulinganayo nangesithethe esihle kakhulu.

Kulandela le meko imbi ikomiti yoluntu ihlangene nabaphathi bephandle lamapolisa kunye nabameli bakamasipala wengingqi ukulungiselela amanyathelo okhuseleko akhawulezileyo azakuthathwa kule veki. Kuvele ukuba masipala usele uqalise inkqubo yokuthenga izixhobo ezitsha zombane kwaye amagcisa azakuthunyelwa kule ndawo ukulungisa zonke izibane ezonakeleyo kwakamsinya nje. Ngeli xesha kulindwe ezo zilungiso amapolisa azakwandisa ukujikeleza ngeemoto zawo ezindaweni ezaziwa ngokuba yingozi kakhulu kuluntu jikelele lwale ndawo. Izakhamuzi nazo ziceliwe ukuba ziseke amaqela okhuseleko aza kusebenzisana nomthetho ukukhusela abantwana kunye nabantu abadala abasesichengeni. Eli phulo lithembisa ukuzisa uxolo nokuphungula ulwaphulo-mthetho olujongene nabemi.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angcolileyo kule lali yaseNgcobo kukhokelele ekubeni abantu basekuhlaleni baququzelele uqhankqalazo olunoluleko ngenjongo yokwazisa urhulumente ngobunzima abajongene nabo mihla le. Iphulo eli likhokelele ekubeni imeya kamasipala wasesifundeni ihambele le lali buqu ukuziphula izikhalo zabahlali nokuza nezisombululo ezizakukhawulezisa ukuziswa kweenkonzo zophuhliso lwangaphakathi. Kule ndibano kumenyezelwe ukuba ithenda yokulungiswa kwendlela eya kule lali sele inikiwe inkampani yokwakha kwaye izixhobo zizakufika kule ndawo phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga. Malunga nemiba yamanzi amapompo amatsha azakulungiswa kwaye kuthunyelwe neelori zamanzi ezizakubonelela uluntu ngexesha kusasetyenzwa kule ngqalasizinda indala yonakeleyo ngenxa yexesha elide isetyenziswa.

Eli ziko lizakubonelela abantwana besikole kunye nolutsha olungasebenziyo ngethuba lokusebenzisa i-inthanethi yasimahla ukufunda imisebenzi emitsha nokuphuhlisa izakhono zabo zezandla nezekhompyutha. Ikhomiti yoluntu ivakalise uvuyo olukhulu ngale nkqubo kuba iza kunceda ukunciphisa isibalo solutsha oluhlala ezitratweni lungenzi nto nto leyo ebangela ukuba bazibandakanye nemikhuba emibi ebulala ikusasa labo. Ootitshala bezikole zengingqi nabo bathembe ukuba eli ziko liza kuphucula imfundo yabantwana kuba baza kukwazi ukwenza uphando lwezifundo zabo lula kunesikhathi esidlulileyo lapho begenazo ezi zixhobo zibalulekileyo. Umsebenzi wokwakha eli ziko ulindeleke ukuba uqalise kungekudala kwaye abasebenzi beza kukhathwa kulona lolu luntu lwasengingqi.

Kule ndibano abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba baqale inkqubo yokuhlula inkukuma emakhaya abo kwaye kukhuthazwe nabantu abasakhulayo ukuba baqale amabhizinisi amancinci okuhlaziya nokusebenzisa kwakhona izinto ezilahliweyo ukwenza ingeniso. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni uzakubonelela ngeebhakethi ezinkulu ezitsha zomgqomo kwaye iilori zikamasipala zizakuzilanda ngamaxesha azinzileyo angenziwa tshintsho ngaphandle kokwazisa uluntu ngaphambili. Leli nyathelo lijolise ekunqandeni ukulahlwa kwenkukuma ezitratweni nakwimijelo yamanzi nto leyo edala izifo ezininzi kwaye yonakalise nendalo entle yommandla wethu esizingca ngayo jikelele. Abahlali bavumelene ngam voice anye ukuba baza kusebenzisana nomasipala ukugcina indawo ihlanzekile kwaye baphose isandla kule nkqubo intsha entle.

Olu bhekiso lwenziwe ngurhulumente njengenxalenye yesisombululo sokulwa nengxaki yokucinywa kombane ekhathaza kakhulu uqoqosho lwelizwe kule mihla siphila kuyo ngoku. Abahlali bakwazile ukufumana olu ncedo ngenxa yokuba kude kwabo kwizikhululo ezikhulu zombane ezisentshonalanga nto leyo eyenza ukuba ukufakelwa kweentambo zombane eziqhelekileyo kubize izimali ezininzi kakhulu nezingaphaya kwamandla kamasipala. Intsha yale ndawo iqeqeshiwe ekufakeni nasekulungiseni la mapaneli elanga ukuze ihlale ikhona ngezikhathi apho kufuneka khona ulungiso lwezixhobo ngaphandle kokulinda amagcisa avela kude ezidolophini ezinkulu. Eli phulo lilethe ithemba nomdlandla omtsha ebantwini abadala nasebantwaneni abasakwazi ukufunda ebusuku kunesikhathi apho bebesebenzisa amakhandlela ayingozi kakhulu emakhaya.

Emaphethelong edolophu yaseBhaufonti kuqalwe ulwakhiwo lwezindlu zoluntu ezitsha ezizakuhlala abantu abashenxiswayo kwiindawo zasemijondolo ezisesichengeni seentlekele ezifana nezikhukhula nemililo emibi yasebusika. Le phrojekthi enkulu iza kunika abantu iindawo zokuhlala ezikhuselekileyo ezinezindlu zangasese ezisetyenziswa ngamanzi kunye nemigwaqo efanelekileyo etiyelweyo evumela iimoto zongxami-moya namapolisa ukuba afike lula xa kukho isidingo somsebenzi. Amagosa ezindlu aphawule ukuba uluhlu lwabantu abaza kufumana ezi zindlu luhloliwe ngobuchule obukhulu ukunqanda ubuqhetseba kunye nenkohlakalo ethanda ukwenzeka kwiinkqubo ezinjazi zokunikezelwa kwezindlu zoluntu zoxhaso.

Olu qeqesho lolwexesha eliliyeza iinyanga ezintandathu kwaye abafundi baza kufumana izitifiketi ezamkelweyo ngokusemthethweni ezizakubanceda ukuba bafumane imisebenzi ezinzileyo okanye baqale amashishini wabo amancinci. Urhulumente wesifundazwe unikezele ngezimali zokuthenga izixhobo zokusebenza kwaye wonke umfundi uza kufumana nenkxaso encinci yenyanga yokuhamba ukuya kwizikhululo zoqeqesho. Iinkokheli zasekuhlaleni zizwakalise ukuba olu luhlobo lwenguqu oludingekayo kummandla wethu ukulwa nendlala nentswela-mizala engaka ebonakala mihla le phakathi kwolutsha lwethu lwesizwe. Abazali bakhuthaze abantwana babo ukuba balubambe ngazo zombini eli thuba lihle kakhulu kwaye baziphathe ngendlela eyonelisayo nenebambiswano ngethuba lesifundo sezakhono.

Izindlela ezintsha zokunikezelwa kweenkonzo zoluntu zamkelwe ngomdla omkhulu kwingqungquthela yabaphathi bamabhodi eziphathamandla zasekuhlaleni apho kuxoxwe ngokusetyenziswa kwezixhobo zale mihla zekhompyutha ukukhawulezisa uncedo ebantwini. Ngaloo ndlela entsha abemi baza kukwazi ukubika iingxaki ezifana nokuvuza kwamanzi kunye nokunqamuka kombane besebenzisa amasuntsu emiyalezo kwiziselfoni zabo ngaphandle kokuba baye kuma ngemigca emide kwii-ofisi zikamasipala. Le nkqubo iza kunceda kakhulu ekwenzeni abasebenzi baka-masipala basabele ngokukhawuleza kwiingxaki zoluntu kwaye kuvalwe nethuba lokuba abahlali bazive bengakhathalelwanga ngabasizi babo bakarhulumente.

Le nkqubo iququzelelwe ngumnyango wezokuhlaliswa kwabantu ngokubambisana nabenzi-mithetho basekuhlaleni ukulungisa iimpazamo zamandulo apho abantu babenemizi kodwa bengenazo iincwadi ezibonisa ubunini bomhlaba ngokusemthethweni. Ukuba netaytile yomhlaba kunceda umndeni ukuba ukwazi ukusebenzisa ikhaya lawo njengesikhuseleko xa ufuna ukufaka izicelo zemali mboleko emabhankini ukuba uqale amashishini okanye uphuhlise ikhaya lalo ukuba libe lihle kakhulu. Amagosa karhulumente acele uluntu ukuba luze lukhawulezise ukuzisa amaxwebhu adingekayo afana nezatifiketi zokuzalwa neempepha zomhlaba zakudala ukuze le nkqubo igqitywe ngexesha elifanelekileyo ngaphandle kokulibaziseka okukhulu kwezicelo zabo ezifakiweyo.

Olu phuhliso luncediswa ngemali evela kwingxowa-mali yesizwe yophuhliso kwaye lujolise ekwenzeni la maziko ukuba abe ziindawo apho abantu bafumana khona uncedo oluhle ngeendaba zasekuhlaleni nemicimbi yamasiko nezithethe zethu ezintle. Izakhamuzi zizwakalise ungcangcazelo kuba le misebenzi iza kudala imisebenzi elikhulu kubantu abahlala kule mimandla kwaye kuphuculwe nendlela yokuhambisa ulwazi phakathi kukamasipala nabasekuhlaleni jikelele. Iinkosi zomdabu zizwakalise umbulelo wazo zathi le nkqubo iza kubuyisela intlonipho nendlela efanelekileyo yokulawula nokuphatha imicimbi yoluntu njengoko kwakusenziwa mandulo kukhokelo lwesizwe sakithi. Umsebenzi lo ulindeleke ukuba uphele kwiinyanga ezizayo phambi kokuba kuqale ixesha lasebusika obubandayo kakhulu.

Kulandela ezi zikhalazo abaphathi bakamasipala bathumele ithimba lamagcisa ezobunjiniyela ukuba baphonononge indlela amashaneli amanzi akhiwe ngayo nokuza nesicwangciso esitsha sokwandisa imibhobho ehambisa amanzi emvula aye emilanjeni ekude. Oku kuza kunceda kakhulu ekukhuseleni imizi yoluntu ngakumbi amakhaya lawo akhwamele ezindaweni ezisezantsi nezingasentla apho amanzi aqukuqela ngamandla kakhulu xa kukho izaqhwithi ezinkulu zezulu. Ikomiti yoluntu icele abahlali ukuba bangalahli inkukuma kule misele yamanzi kuba oko kubangela ukuba ivaleke kwaye kudaleke le ngxaki yokuzala kwamanzi ezitratweni nasezindlini zomphakathi wasendaweni. Umsebenzi lo uza kuqala kule veki kwaye urhulumente uqinisekisile ukuba izimali zokhuseleko zikhona ezanele lo msebenzi.

Izindlela ezinqala zokulwa nokunqandwa kobuqhetseba kwiithenda zentuthuko zekhondishini entsha zethulwe ngumbusi wesifundazwe kule veki ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba iimali zoluntu zisetyenziswa ngendlela efanelekileyo nenyanisekileyo kuwo wonke amasebe karhulumente. Leli qhinga elitsha liza kufuna ukuba zonke iinkampani ezifaka izicelo zeethenda ziveze amagama abanini bazo ngokupheleleyo kwaye kuhlolwe neerekhodi zabo zerhafu ukunqanda ukuba abasebenzi baka-masipala banikeze imisebenzi kwizihlobo zabo. Urhulumente uzimisele ukugxotha naluphi na igosa elifunyaniswa linobudlelwane obungekho mthethweni neenkampani zokwakha kwaye iinkampani ezinjalo zizakubekwa kuluhlu olubomvu ukuze zingaphindi zifumane misebenzi karhulumente iminyaka emininzi ezayo.

Lolu ncedo lujolise ekubaxhaseni ukuba bathenge izixhobo zokusebenza ezifana nemishini yokuthunga, izixhobo zokubhaka kunye nezinto zokwenza imisebenzi yezandla eziza kubenza bakwazi ukuzimela ngokwabo ngokwengqondo nangokwemali emakhaya. Amagosa ezenhlalakahle azakubamba iindibano zokufundisa abantu indlela yokubhala izicwangciso zamabhizinisi kunye nendlela yokulawula iimali ukuze la mabhizinisi angawi emva kwexesha elifutshane nje ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi ngezobhizinisi zale mihla. Uluntu luzwakalise uvuyo nombulelo omkhulu ngenxa yale nkqubo ekhombisa ukuba urhulumente akayilibali imiphakathi esemajengetheni kwaye uyabakhathalela abantu bonke kungakhathaliseki imeko zabo zomzimba nezoqoqosho ezikhona ebomini babo.

Imeko le ibeka ubomi babahlali esichengeni esikhulu ngakumbi ngezikhathi zobusuku lapho kungekho zithuthi zoluntu zokubasa ezibhedlela ezinkulu ezisezidolophini xa kukho izigulane ezingxamisekileyo emakhaya. Isebe lezempilo liphendule ngokuthi izicwangciso zolwakhiwo zikumgangatho ophezulu kwaye umhlaba sele ukhonjiwe apho lo mtholampilo uzakwakhiwa khona kulo nyaka uzayo emva kokuba iimali zentuthuko zikhutshwe ngokupheleleyo yibhanki yesizwe. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba babekezele kwaye basebenzisane namagosa ezempilo aza kuthumela iilori ezizizikhululo zonyango zethutyana ukunika uncedo lwamayeza rhoqo ngeveki kule ndawo kude kube kugqitywa ulwakhiwo lwesakhiwo esitsha esihlala njalo somtholampilo woluntu.

Olu qeqesho luza kunika la malungu amatsha omphakathi amathuba amahle okufumana imisebenzi njengabalindi bendlela, abalindi bokhuseleko ezitolo nakwiindawo zokungcebeleka zoluntu ezityelelwa ziindwendwe ezininzi ezivela kumazwe angaphandle ngezikhathi zeholide. Amagosa ezothutho liveze ukuthi le nkqubo yinxalenye yendlela yokulwa nokuntuleka kwemisebenzi kummandla kwaye kuphuculwe nendlela yoluleko nokugcinwa komthetho kwiindlela zethu zasekuhlaleni eziqhele ukuba nezingozi ezininzi kakhulu zendlela ngenxa yokungathotyelwa kwemithetho. Abazali babafundi bavakalise umbulelo wabo bethi oku kuza kunceda abantwana babo ukuba bangangeni kwimikhuba emibi yokusebenzisa iziyobisi ngenxa yokuhlala bengenzi nto emakhaya yonke imihla yaphambi kokuba bafumane olu qeqesho lubalulekileyo lwezandla.

Lolu hlelo lwamandla avuselelekayo luzise isisombululo esikhulu nesihlala njalo kuba la mapompo awakho madinga kagesi uqhelekileyo ukuba asebenze kwaye akwazi ukupompa amanzi amananingi asuka ngaphantsi komhlaba aye emakhoneni onke aloo mizi yasezilalini. Amagosa ezamanzi acacise ukuba uluntu lwalapha lufundisiwe nendlela efanelekileyo yokunakekela ezi zixhobo zexabiso eliphezulu ukunqanda ukuba zingonakaliswa ngabantu abangafuni kuphucuka loluntu lwethu. Izakhamuzi zivakalise uvuyo olukhulu zathi ngoku zizakukwazi ukwenza neengadi zasemakhaya zokutshala imifino emitsha ezakubasiza ukulwa nendlala nobumpofu obuhlala bukhona emakhaya ngenxa yokunqaba kwemisebenzi kule mihla siphila kuyo ngoku elizweni jikelele laseMzantsi Afrika.

Le nkqubo entsha ihamba phambili ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba ubuqhetseba buyaphela kwaye abantu abafanele ukufumana izindlu ze-RDP ngabo batholayo ngendlela echanekileyo nenesidima emthethweni wesizwe sakithi. Amagosa kamasipala athembise ukuba iimpazamo zexesha elidlulileyo apho izindlu zazifunyanwa ngabantu abaneemali mboleko zombane okanye izihlobo zamagosa zizakulungiswa ngale ndlela entsha yokuhlola iinkqubo zofako-zicelo zoluntu jikelele. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba baphose isandla ngokubika naluphi na ubuqhetseba ababubonayo kule nkqubo ukuze kuthathwe amanyathelo asemthethweni anqala kwizaphuli-mthetho ezifuna ukonakalisa umsebenzi omhle wentuthuko eza kukhulisa isidima nempilo yoluntu lonke lwale ndawo.

Olu qeqesho lwenziwe ngeendatshana ezilula apho osomabhizinisi bafundiswe indlela yokusebenzisa imfonomfono zabo ukukhangisa iimveliso zabo kwizinto zentlalontle ezifana ne-Facebook ne-WhatsApp ukufikelela kubathengi abaninzi abatsha kakhulu ezidolophini. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni ukwazise ukuba lolu ncedo luza kunceda ekutheni la mabhizinisi amancinci akwazi ukukhula kwaye aqashe abantu abaninzi kule miphakathi yethu ehluphekayo ngenxa yokushoda kwemisebenzi ezinzileyo kulo nyaka. Osomabhizinisi abagqibe olu qeqesho baza kufumana izitifiketi ezizakubanceda naxa befaka izicelo zenkxaso-mali emabhankini amakhulu nasezikhungweni zophuhliso zikahulumeni ezisiza amahlwempu namashishini asafufusa elizweni jikelele.

Leli ziko elitsha lifaka phakathi iiofisi zeSebe lezaseKhaya, elezeZenhlalakahle kunye nendawo lapho ulutsha lungafumana khona uncedo ngeekhompyutha ne-inthanethi yasimahla yokufaka izicelo zemisebenzi nemfundo ephakamileyo emanyuvesi ahlukeneyo elizwe lakithi. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni uqinisekisile ukuba eli ziko liza kusebenza ngeentsuku zonke zeviki kwaye abasebenzi beza kukhathwa kulona lolu luntu lwasengingqi ngenjongo yokunciphisa intswela-mizala nentswela-ngqesho ebonakala kule mimandla yethu emakhaya jikelele.

Olu hlelo lutsha lokuhambela abantu emakhaya abo luholwa yizisebenzi zomphakathi ezithunyelwe mnyango wezenhlalakahle ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntwana ofanelekileyo uyafikelela kule nkxaso yezimali eyenzelwe ukuthenga ukudla okunempilo, ubisi kunye neengubo zokunxiba zasesikolweni. Izisebenzi ezi zihamba neefomu zofako-zicelo kwaye zisinceda kakhulu isizwe ngokuhlola imeko yezoqoqosho yeentsapho ezihluphekayo ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi uncedo luya kulabo abaludinga ngempela ngenxa yokungabikho kwemisebenzi ezinzileyo kule mimandla yethu yasemakhaya. Abazali nabagcinisihlalo beentsapho bakhuthaziwe ukuba balungise amaxwebhu afana nezatifiketi zokuzalwa zeentsana kunye nomazisi babazali ukuze le nqubo ihambe msinya ngaphandle kokubambezeleka okungekho mthethweni.
