Izindlela ezinqala zokuqeda imigca emide kwiiofisi ze-SASSA zethulwe kule veki ngesicwangciso esitsha sokusebenzisa amaselula namakhompyutha ukufaka izicelo zezibonelelo zoluntu ngaphandle kokuba abantu bahambe amabanga amade beya kuma emahlobo emvula nasebukhazikhazini belanga elishisayo. Lolu hlelo lwedijithali luvumela abafaki-zicelo ukuba balayishe amaxwebhu abo afanelekileyo njengomazisi, izatifiketi zentsana neencwadi zengxoxo zasebhange ngqo kwi-inthanethi besebenzisa i-website esemthethweni okanye i-WhatsApp number ekhethekileyo yomnyango.

Leli su lokuhlulwa kwezicelo lijolise ekunikezeni uncedo lwezindlu enesidima kuqala kulabo abasengozini enkulu yokuhlaselwa zezifo neentlekele ngezikhathi zasebusika lapho amakhaya amaninzi emijondolo engenisela amanzi emvula abandayo kakhulu. Isebe lezokuhlaliswa kwabantu liveze ukuba ulwakhiwo lwezindlu ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amabini luseza kuqala kungekudala kwaye izakhiwo ezi zizakuba neengqalasizinda ezifanelekileyo ezifana nombane osemthethweni namanzi amapompo amakhaya. Abahlali bakwamkele oku njengenyathelo lobulungiswa elizakuphelisa inkohlakalo nentswela-bulungisa apho kwakukho abantu abafumana izindlu zoxhaso ngendlela engekho mthethweni kanti abantu abafanele bahlelelekile emva kweminyaka emininzi belindile elubuthweni lwenkqubo yoluhlu lukahulumeni.

Olu hlelo lukunika ukudla lwenziwa ngokubambisana nemibutho engesiyiyo kakarhulumente kwaye lujolise ekulweni nengxaki yendlala kunye nokungondleki kakuhle kwabantwana abancinci nabo baphuma ezindlini ezingenaye umuntu ophetheyo osebenzayo ophangela izimali zanyanga zonke. Izikhungo lezi zizakube ziphethwe ngomame bendawo abazothola inkuthazo encinci yemali evela kumasipala kwaye zizakubonelela nangendawo ekhuselekileyo lapho abantwana bangafunda khona izifundo zabo emva kokuphuma kwesikole ekusebenzeni kwabo kwansuku zonke. Uhulumeni ucele amashishini amakhulu asendaweni ukuba aphose isandla ngale ndlela yokunikeza ukudla okanye izixhobo zokupheka ukuze lolu hlelo lukwazi ukufikelela nakweminye imizana esemajengetheni ehlala isenkingeni enkulu yendlala nobumpofu.

Olu ncedo lubaluleke kakhulu kuba lufakela isidima nokuzimela kubantu abaphila nokukhubazeka kwaye luyabanceda ukuba bakwazi ukuthatha inxaxheba kwizinto ezahlukeneyo zentuthuko nezoluntu ezisenzeka kwimiphakathi abahlala kuyo mihla le ngaphandle kokuxhomekeka kakhulu ezihlotsheni zabo. Amagosa ezenhlalakahle azakuhlala eqhuba iindibano zokufundisa imindeni indlela efanelekileyo yokunakekela nabantu abanale miba yomzimba ukunqanda ukuhlukunyezwa kunye nokucwaswa kwabo okusafumaneka kwezinye iindawo ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi. Abazali nabagcinisihlalo beentsapho babonge kakhulu lo mklamo mhle kakhulu bethi lolu hlobo loncedo lubuyisela ithemba olukhulu ebomini babantwana babo nabo bonke abathintekayo kule miba yempilo.

Emaphethelong ezindawo zasemakhaya ezisempumalanga sekuqalwe uhlelo olutsha lwexeshana lokunikeza uncedo lwezimali kwiintsapho ezihlaselwe ziintlekele ezifana nemililo emibi eyenzeka ngezikhathi zasebusika ecekela phansi izindlu nempahla yonke yasekhaya ngemizuzu embalwa nje. Lolu ncedo oluphuthumayo lukhutshwa ngumnyango wezophuhliso lwentlalontle ngokwama-voucher okuthenga ukudla, iingubo zokulala ezishisayo kunye nezixhobo zokuzakhela kwakhona izindlu zabo zethutyana ukuze amakhaya abe nendawo yokukhosela phambi kokuba uncedo lwezindlu zoxhaso oluhlala njalo lufike kule ndawo.

Isebe lezokuhlaliswa kwabantu licele uluntu ukuba luze neencwadi zabo zamazisi, iiphepha ezibonisa unikezelo lwendlu lokuqala kunye nezatifiketi zomshado kulabo abatshatileyo ukuze kwenziwe isiqiniseko sokuba itaytile ibhaliswa ngamagama abantu abafanele ngokupheleleyo emthethweni. Ukuba netaytile yomhlaba kunika umndeni ilungelo elipheleleyo lekhaya lawo kwaye kukhusela nentsana ukuba zibe nelifa elisemthethweni elimiselwe kakuhle elizakubanceda kwizinto ezizayo zobomi babo ngethuba elizayo. Kamasipala uqinisekisile ukuba le nqubo iyenziwa simahla kwaye akukho mmi ekumele ukuba ahlawule nayiphi na imali kwigosa likamasipala kuba oko kulicala elinzima lenkohlakalo elingabangela ukuba umntu agxothwe emsebenzini okanye abanjwe ngamapolisa.

Izindlela ezintsha zokuhlola nokuqinisekisa abantu abafumana isibonelelo sezimali sezinyanga ezithile esaziwa ngokuba yi-SRD grant zethulwe yi-SASSA kulo nyaka ngenjongo yokwenza ukuba ezi mali ziye kuphela kubantu abangenayo nayiphi na ingeniso yezimali ebhanke yabo. Amagosa ezenhlalakahle acacise ukuba isibonelelo sentsana siluncedo olukhulu oluqinisekisa ukuba abantwana bafumana ukudla okwanele okulwa nezifo kwaye bayakwazi nokuya ezinkulisa zoluntu ezisondelene nemizi yabo zasemakhaya. Abazali bakhuthaziwe ukuba basebenzise ezi mali ngendlela efanelekileyo ejolise kuphela kwiimfuno zomntwana kungekhona kwizinto zabadala ezifana neziphuzo nezitayile ezizodwa zokunxiba ezingancedi nganto ekukhuleni komntwana osemncane kakhulu.

Kulo mhlanganiswano kuye kwaphakanyiswa ukuba urhulumente anikeze abantu abadala uncedo lokufundiswa kwendlela yokusebenzisa amakhadi wabo ezibhanka ukuthenga ukudla ngqo kwiivenkile ngaphandle kokuba bakhuphe iimali ezininzi ezizinkozo ezibeka ubomi babo esichengeni esikhulu sokulwa nezigebengu ezitaladini. Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko lwenziwa ngenjongo yokwandisa imveliso yokudla kwiindawo zasemakhaya kunye nokunika abalimi abancinci amathuba amahle okuba bathengise izikhwebu zombona nemifino yabo emitsha kwiivenkile ezinkulu ezisezidolophini zale ndawo. Amagcisa ezolimo azakuhlala eqhuba iindibano zokufundisa abalimi iindlela zesimanje zokulima ezikwazi ukumelana neenguqu zezulu ezifana nebalela elide nemvula ezininzi ezonakalisa izityalo emhlabathini ukuba amakhaya akalungiswanga kakuhle. Abalimi bavakalise umbulelo wabo omkhulu bethi lolu ncedo luza kubasiza ukuba balime imihlaba yabo emininzi ebihleli ingasetyenziswa ngenxa yokubiza kakhulu kwezixhobo zokulima kunye nemithi yokukhusela izifo zezilwanyana ezilalini zethu zasekuhlaleni.

Lolu phulo lokugoma luholwa ngamagcisa ezempilo yezilwanyana avela emnyangweni wezolimo kwaye luhloselwe ukukhusela iinkomo, iigusha kunye neebhokhwe ekufeni ngenxa yezifo ezifana nomkhuhlane wamaphaphu kunye nezifo ezosulela izikhumba zezilwanyana lula kakhulu. Abalimi bafundisiwe nendlela efanelekileyo yokubona izimpawu zokuqala zokugula ezilwaneni zabo nokuba kumele bathathe ziphi izinyathelo zokuqala zokhuseleko ngaphambi kokuba babize abasizi bezolimo abaseduze nabo kummandla wasekuhlaleni. Urhulumente uqinisekisile ukuba lolu hlelo lukwenza umgomo lumahhala kwaye luza kujikeleza kwiilali zonke zale ndawo ukuze kukhuselwe uqoqosho lwasemakhaya oluxhomekeke kakhulu kwimfuyo esisiseko somndeni ngamunye wasezilalini.

Olu ncedo luza phantsi kwesu elitsha likahulumeni lokuphakamisa abalimi abancinci ukuba babe ngabalimi bezohwebo abakhulu abakwaziyo ukunika amathuba emisebenzi ematsha nentsha eninzi engasebenziyo ehlala kule mimandla yethu emakhaya jikelele kule mihla siphila kuyo. Abahlali bakwamkele oku ngomdlandla omkhulu bethi le nkqubo iza kuphelisa ingxaki yokulinda ixesha elide izixhobo ezivela ezidolophini ezikude kakhulu nezibiza imali eninzi ukuziqasha.

Izindlela ezintsha zokulawula ukusetyenziswa kwamanzi kwiitshatshazi zezolimo zethulwe kule veki ngesicwangciso esitsha sokwakha amachibi amancinci okugcina amanzi emvula kwiilali ezine ezomileyo nezisentshonalanga ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba abalimi banamanzi anele okunisela iitshatshazi zabo ngamaxesha ebalela elide. Lolu hlelo lusebenzisa amashaneli amancinci ehambisa amanzi ngqo kwiingcambu zezityalo ngendlela eyonga amanzi kakhulu kwaye inqanda nokuba amanzi achitheke phansi ngendlela engekho mthethweni okanye engancedi nganto kwizityalo zomhlaba. Abalimi bakule ndawo bafundiswe nendlela yokwenza umquba ngamacembe omoya nezinto zemvelo ezihlala emakhaya ukwenza inhlabathi ukuba ihlale inomswakama ixesha leentsuku ezininzi ngaphandle kokusebenzisa iilitha ezininzi zamanzi amapompo.

Leli ziko elitsha liza kubonelela ngemfundo ephathekayo lapho abafundi beza kuchitha ixesha labo elininzi beza kusebenza emhlabathini nasezindlini zezilwanyana ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi bafumana amakhono agcweleyo awaziwayo emthethweni wezwe lethu kule mihla. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni uqinisekisile ukuba izimali zokufunda zizakukhutshwa ngengxowa-mali yesizwe kwaye abafundi abavela kwiintsapho ezihluphekayo baza kufumana lolu ncedo mahhala phantsi kwenkqubo yokuxhasa abalimi abasafufusa. Inkokheli zoluntu zivakalise uvuyo olukhulu zathi le nkqubo iza kuzisa ushintsho oluhle kakhulu uqoqosho lwasemakhaya kwaye ikhuthaze ulutsha ukuba lubone ezolimo njengomthombo omkhulu wengcombolo nentuthuko elizweni jikelele laseMzantsi Afrika.

Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko lujolise ekunciphiseni igebe elikhona phakathi kwezikole zasemakhaya nezo zasemadolobheni ngokunikeza izixhobo zokufunda ezikumgangatho ophezulu kubantwana bonke belizwe lethu kungakhathaliseki iimeko zabo zentlalo nezomnotho emakhaya. Ootitshala bale mizi yemfundo baqeqeshiwe kulezi zinyanga ezidluleyo indlela efanelekileyo yokusebenzisa la mabhodi amatsha edijithali ukufundisa izifundo ezifana nezezibalo nezesayensi ngendlela elula nehehayo kakhulu ebantwaneni besikole. Abafundi babonise umdlandla nomfutho omkhulu bethi le nkqubo entsha iza kubanceda kakhulu ekubhaliseni kwizifundo eziphakamileyo emanyuvesi emva kokuba begqibile u-matshini wabo wefomu yesihlanu esikoleni.

Lolu phulo lokwakha lusekelwe ngezimali ngurhulumente wesizwe ngokubambisana nemibutho yezophuhliso kwaye lujolise ekunikezeni abantwana indawo yokufunda ekhuselekileyo nehlanzekileyo enesidima esifanelekileyo emthethweni wemfundo welizwe lakithi. Izakhiwo ezi zitsha zizakuba neendawo zokugcina amanzi amapompo ahlanzekileyo kunye neziphephetha-moya zombane ezizakunceda abantwana ngezikhathi zasebusika obubandayo kakhulu nasehlobo xa ilanga lishisa ngamandla amakhulu kummandla. Abazali nabagcinisihlalo beekomiti zezikole bazwakalise umbulelo wabo omkhulu bethi le nkqubo iza kubuyisela intlonipho nendlela efanelekileyo yokufunda ekhuselekileyo kwaye ikhuthaze nabantwana ukuba baze esikoleni mihla le ngaphandle kokoyika iimeko zezulu.

Lo mtapo wezincwadi omtsha unendawo ekhethekileyo eyenzelwe iintsana apho zizakukwazi ukufunda amabhuku anezithombe ezikhuthazayo ngezimpelasonto ngenjongo yokukhulisa uthando lokufunda nemfundo kubo besebancane kakhulu emakhaya abo. Masipala wesifunda unikezele ngezimali zokuthenga iincwadi ezintsha kwaye kuza kubanjwa neendibano zokufundisa uluntu indlela yokugcina le mizi yemfundo ukunqanda ukuba ingacekelwa phansi ngabantu ngezikhathi zola mabhoxo oqhankqalazo olungekho mthethweni ezitratweni zale ndawo. Ootitshala bezikole zengingqi babonge kakhulu lo mklamo mhle bethi uza kuzisa ushintsho olukhulu kwiimfuno zemfundo zabantwana neziphumo zabo zokuphela konyaka wezifundo.

Izindlela ezintsha zokuxhasa abafundi abaphuma kwiintsapho ezihlwempuzekileyo ngexesha lokufunda kwabo emanyuvesi nasezikhungweni zemfundo yezandla zethulwe ngomnyango wezemfundo ephakamileyo kule veki ngesicwangciso-mali esitsha sokwandisa iimali zofundo ze-NSFAS kulo nyaka uzayo-mali. Le nkqubo entsha iza kubandakanya iimali zokuhlawula iindawo zokuhlala abafundi, iincwadi zokufunda zonyaka kunye nenkxaso encinci yenyanga yokuthenga ukudla okunempilo ukuze umfundi ngamunye akwazi ukugxila ngokupheleleyo ezifundweni zakhe ngaphandle kokukhathazeka ngeendleko ezisindayo zekhaya.

Lolu phulo loqeqesho luzakuthatha isikhathi seenyanga ezintathu kwaye ootitshala baza kufundiswa indlela yokwenza amagumbi okufunda ukuba abe ziindawo ezimnandi nezamkelayo apho umntwana ngamunye enikwa ithuba lokukhula ngokwengqondo nangokwetalente yakhe. Urhulumente uza kubonelela nangezixhobo zokuzizisela ukudla ezikoleni mahhala phantsi kwenkqubo yokondla abantwana esele isize amawaka abantwana abavela kwiintsapho ezingenaye umuntu ophetheyo osebenzayo emakhaya abo. Abazali nabagcinisihlalo beekomiti zezikole bakwamkele oku ngomoya ophezulu bethi kule ndlela entsha imfundo yabantwana bethu iza kuba semgangathweni ophezulu kakhulu kwaye iphelise nentswela-bulungisa eyayikade ikhona kwixesha elidlulileyo zemfundo.

Leli kolishi laziwa ngama-TVET amakolishi lifumane inkxaso-mali enkulukazi evela emnyangweni ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba abafundi abaphothula izifundo zabo apha bafumana amakhono ahambelana ngqo nezidingo zezimboni zala maxesha kwaye bakwazi ukuzivulela namashishini wabo emitsha emakhaya. Intsha yakule ndawo bhalisele ezi zifundo ngobuninzi babo kwaye urhulumente uqinisekisile ukuba abafundi abavela kwiintsapho ezihluphekayo baza kufumana uncedo lwezezimali lokuhlawula ezi khosi mahhala ngaphandle kokubhadala nanye isenti. Umphakathi uwamkele ngolukhulu uthando lo mklamo omtsha bethi uza kuzisa amathuba amatsha omsebenzi nengcombolo entle elitalenteni lolutsha lwethu lwasemaphandleni oluhlala lulindelwe lukhulu empilweni yabo.

Lolu hlelo lwenzeka ngenjongo yokukhusela ikakhulukazi abantu abadala, iintsana ezisakhulayo kunye nabo baphila nezifo ezifana nomfutho wegazi ophezulu nesishukela esihlala sikhathaza abantu abaninzi kakhulu ngezikhathi zasebusika obubandayo kule mimandla yethu emakhaya. Umnyango usebenzise imitholampilo ehambahambayo ebuye yazisa uncedo lwamayeza rhoqo emakhaya ukuze abantu bangahlupheki ngenxa yokungabi nazo iimali zokuhamba ukuya ezibhedlela ezinkulu ezidolophini ezikude. Odokotela nabahlengikazi bendawo bakhuthaze abahlali ukuba basebenzise la mathuba okuhlolwa mahhala kwaye balandele neengcebiso ezinhle zezempilo malunga nokudla ukudla okunempilo okulinywa ezingadini zasemakhaya ukwakha amajoni omzimba amele ukuba omelele.

Lolu phulo lokufundisa luholwa yizisebenzi zezempilo zomphakathi ezihambela imizi ngemizi zishiya iikhondomu zasimahla zikhombisa nabantu abatsha indlela efanelekileyo yokuziphatha nemfundo yokuzihlonipha ukunqanda ukwanda kwezi zifo ezibulala isizwe sethu. Abahlali bakwazile nokufumana uncedo lokuhlolwa igazi labo mahhala khona lapho emakhaya abo kwaye abafunyaniswa benale miba bafakelwe kwangoko kwiinkqubo zonyango lwamayeza e-ARV anikezelwa ngurhulumente mahhala kuzo zonke izikhungo zezempilo zelizwe. Isebe lezempilo liqinisekisile ukuba la mayeza ahlala ekhona kwaye akukho namnye ummi ekumele ukuba aswle amayeza akhe ngenxa yokungabikho kwawo emahgovisini ezempilo kamasipala wasendaweni yakubo kulo nyaka.

Lolu hlelo luququzelelwe ngodokotela abakhethekileyo abavela ezibhedlela ezinkulu zelizwe ngokubambisana nomnyango wezempilo wesifundazwe kwaye luzise uncedo olukhulu kubantu abangaphezu kwamakhulu amabini kule veki iqalileyo yomsebenzi omhle wentuthuko. Izikhulu zezempilo ziveze ukuba ezi zinhlinzo zenzeka simahla kwiilori ezinkulu ezinezixhobo zale mihla zonyango kwaye abaguli bafumana nezipho zezibuko ezizakubanceda ukuba babone kakuhle emva kokuba amehlo wabo elulame ngokupheleleyo emakhaya abo. Uluntu lonke lonwabile kakhulu ngale nkqubo entle bethi lolu hlobo loncedo lubuyisela ukukhanya nethemba elitsha ebomini babantu abadala abebengasakwazi na ukuzenzela izinto ezincinci zaseshini ekhaya.

Izindlela ezintsha zokwakhiwa kwengqalasizinda yemigwaqo zethulwe kummandla waseNgcobo kule veki ngenjongo yokuphucula indlela ezixhuma imizana emikhulu nezikhungo zezohwebo ezidolophini zale ndawo emva kokuba imigwaqo emidala yonakaliswe ziimvula ezinkulu ezine ezinsukwini ezidluleyo. Lolu hlelo lokwakha luza kufaka phakathi ukubekwa kwetiyela elitsha elithembekileyo, ukwakhiwa kwemisele emikhulu ehambisa amanzi emvula kunye nalawo amabhuloho amanyane ezandla anceda abantwana besikole ukuba bawele imilambo ezele ngexesha lokunetha okukhulu. Masipala wengingqi unikezele ngezimali ezivela kwingxowa-mali yeziphuthumayo kwaye kuqinisekisiwe ukuba lo msebenzi uza kudala amathuba emisebenzi yesikhakhana kubantu abasha abangaphezu kwekhulu abahlala kule miphakathi ethintekayo yentuthuko.

Lolu hlelo lujolise ekupheliseni ingxaki yokunqamuka kwamanzi ebilokhu ihlupha abahlali ixesha elide ngenxa yokuba iipompo ezindala bezivaleka ngenxa kadoti kadoti neentlenga ezisuka emilanjeni emikhulu yasekuqaleni. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziveze ukuthi zizosebenzisa ubuchwepheshe obusezingeni eliphezulu kakhulu ukuhlunga amanzi kwaye kufakwe neemitha ezizokusiza ukulawula ukusetyenziswa kwamanzi ukunqanda ukuba amanzi amaninzi angachitheki phansi ngendlela engekho mthethweni ekhaya. Abahlali bavakalise uvuyo lwabo omkhulu bethi le nkqubo entsha iza kukhulisa isidima semizi yabo kwaye ibasize ukuba baphile impilo enezempilo nehlanzekileyo ekhuselekileyo kunoma yiziphi izifo ezisuka emanzini angcolileyo.

Lo msitho mkhulu uququzelelwe ziinkokheli zoluntu kunye nolutsha lwasendaweni ngenjongo yokufundisa abantwana abasakhulayo ngokubaluleka kokugcina amasiko nezithethe zethu ezintle ezisenza sibe sisonke isizwe esinesidima nethemba elikhulu ebomini bethu bemihla le. Abahlali bakwazile nokonwabela ukudla kwemveli okufana nomngqusho, amasi kunye nenyama eyosiweyo ngendlela yesintu ngethuba kukhuthazwa nabantu abadala ukuba babhale phantsi iintsomi namabali amandulo ukuze angalahleki kwizizukulwane ezizayo zangomuso wethu. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni uxhase lo mnyhadala ngezixhobo zomsindo kwaye uthembise ukuba lo msitho uza kuba yinto eyenzeka rhoqo ngonyaka kule ndawo ukukhuthaza ezokuvakasha nenkuthazo entle yamasiko.

Kulandela le meko entle kuye kwanconywa kakhulu nabasebenzi bezempilo kunye namakhankatha athathe inxaxheba ekunikezeni imfundo neengcebiso ezifanelekileyo zokhuseleko nenhlanzeko ezikoleni zolwaluka ukunqanda ukuba kubekho imiba yokulimala okanye ukufa kwabantwana njengoko kwakusenzeka kwezinye iindawo ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi. Abazali babantwana babonge kakhulu inkuthazo entle neyemvelo eboniswe ngamalungu onke omphakathi wasendaweni wasekuhlaleni bethi oku kubonisa umoya omhle kakhulu wobunye nebhambiswano elingasaze liphele phakathi kwethu isizwe sakithi jikelele saseMzantsi Afrika kule mihla yonke ezayo yobomi.

Loluhlelo luhloselwe kusondeza tifundvo netinsita tahulumende letisisekelo edvute nemimphakathi kute kuncitshiswe timfashini netindleko letisindako tekuhamba ngetitfuthi titaladi kuya emadolobheni lamakhulu lapho kutholakala khona letingongolo tetinsita. Takhamuzi takule tindzawo betiloku tikhala isikhatsi lesidze ngenxa yekushoda kwemahhovisi lamakhulu aloMnyango wetaseKhaya kanye newetetiMali kule tikhungo tasezilalini lapho lwati lungekho khona ngalokushelela. Manje ngalokusheshisa kwetisebenzi tahulumende letitfunyelwe emakhaya kulesigodzi, bantfwana labasandza kutalwa sebathola titifiketi tabo tekutalwa mahhala ngaphandle kwekuvaleka emigaceni lemidze yetitolo netakhiwo tamasipala.

Loku kwenteka ngetingcoco letibanjelwa etindlunkhulu temakhosi lapho wonhe umhlali anikwa litfuba lekuveta takhe timvo letitawusetjentiswa kubumba umtsetfo wokugcina lotawendluliselwa ePhalamende kungekudala kakhulu kulomnyaka. Tikhulu talomnyango tetemhlaba tichatise kutsi lendlela lensha itawesula yonhe imibango nemisimeto lemidala lebeyivame kubangela kutsi bomake bangasitakali ngemihlaba yelifa ngetizatfu tekwesaba kukhishwa etindzaweni tabo tebukhosi. Umphakathi ukhuthatiwe kutsi uphume ngelubuningi bawo kulemihlangano letako kute kucinisekiswe kutsi emaphuzu labalulekile layatfintfwa ngaphambi kokutsi kuthathwe tincomo tekugcina letitawubeka lelive endzaweni lekahle.

Kulandela letikhalo leticacile letivela emalungwini omphakathi amakomiti etekuphepha ahlangane netikhulu tamasipala kanye nemaphoyisa lendawo kute kulungiswe loluhlelo lolungakatsatfwa kahle lwetinsita tesikhashana kulesigodzi. Kuvele kutsi masipala sewuvele ukhiphe isabelomali lesikhethekile sekutsenga letinye tintfo tekusebenta letifana nemagetsi amagesi kanye nemishini lensha letawesiza kukhanyisa titaladi tethu kule tinsuku letitako tebusika. Ngaloko ke maphoyisa nawo atawukwengeza isibalo semoto letijikelezako ngetinkathi tasebusuku kute kuvikelwe labo labahlala etindzaweni letisengotini kakhulu tebugebengu. Umphakathi uceliwe kutsi ubambisane nalabasebenti bamasipala batise namaphoyisa ngalabo labonisa letakhiwo nemigqa yamagesi ngendlela engekho emtsetfweni jikelele.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi langcolile kule ndzawo yaseMkhondo kudale kutsi takhamuzi tikhombise kunganatseki kwato ngetinkundla tekukhulumisana namasipala ngenhloso yekutsi uhulumeni atfumele tisebenti letitawulungisa lolwoni lolukhulu lolukhona lapha kulemiphakathi yethu. Loku kuholele ekutheni imeya yalesigodzi ihambele kule tindzawo ngalokunentshisekelo yakhe bukhoma kute eve letikhalo kwaye atfule netincumo letisheshako letitawenta kutsi uncedo lufike ngaphandle kwekulibala okungenasidzingo nakancane. Kumenyezelwe kutsi ithenda yekwakhiwa kwetigodlo temanti netiyela nshshisekelo lensha iseyamukelwe kantsi netinkampani letakhako titawucala kusebenta kulesisonto lesitako ngelusito lwelwazi lwemajaha alapha endzaweni labangasebenti.

Lesikhungo sitawesekelwa ngetimali letivela etinkampanini letimele kanye nasesikhungweni sentfuthuko yavelonkhe kute letifundvo letitawubekwa khona tibe semgangatfweni lophakeme kakhulu lowemukelekile emaveni amhlaba jikelele. Abafundi labatawubhalisa lapha batawutfola litfuba lekufundza ngetamakhompyutha, kushisela, kwakha ngetitini kanye nekulungisa timoto letonakele tasekhaya nasetinkampanini. Loku kutawuphungula kakhulu lizinga lebugebengu kule tindzawo ngoba lentsha itawube isebenta itfola netitifiketi letingabasiza kufuna imisebenzi lekhokhako ngetikhathi letitako tebomi babo. Abazali babonge kakhulu lesinyathelo batsi silubuyisela emuva litsemba lelabe selilahlekile ngenxa yekutsi bantfwana babo bebahlala etitaladini bangenti lutho lolunenzuzo.

Loku kulandela izikhalazo letinyenti letivela kubahlali labatsi lephunga lelibi lelivela kulodoti libeka timphilo tebantfwana babo esengotini lenkhulu yekutsi batfole tifo letosulelanako letifana neshukhulu nemikhuhlane leminye. Uhulumeni wasendzaweni sewutsite utawutsenga tilinganiso letikhulu tetikitshana tekulahla udoti letitawubekwa etindzaweni letinyenti tasezilokishini kantsi nemaloli latswala udoti atawufika kabili ngeliviki kuto tonhe letingcenye zomphakathi. Malunga nalabo labachubeka nekulahla tinhlavu tetingubo nebeketitolo etitaladini kumenyezelwe kutsi batawunika tinhlawulo letisindako letitawesatshwa ngabo bonhe abantu abangafuni kugcina indzawo ihlobile. Takhamuzi tivumelane ngelivi linye kutsi titawusebentisana nemasipala kuleli phulo lelihle kabi.

Labasebenti batawube bahlobisa imigwaqo, baphawula letinye tindzawo letibonakala tinesidzingo sekulungiswa, bafake netihlahla letinhle letitawenta le live libukeke lilihle kakhulu emehlweni etivakashi letinyenti letifika kule tindzawo ngezikhathi temaholide. Isabelomali saloluhlelo sikhulisiwe kakhulu kulomnyaka kute kufakwe nebamake labafuna kusita etindlini tabo tasekhaya njengoba banyenti babo labakhulisa bantfwana bodwa ngaphandle kwelusito lwetimali letivela kubayise babantfwana. Izikhulu titaladi tikhuthaze wonhe umphakathi kutsi ubasekele labasebenti ngetintfo letifana nemanti ekunatsa nawo gogo ngetinkathi lapho basebenta khona ngaphansi kwelilanga lelishisako kabi kule tinsuku letitako teluhlobo lomnyaka wasekhaya.

Emaphethelong edolobha laseErmelo kucalwe iphrojekthi lenkhulu yekwakha tindlu tolutsho letitawunika takhamuzi letinyenti letihlala etindzaweni tasemijondolo litfuba lekuba netindlu letinesidima letiphephile letinemigqa yamagesi kanye nemanti ahlanzekile langaphakathi etindlini tabo. Lomklamo longakatsatfwa ngetimali letinyenti uhlose kuphelisa lomonakalo lomkhulu lowenteka ngezikhathi temililo nemikhukhulwane letitswalwa timvula letinkulu letivame kudla timphilo tebantfu kule tindawo letisemajengetheni emadolobha asentshonalanga. Tikhulu tetindlu tiqinisekisile kutsi luhlu lwabantu labatawutfola letindlu luhloliwe ngendlela lekahle kakhulu kute kuvikelwe inkohlakalo nalabo labafuna kutsenga letindlu ngendlela engekho emtsetfweni basishiye ngemuva sivese lesine sidzingo sangempela.

Lendlela lensha isetjentiswa kute wonhe umnikazi wendzawo atfole itaytile yomhlaba lebonisa kutsi lelo khaya lakhe ngalokusemtsetfweni kwaye kute lotawumkhipha lapho ngaphandle kwetincumo letivela enkantolo lenkhulu yelive lakitsi lakwasidzingo. Ukuba netaytile yomhlaba kusita ngetindlela letinyenti ngoba umndeni sewungakwazi kufaka ticelo tetimali letibambisako emabhankini amakhulu kute ucale amabhizinisi amancinci latasita ekutseni kukhuliswe umnotho wasemakhaya uphungule nendlala emakhaya. Tikhulu tikhuthaze bonhe labanenshisekelo kutsi batswale omazisi babo netincumo letidala letasayinwa ngamakhosi kute lolu hlelo luhambe ngokushesha lokukhulu ngaphandle kwekulibala lokungadingeki.

Izindlela letinsha tekunika tinsita kubantfu labaphila nekukhubazeka tethulwe ngomnyango wetenhlalakahle kuleli sonto ngenhloso yekuphakamisa isidima salabo labasengotini yekulahlwa ngemiphakathi ngetizatfu temitfombo yetimphilo tabo emakhaya. Uhulumeni sewutsite utawunika titulo tetitulo temahhala letitawufaka phakathi kwetihlalo temasondo, iinduku letisizako tekuhamba kanye nemishini yekulalela kubantfu labanetinselelo tekutwa etindlebeni tabo tasekhaya nasetikoleni jikelele. Tisebenti tetenhlalakahle titawuchubeka tihlola letimo etindlini kute kucinisekiswe kutsi labo labancono ngempela bayasitakala kwaye nekucwaswa kwabo kuyaphela kule tikhungo tetolimo netemfundvo telive lakitsi.

Loluhlelo loluxhaswe ngetimali letivela esikhungweni sentfuthuko yesive, lufundzisa labomake kutsi bangawakha kanjani amabhizinisi ekutfunga tikhwama netimphahla tasesikoleni kanye nekubhaka sinkwa nemakhekhe leti dayiswa kulemiphakathi tabo yasekhaya. Loku kubaluleke kakhulu kulomnyaka ngoba umnotho welive useseveni lelinzima kabi kantsi netikhwama tekutsenga lokuphathelene nekudla tiyandza mihla le ngetindlela letisindako kabi emindenini emnyenti lehluphekile. Labomake labacedze letifundvo batasitwa futsi ngetinalithi netitfombe letitawesiza kukhulisa lomkhiqizo wabo kude nezinga lebelikhona ngaphambili emsebenzini wabo wetandla.

Lolu hlelo lwamandla avuselelekayo lunikeza isisombululo lesihlala njalo ngoba lawamaphompo awakho madinga kagesi ojwayelekile lotisandza kubitfwa ngetimali letinyenti tase-Eskom kulesikhatsi lesiphila kuso ngoku elizweni lakitsi. Tikhulu tetemanti ticacise kutsi lentsha yalapha endzaweni ifundziswe nendlela lekahle yekunakekela letixhobo kute tivikelwe kulabo labafuna kutona tikhungo temphakathi ngetizatfu tetimfuno tabo tobugwebengu. Takhamuzi titise kutsi tiyakujabulela kakhulu loku ngoba tiyasondelana kakhulu nemanti futsi titawukwazi nekuvula tingadi tasetindlini tekutshala imifino letsatfwako kute kulwwe nendlala nobumpofu lobukhona etindlini.

Kulandela letikhalo ikomiti yamasipala ihlangene nemnyango wetemisebenzi yemphakathi kute kukhishwe sikhwama lesiphuthumako lesitawesiza kutsi tinkampani letakhako ticale kusebenta ngalokushesha kulomgwaqo ngaphambi kokutsi tibe tinyenti tingozi tetimoto. Kuvele kutsi lo mklamo utawunika lentsha yalapha endzaweni ematfuba emisebenzi yesikhashana futsi batawuhamba ngetitifiketi letitawubasiza ngetinkathi letitako tebomi babo lapho bafuna imisebenzi lekhudlwana ezweni. Bashayeli beemoto bamkele loku ngelutsandvo lolukhulu batsi besekulikhuni kabi kuhamba kulemigwaqo lemibi lebeyikhinyabeza kakhulu netikhwama tabo n ngenxa yekulimala kwetimoto tabo njalo.

Izindlela letinsha tekulawula kukhishwa kwetibonelelo tetimali tahulumeni letatiwa nge-SASSA tethulwe kuleli sonto ngenhloso yekuphungula inkohlakalo etindzaweni lapho gogo namkhulu balanda khona letimali tabo tanyanga zonke tasekhaya. Umnyango sewutsite wonhe umndeni kumele ucinisekise kutsi loyo lolandako nguye ngempela lowemukelekile kulesisikhungo sentsisekelo ngelusito lwemishini lensha lesebentisa tithonjana teminwe netitfombe tebuso bemutfu lowenta lesicelo. Loku kulandela imibiko leminyenti yekutsi kukhona bantfu labasaphila ngetimali tebantu labasandza kushona noma labo labatswala omazisi bemgunyathi labangasiwo emtsetfweni wakwasidzingo welive lakitsi laseNingizimu Afrika.

Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko luhloselwe kuphungula lelo gebe lelisele isikhatsi lesidze kukhona phakathi kwetikhungo tetemfundvo tasedolobheni kanye nalesemakhaya letingavamile kutsi tibe netintfo letenele tekusebenta temalungiselelo eemviwo tetakhamuzi tethu letisakhula. Othisha bazo tonhe letikole baqeqeshiwe kule tinyanga letidlekile ngetindlela letinsha tekufundzisa kule tikhungo letinsha tabo kute lwati lwabo lube semgangatfweni lophakeme kakhulu. Abafundi bakhombise umdlandla lomalungiselelo laphakeme kakhulu batsi bafisa kakhulu kutsi le live liyasondelana nabo ngetingcenye tetemfundvo letinesidima lesiphelele lesemukelekile emhlabeni wonhe.

Letimoto tetamayeza titawube tihamba nabo dokotela nabahlengikazi labalungele kuhlola tifo letifana nemfutho weligazi lophakeme, sifo sikashukela kanye netifo letinyenti letosulelanako letivame kukhathaza kakhulu kulesisikhungo sasekhaya setfu. Abahlali baceliwe kutsi baphume ngelubuningi babo kule tikhungo ngezinsuku lapho letimoto tifika ngakhona kulesigodzi kute batfole lolu sizo lwamahhala lolubuyisela emuva isidima nelitsemba leliphakeme kakhulu emphakathini jikelele wethu. Uhulumeni utsite emayeza ahlala ekhona kwaye kute lotawushiywa ngaphandle ngetizatfu tekutsi umndeni wakhe uhluphekile kuleli live lakitsi elisentshonalanga lesigodzi sethu.

Lemisebenzi leyentiwa ngaphansi kokukhokela kwetetemisebenzi yemphakathi, inikela ngemisebenzi yesikhashana kubantu labasha labangaphezu kwamashumi lasikhombisa alapha kulesigodzi kule tinsuku letidlekile tebomi babo njengoba batfola netimali letisita emakhaya. Masipala sewutsite utawuchubeka utfumela tisebenti letitawubuka letakhiwo njalo ngenyanga kute kucinisekiswe kutsi letimvula letitako tebusika neteluhlobo tishiya imiphakathi yetfu isendzaweni lekahle kakhulu lephephile kunoma yikuphi lomonakalo. Abahlali baceliwe kutsi bangalahli udoti kulemisele yetimvula ngoba loku kubangela kutsi letiyela tivaleke kwaye letimvula ticekele phansi tintfo tabo tasekhaya.

Kulandela letinhlupheko letisindako emakomiti abahlali ahlangane netikhulu ta-Eskom kanye nabameli bamasipala kute kulungiswe luhlelo lolusha lolutawesiza kutsi labasebenti babeke letinsita ngokushesha lokukhulu kulomnyaka we-2026 lowasungulwa njengemnyaka wetentfuthuko yesive. Kumenyezelwe kutsi letintambo tetamagesi titawufakwa kuto tonhe letingcenye letisele ngaphandle kwaye netinkampani letakhako titawutsenga lwati lwalentsha yalapha endzaweni kulemisebenzi yesikhashana. Umphakathi uceliwe kutsi ubekezele kulesisikhungo sentfuthuko kwaye usebentisane kahle kakhulu nalabo abatsunyelwe kusita kuleli phulo lelihle kabi emphakathini.
